Abathur.name: Abathur
Abathur.title: Evolution Master
Abathur.searchText: Abathur Zerg Swarm HotS Heart of the Swarm StarCraft II 2 SC2 Star2 Starcraft2 SC slug Double Soak
Abathur.description: A unique Hero that can manipulate the battle from anywhere on the map.
Abathur.infoText: Abathur, the Evolution Master of Kerrigan's Swarm, works ceaselessly to improve the zerg from the genetic level up. His hate for chaos and imperfection almost rivals his hatred of pronouns.

Basic.name: Symbiote
Basic.shortText: Assist an ally and gain new abilities
Basic.fullText: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.

Basic.name: Toxic Nest
Basic.shortText: Spawn a mine
Basic.fullText: Spawn a mine that becomes active after a short time. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">153</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and reveals the enemy for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Heroic.name: Evolve Monstrosity
Heroic.shortText: Minion or Locust becomes a powerful Monstrosity
Heroic.fullText: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> Basic Attack damage, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.

Heroic.name: Ultimate Evolution
Heroic.shortText: Clone target allied Hero and control it
Heroic.fullText: Clone target allied Hero and control it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Spell Power, <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus Attack Damage, and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.

Trait.name: Locust Strain
Trait.shortText: Spawn locusts that attack down the nearest lane
Trait.fullText: Spawns a Locust to attack down the nearest lane every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. Locusts last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16</c> seconds, have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">350</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> health and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">58</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage with each Basic Attack, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> bonus damage to enemy Structures.

Mount.name: Deep Tunnel
Mount.shortText: Tunnel to a location.
Mount.fullText: Quickly tunnel to a visible location.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Heroic.name: Evolve Monstrosity Active
Heroic.fullText: Activate to cast Symbiote on Abathur's Monstrosity.

Activable.name: Calldown: MULE
Activable.shortText: Activate to heal Structures
Activable.fullText: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds, healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c> Health every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Activable.name: Locust Brood
Activable.shortText: Spawn a group of Locusts
Activable.fullText: Activate to spawn <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Locusts at a nearby location.

Activable.name: Locust Nest
Activable.shortText: Create Locust Nests
Activable.fullText: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.

Level1.name: Pressurized Glands
Level1.shortText: Increases Spike Burst range and decreases cooldown
Level1.fullText: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and decreases the cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level1.name: Envenomed Nest
Level1.shortText: Toxic Nests deal more damage, reduce Armor
Level1.fullText: Toxic Nests deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> more damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Reinforced Carapace
Level1.shortText: Increase Carapace Shield
Level1.fullText: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level1.name: Survival Instincts
Level1.shortText: Increases Locust Health and damage
Level1.fullText: Increases Locust's Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> and damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level4.name: Adrenal Overload
Level4.shortText: Symbiote host gains Attack Speed
Level4.fullText: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> increased Attack Speed.

Level4.name: Needlespine
Level4.shortText: Increases Stab damage and range
Level4.fullText: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level4.name: Prolific Dispersal
Level4.shortText: Increases Toxic Nest charges, duration
Level4.fullText: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> seconds, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, and add <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges.

Level7.name: Vile Nest
Level7.shortText: Toxic Nests slow Move Speed
Level7.fullText: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Networked Carapace
Level7.shortText: Carapace Shields all nearby allies
Level7.fullText: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.

Level7.name: Calldown: MULE
Level7.shortText: Activate to heal Structures
Level7.fullText: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds, healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c> Health every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level10.name: Ultimate Evolution
Level10.shortText: Clone target allied Hero and control it
Level10.fullText: Clone target allied Hero and control it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Spell Power, <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus Attack Damage, and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.

Level10.name: Evolve Monstrosity
Level10.shortText: Minion or Locust becomes a powerful Monstrosity
Level10.fullText: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> Basic Attack damage, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.

Level13.name: Spatial Efficiency
Level13.fullText: Symbiote's Stab gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Soma Transference
Level13.shortText: Spike Burst heals for each Hero hit
Level13.fullText: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">64</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per enemy Hero hit.

Level13.name: Bombard Strain
Level13.shortText: Locusts gain a ranged attack, increased duration
Level13.fullText: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level16.name: Envenomed Spikes
Level16.shortText: Spike Burst Slows Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Adrenaline Boost
Level16.shortText: Carapace increases Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Volatile Mutation
Level16.shortText: Heroic summons radiate damage
Level16.fullText: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">137</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or Monstrosity for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level16.name: Locust Brood
Level16.shortText: Spawn a group of Locusts
Level16.fullText: Activate to spawn <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Locusts at a nearby location.

Level20.name: Evolutionary Link
Level20.shortText: Ultimate Evolution target gets a Shield
Level20.fullText: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of their maximum Health. Refreshes every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Evolution Complete
Level20.shortText: Monstrosity gains Attack Damage
Level20.fullText: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level20.name: Hivemind
Level20.shortText: Symbiote two targets
Level20.fullText: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero.  This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.

Level20.name: Locust Nest
Level20.shortText: Create Locust Nests
Level20.fullText: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.

AbathurSymbiote.name: Symbiote
AbathurSymbiote.description: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.

Basic.name: Stab
Basic.shortText: Shoots a spike that deals damage to the first enemy it contacts.
Basic.fullText: Shoots a spike towards target area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">119</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy it contacts.

Basic.name: Spike Burst
Basic.shortText: Damage nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.

Basic.name: Carapace
Basic.fullText: Shields the assisted ally for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Allied Heroes are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">22</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second while the Shield is active. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Cancel Symbiote
Heroic.fullText: Cancels the Symbiote ability.

Mount.name: Deep Tunnel
Mount.shortText: Tunnel to a location.
Mount.fullText: Order your Evolved Monstrosity to quickly tunnel to a visible location

Alarak.name: Alarak
Alarak.title: Highlord of the Tal'darim
Alarak.searchText: Alarak Ascendant Protoss SC SC2 StarCraft Star2 Starcraft2 II 2 Legacy of the Void LotV Covert Ops CO Displace Burst
Alarak.description: A combo Assassin that can move enemies around and punish mistakes.
Alarak.infoText: Not all heroes are born of altruism... some, like Alarak, simply desire vengeance. As the new Highlord of the Tal'darim, Alarak leads his people to a destiny free of the corrupt influence of the fallen xel'naga, Amon.

Basic.name: Discord Strike
Basic.shortText: Damage and silence enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> second delay, enemies in front of Alarak take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are silenced for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Telekinesis
Basic.shortText: Push enemies towards a location
Basic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Create a force, pushing Alarak and all enemies hit from the targeted point towards the targeted direction. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">48</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies.

Basic.name: Lightning Surge
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">62</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to an enemy and an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> health for each Hero hit.

Heroic.name: Deadly Charge
Heroic.shortText: Channel to charge a long distance
Heroic.fullText: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Heroic.name: Counter-Strike
Heroic.shortText: Prevents damage to deal damage in a large area
Heroic.fullText: Alarak targets an area and channels for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Trait.name: Sadism
Trait.shortText: Each point of Sadism increases Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing against enemy Heroes by 1%Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.
Trait.fullText: Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Trait.name: Counter-Strike
Trait.shortText: Deal increased ability damage to Heroes
Trait.fullText: Alarak targets an area and channels for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Sadism</s><n/><n/>Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> against enemy Heroes.<n/><n/>Takedowns increase Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

Heroic.shortText: Charge Recklessly
Heroic.fullText: Unleash Alarak's Deadly Charge.<n/><n/>Issuing a move order while this is channeling will cancel the cast at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Trait.name: Deadly Charge
Trait.shortText: Deal increased ability damage to Heroes
Trait.fullText: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.

Trait.shortText: Charge Recklessly
Trait.fullText: Unleash Alarak's Deadly Charge.<n/><n/>Issuing a move order while this is channeling will cancel the cast at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Rite of Rak'Shir
Activable.shortText: Mark and damage Hero to increase Sadism
Activable.fullText: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.

Basic.name: Lightning Surge
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">62</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to an enemy and an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> health for each Hero hit.

Activable.name: Hasty Bargain
Activable.shortText: Activate to reduce Sadism bonus and reset Basic Ability cooldowns
Activable.fullText: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

Activable.name: Last Laugh
Activable.shortText: Cleanse and teleport, but reduce Health
Activable.fullText: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times with Basic Abilities within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>.

Activable.name: Might of the Highlord
Activable.shortText: Gain both Heroic Abilities
Activable.fullText: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

Activable.name: Might of the Highlord
Activable.shortText: Gain both Heroic Abilities
Activable.fullText: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

Level1.name: Overwhelming Power
Level1.shortText: Discord Strike grants Attack Speed, Lifesteal
Level1.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of the damage dealt, increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Ruthless Momentum
Level1.shortText: Reduce cooldown at high Health
Level1.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20.</c> Telekinesis's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster while above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> Health.

Level1.name: Extended Lightning
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Reduce Sadism, empower Lightning Surge
Level1.fullText: Reduce Sadism by 10%.Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.

Level4.name: Chaos Reigns
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit Heroes to increase Discord Strike damage
Level4.fullText: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.

Level4.name: Negatively Charged
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Lightning Surge center damage
Level4.fullText: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.

Level4.name: Show of Force
Level4.shortText: Ability combos deal bonus damage, grant Sadism
Level4.fullText: Heroes hit with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> of Alarak's Abilities within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">61</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and increase Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c>, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. <n/><n/>Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.

Level7.name: Dissonance
Level7.shortText: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration
Level7.fullText: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Hindered Motion
Level7.shortText: Telekinesis Slows
Level7.fullText: Telekinesis Slows enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Applied Force
Level7.shortText: Reduce Sadism, increase Telekinesis distance, range
Level7.fullText: Reduce Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>, but Telekinesis pushes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> further and has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> increased range.

Level10.name: Deadly Charge
Level10.shortText: Channel to charge a long distance
Level10.fullText: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.

Level10.name: Counter-Strike
Level10.shortText: Prevents damage to deal damage in a large area
Level10.fullText: Alarak targets an area and channels for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level13.name: Blade of the Highlord
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.<n/><n/>Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.

Level13.name: Pure Malice
Level13.fullText: Increase Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> any time an allied Hero dies, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.<n/><n/>Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.

Level13.name: Rite of Rak'Shir
Level13.shortText: Mark and damage Hero to increase Sadism
Level13.fullText: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.

Level16.name: Lethal Onslaught
Level16.shortText: Discord Strike grants Sadism bonus to Basic Attacks
Level16.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.

Level16.name: Lightning Barrage
Level16.shortText: Center hits grant free Lightning Surge cast
Level16.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.

Level16.name: Mocking Strikes
Level16.shortText: Reduce cooldowns against disabled Heroes
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.

Level20.name: Wrath of the Highlord
Level20.shortText: Deadly Charge empowers Sadism's damage<n/>Basic Abilities reduce Counter-Strike's cooldown
Level20.fullText: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of Sadism's bonus damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.

Level20.name: Might of the Highlord
Level20.shortText: Gain both Heroic Abilities
Level20.fullText: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.

Level20.name: Last Laugh
Level20.shortText: Cleanse and teleport, but reduce Health
Level20.fullText: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times with Basic Abilities within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>.

Level20.name: Hasty Bargain
Level20.shortText: Activate to reduce Sadism bonus and reset Basic Ability cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.

Alexstrasza.name: Alexstrasza
Alexstrasza.title: The Life-Binder
Alexstrasza.searchText: Alexstraza Alekstrasza Alekstraza Warcraft 2 WC2 WoW Cataclysm Wrath of the Lich King WotLK dragon elf Queen of Dragons Fire Slow Displace Sustain Healer
Alexstrasza.description: A Healer who shares her Health with allies and can transform into a Dragon to empower her Abilities.
Alexstrasza.infoText: Alexstrasza, the queen of dragons, was empowered by the titans to be the guardian of all life on Azeroth. She has aided mortals time and again, even at great personal cost. Now, she soars across the Nexus, protecting life wherever she finds it.

Basic.name: Gift of Life
Basic.shortText: Give a portion of Health to an allied Hero
Basic.fullText: Sacrifice <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of Alexstrasza's current Health, healing an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> of that amount.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Alexstrasza's Health regeneration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen: Breath of Life</c><n/>Cooldown greatly reduced and does not cost Health.

Basic.name: Abundance
Basic.shortText: Heal allied Heroes in an area
Basic.fullText: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of their maximum Health.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen: Preservation</c><n/>Heal area and amount greatly increased.

Basic.name: Flame Buffet
Basic.shortText: Launch a fireball that ignites enemies and can Slow them
Basic.fullText: Launch a fireball, Burning enemies hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hitting enemies that are already Burning deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus damage upon impact, Slows them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, and refunds the Mana cost.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen: Wing Buffet</c><n/>Damage and Knockback enemies in an arc.

Heroic.name: Life-Binder
Heroic.shortText: Link Alexstrasza's Health with an ally
Heroic.fullText: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">480</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Dragonqueen:</c> Cast range increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c>.

Heroic.name: Cleansing Flame
Heroic.shortText: Rain healing and damaging fire from the sky
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, take to the sky and drop <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> fireballs over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.<n/><n/><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.

Trait.name: Dragonqueen
Trait.shortText: Transform into a dragon aspect with empowered Abilities
Trait.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, transform into a dragon and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.<n/><n/>While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Abilities are empowered, and her Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">143</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and heal allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">43</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> in an arc in front of her. Additionally, the duration of incoming Stuns, Roots, and Slows, is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.<n/><n/>Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Life Unbound
Activable.shortText: Heal an ally and damage enemies
Activable.fullText: Activate to heal an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of their maximum Health and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.<n/><n/>Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.</c>

Activable.name: Pacify
Activable.shortText: Slow an enemy Hero and reduce their damage
Activable.fullText: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Dragon Scales
Activable.shortText: Gain Armor while disabled
Activable.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after. Can only trigger once every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Blessing of the Red
Activable.shortText: Grant bonus Health to an ally
Activable.fullText: Activate to grant an allied Hero <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500</c> bonus maximum Health until they die.<n/><n/>Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.

Level1.name: Live and Let Live
Level1.shortText: High Health reduces Gift of Life cooldown
Level1.fullText: While Alexstrasza is above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> faster.

Level1.name: Circle of Life
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes empower Abundance
Level1.fullText: Quest: Collect Regeneration Globes.Reward: After collecting 10 Regeneration Globes, Abundance heals for an additional 5% maximum Health.Reward: After collecting 15 Regeneration Globes, Abundance's healing burst creates a Regeneration Globe.

Level1.name: Flames of Fury
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen cooldown
Level1.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from 50 to 40.Quest: Hit 20 Burning Heroes with Flame Buffet.Reward: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen's cooldown by 5 seconds.

Level4.name: Surge of Vitality
Level4.shortText: Abundance grants Move Speed
Level4.fullText: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Heat Exhaustion
Level4.shortText: Increase Flame Buffet Slow
Level4.fullText: Increase Flame Buffet's Slow from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and cause it to no longer decay.

Level4.name: Exuberance
Level4.shortText: High Health grants Move Speed
Level4.fullText: While above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed.

Level7.name: Lifeblossom
Level7.shortText: Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at high Health
Level7.fullText: While Alexstrasza is above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of Alexstrasza's current Health.

Level7.name: Verdant Flourish
Level7.shortText: Regen Globe and Abundance healing increased
Level7.fullText: Alexstrasza receives <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more healing from Abundance and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more healing from Regeneration Globes.

Level7.name: Fire Within

Level7.fullText: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of her maximum Health.

Level16.fullText: Gift of Life grants its target <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> while Alexstrasza is above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health.

Level16.fullText: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of the amount healed.

Amazon.name: Cassia
Amazon.title: Amazon Warmatron
Amazon.searchText: Casia Amazon Javazon D2 Diablo 2 II Diablo2 Human Stun Blind Burst Marksman
Amazon.description: An Assassin who specializes against Physical Attackers.
Amazon.infoText: After shattering the Worldstone, the young Amazon Cassia had changed. She had seen hatred, terror, and destruction firsthand. If the Askari were to survive the coming darkness, they needed an army. She would begin their training immediately.

Basic.name: Lightning Fury
Basic.shortText: Hurl a lightning javelin that splits upon impact
Basic.fullText: Hurl a lightning javelin that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">158</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit and splits into two lightning bolts that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">158</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in their path.

Basic.name: Blinding Light
Basic.shortText: Blind enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Blind enemies in the target area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Cassia deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> increased damage to Blinded targets.

Basic.name: Fend
Basic.shortText: Charge at a target and rapidly attack nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Charge at an enemy, and upon arriving Channel for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">64</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in front of Cassia every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> reduced damage to non-Heroes. Avoidance remains charged while Channeling.

Heroic.name: Ball Lightning
Heroic.shortText: Throw a bouncing lightning ball
Heroic.fullText: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit.

Heroic.name: Valkyrie
Heroic.shortText: Summon a Valkyrie to impale enemies
Heroic.fullText: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.

Trait.name: Avoidance
Trait.shortText: Gain Armor while moving
Trait.fullText: While moving, Cassia gradually gains up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Armor over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. After being stationary for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, the Armor is rapidly lost over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">.5</c> seconds. <n/><n/>Avoidance remains charged while Fending.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Cancel Fend
Basic.fullText: End Fend early.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Inner Light
Activable.shortText: Activate to heal
Activable.fullText: Activate to heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of your maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Avoidance
Trait.shortText: Gain Armor while moving
Trait.fullText: While moving, Cassia gradually gains up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Armor over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. After being stationary for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, the Armor is rapidly lost over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">.5</c> seconds. <n/><n/>Avoidance remains charged while Fending.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Rockstopper
Activable.shortText: Instantly charge and empower Avoidance
Activable.fullText: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.  <n/><n/>Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.

Level1.name: Thunderstroke
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Lightning Fury damage
Level1.fullText: Increase the damage of Lightning Fury by 20.Quest: Lightning Fury's damage is increased by 1.5 every time it hits a Hero.

Level1.name: Impale
Level1.shortText: Increase Fend range and damage
Level1.fullText: Increase Fend's cast range and radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. It deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> damage to enemies below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health.

Level1.name: Charged Strikes
Level1.shortText: Gain Attack Speed, bounce damage
Level1.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Attack Speed. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus damage and bounces to nearby enemy Heroes.

Level4.name: Plate of the Whale
Level4.shortText: Avoidance regenerates Health
Level4.fullText: Regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second while Avoidance is active. If fully charged, gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.

Level4.name: Ring of the Leech
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks heal
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks against your primary target heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of their damage. If an enemy is Blinded, this also affects Lightning Fury and Fend.

Level4.name: Inner Light
Level4.shortText: Activate to heal
Level4.fullText: Activate to heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of your maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Grounding Rod
Level7.shortText: Lightning Fury and Fend Slow enemies
Level7.fullText: Enemies hit by Lightning Fury or Fend are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Seraph's Hymn
Level7.shortText: Empower Basic Attacks, Blinding Light
Level7.fullText: Basic Attacks against your primary enemy Hero grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Mana and reduce the cooldown of Blinding Light by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the passive damage bonus of Blinding Light from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level7.name: Surge of Light
Level7.shortText: Activate Avoidance to deal damage
Level7.fullText: After taking <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">650</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage with Avoidance active, Cassia can activate Avoidance to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies around her.

Level10.name: Ball Lightning
Level10.shortText: Throw a bouncing lightning ball
Level10.fullText: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit.

Level10.name: Valkyrie
Level10.shortText: Summon a Valkyrie to impale enemies
Level10.fullText: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.

Level13.name: War Matron
Level13.fullText: Cassia becomes Protected while Channeling Fend and for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second if the Channel is completed.

Level13.name: War Traveler
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> Movement Speed. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed and Mounting is instant.

Level13.name: Gloves Of Alacrity
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Basic Attack range. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Basic Attack range.

Level16.name: Power Strike
Level16.shortText: Lightning Fury pierces and casts Blinding Light
Level16.fullText: Lightning Fury pierces but only splits on Heroes. Enemy Heroes hit reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and become marked for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. Upon reaching <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> marks, remove them and cast a Blinding Light at their feet.

Level16.name: Static Electricity
Level16.shortText: Fend releases Lightning Fury bolts
Level16.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges of Lightning Fury. Fend's impact launches a lightning bolt towards each nearby enemy Hero.

Level16.name: Martial Law
Level16.shortText: Disabled Heroes take additional damage
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> of their maximum Health. Increase this to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> if they are Stunned, Rooted, Slowed, or Blinded.

Level20.name: Infinite Lightning
Level20.shortText: Ball Lightning bounces indefinitely
Level20.fullText: Ball Lightning can now bounce indefinitely. Every bounce reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Imprisoning Light
Level20.shortText: Valkyrie Roots and Silences enemies
Level20.fullText: Upon impaling an enemy Hero, they are Blinded for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and Cassia's Valkyrie creates a wave of light that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. This wave Silences and Roots them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Titan's Revenge
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks ignore Armor
Level20.fullText: Cassia's Basic Attacks now ignore Armor and while Avoidance is fully charged, they deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus damage.

Level20.name: Rockstopper
Level20.shortText: Instantly charge and empower Avoidance
Level20.fullText: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.  <n/><n/>Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.

Ana.name: Ana
Ana.title: Veteran Sniper
Ana.searchText: Anna Human EyeOfHorus OW Amari Sleep Healer
Ana.description: A burst Healer who uses precise skillshots to heal allies and can deny enemy healing.
Ana.infoText: As a founding member of Overwatch and one of the world's best snipers, Ana Amari uses her skills to protect the innocent. Though she went MIA after losing her eye, Ana's sense of duty and responsibility has brought her back to the fight.

Basic.name: Healing Dart
Basic.shortText: Shoot a dart that heals an Ally
Basic.fullText: Fire a dart which heals the first allied Hero hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">195</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Does not affect full Health Heroes.

Basic.name: Biotic Grenade
Basic.shortText: Toss a grenade that heals allies, prevents enemy healing
Basic.fullText: Toss a grenade at the target area. Allied Heroes hit are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">152</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health and receive <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> increased healing from Ana for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemies hit take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and receive <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> less healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If Biotic Grenade does not hit any enemies, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, and if Ana is the only target hit, reduce its cooldown by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Sleep Dart
Basic.shortText: Fire a dart that puts enemies to Sleep
Basic.fullText: Fire a dart that puts the first enemy Hero hit to Sleep, Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Sleep's effects end instantly if the target takes damage after the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Vehicles.</c>

Heroic.name: Nano Boost
Heroic.shortText: Grant ally Spell Power, reduced cooldowns
Heroic.fullText: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c> Mana. For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, they gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Ana.</c>

Heroic.name: Eye of Horus
Heroic.shortText: Fire unlimited range healing and damaging rounds
Heroic.fullText: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and enemies are damaged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.

Trait.name: Shrike
Trait.shortText: Basic Attacks deal damage over time
Trait.fullText: Basic Attacks apply a Dose to enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, plus additional damage equal to the current number of stacks on the target, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Ana is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> of the damage dealt by Shrike.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Aim Down Sights</s><n/><n/>Activating Shrike reduces your Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>, but increases the Range of Healing Dart and Sleep Dart by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> while also allowing them to pierce one Hero. Lasts until canceled.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: High Powered Round
Basic.fullText: Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and enemies are damaged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage to Structures.

Basic.name: Cancel Eye of Horus
Basic.fullText: Cancels Eye of Horus.

Basic.name: Cancel Eye of Horus
Basic.fullText: Cancels Eye of Horus.

Heroic.name: High Powered Round
Heroic.fullText: Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and enemies are damaged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage to Structures.

Heroic.name: High Powered Round
Heroic.fullText: Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and enemies are damaged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage to Structures.

Trait.name: Cancel Shrike
Trait.fullText: Basic Attacks apply a Dose to enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, plus additional damage equal to the current number of stacks on the target, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Ana is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> of the damage dealt by Shrike.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Aim Down Sights</s><n/><n/>Activating Shrike reduces your Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>, but increases the Range of Healing Dart and Sleep Dart by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> while also allowing them to pierce one Hero. Lasts until canceled.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Debilitating Dart
Activable.shortText: Fire a dart that reduces damage and Slows
Activable.fullText: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Active Reload
Activable.shortText: Gain extra Healing Dart charges
Activable.fullText: Activate to instantly gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges of Healing Dart.

Level1.name: Contact Healing
Level1.shortText: Increase Biotic Grenade on multiple Heroes
Level1.fullText: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> per Hero hit.

Level1.name: Slumber Shells
Level1.shortText: Lower Sleep Dart cooldown, Slows
Level1.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Vampiric Rounds
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Shrike Healing
Level1.fullText: Increase Shrike's healing by 15%.Repeatable Quest: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 1%.Repeatable Quest: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 0.25%.

Level4.name: Biotic Enhancements
Level4.shortText: Empower Biotic Grenade
Level4.fullText: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Overdose
Level4.shortText: Sleep Dart applies Doses, pierces
Level4.fullText: Sleep Dart applies <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.

Level4.name: Debilitating Dart
Level4.shortText: Fire a dart that reduces damage and Slows
Level4.fullText: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Anti-Healer
Level7.shortText: Empower Biotic Grenade
Level7.fullText: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and the duration of the healing reduction by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Night Terrors
Level7.shortText: Empowers Sleep Dart
Level7.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of their Maximum Health in damage.

Level7.name: Mind-Numbing Agent
Level7.shortText: Doses decrease Spell Power
Level7.fullText: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>.

Level10.name: Nano Boost
Level10.shortText: Grant ally Spell Power, reduced cooldowns
Level10.fullText: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c> Mana. For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, they gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Cannot be used on Ana.</c>

Level10.name: Eye of Horus
Level10.shortText: Fire unlimited range healing and damaging rounds
Level10.fullText: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and enemies are damaged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.

Level13.name: Speed Serum
Level13.fullText: Healing Dart grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Movement Speed to affected Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Purifying Darts
Level13.fullText: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more when doing so.

Level13.name: Smelling Salts
Level13.fullText: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds when doing so.

Level16.name: Sharpshooter
Level16.shortText: Empower consecutive Healing Darts
Level16.fullText: Healing Dart's healing is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> if it heals a Hero, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.

Level16.name: Concentrated Doses
Level16.shortText: Doses empower Healing Dart
Level16.fullText: Increase Healing Dart's healing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12%</c> for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.

Level16.name: Active Reload
Level16.shortText: Gain extra Healing Dart charges
Level16.fullText: Activate to instantly gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges of Healing Dart.

Level20.name: Nano Infusion
Level20.shortText: Nano Boost heals for damage dealt
Level20.fullText: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of Spell Damage dealt.

Level20.name: Deadeye
Level20.shortText: Eye of Horus rounds recharge over time
Level20.fullText: Eye of Horus cooldown reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, but it only regains new rounds every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds.<n/><n/>For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increases its damage and healing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c>. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Armored Stance
Level20.shortText: Empower Shrike
Level20.fullText: Increase Shrike's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor.

Level20.name: Dynamic Optics
Level20.shortText: Empower Basic Attacks
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c>.

Anduin.name: Anduin
Anduin.title: King of Stormwind
Anduin.searchText: Human Wrynn Priest Stormwind Alliance WoW World of Warcraft Burning Crusade BC Wrath Lich King WotLK Cataclysm Mists of Pandaria MoP Warlords Draenor WoD Legion Hearthstone HS BFA Battle for Azeroth Root Stun Sustain Healer
Anduin.description: A ranged Healer with the ability to pluck an ally from danger.
Anduin.infoText: As a young man, Anduin sought peace as a priest of the Holy Light and an envoy of the Alliance. After his father, Varian, fell to the Burning Legion, Anduin took up the crown as High King of the Alliance. He soon learned that peace must be fought for, even in the Nexus.

Basic.name: Flash Heal
Basic.shortText: Cast a heal on an Ally
Basic.fullText: Cast for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds to heal an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">280</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Basic.name: Divine Star
Basic.shortText: Send a heavenly bolt that damages and heals
Basic.fullText: Send light that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and then returns to Anduin, healing allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> in a wider path. Healing increases by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> per enemy Hero hit.

Basic.name: Chastise
Basic.shortText: Shove light forward that Roots
Basic.fullText: Shove a swell of light forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Rooting them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Holy Word: Salvation
Heroic.shortText: Protect and heal allies near Anduin
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of their max Health and are Protected.

Heroic.name: Lightbomb
Heroic.shortText: Stun enemies around an ally
Heroic.fullText: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, it explodes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.<n/><n/>The target gains a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Leap of Faith
Trait.shortText: Pull an allied Hero to your location
Trait.fullText: Faith instantly pulls an allied Hero to Anduin's location, granting them Unstoppable while they travel.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Pursued By Grace</s><n/><n/>Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal the lowest Health allied Hero near Anduin for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">32</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Cancel Holy Word: Salvation
Heroic.shortText: Cancel Holy Word: Salvation
Heroic.fullText: Cancel Holy Word: Salvation.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Lightwell
Activable.shortText: Activate to summon a healing Lightwell
Activable.fullText: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. The well only fades after healing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> times or when recast.<n/><n/>This cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.

Activable.name: Desperate Prayer
Activable.shortText: Activate to desperately heal an allied Hero
Activable.fullText: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">375</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, but kneel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, unable to act.

Activable.name: Blessed Recovery
Activable.shortText: Recover Health after taking high damage
Activable.fullText: If Anduin loses more than <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of his maximum Health at once, recover <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> second cooldown.<n/><n/>Current Health required: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">133</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>

Activable.name: Inner Focus
Activable.shortText: Activate to reset Flash Heal cooldown
Activable.fullText: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more.<n/><n/>Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level1.name: Evenhanded Blessings
Level1.shortText: Refund Flash Heal cooldown on new targets
Level1.fullText: If Flash Heal is cast on a different target from its last, increase its healing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> and refund <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> of its cooldown.

Level1.name: Power Word: Shield
Level1.shortText: Divine Star grants Shields
Level1.fullText: While Divine Star is traveling out, allies in its path gain a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If Divine Star hits an enemy Hero, Anduin gains a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">185</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Lightwell
