Level1.fullText: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. The well only fades after healing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> times or when recast.<n/><n/>This cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.

Level4.name: Moral Compass
Level4.shortText: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at its apex
Level4.fullText: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at Heroes close to its apex.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Attack Range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.1</c>.

Level4.name: Surge of Light
Level4.shortText: Chastise empowers Basic Attacks
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Chastise by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes Rooted by Chastise launch an additional Basic Attack and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Mana.

Level4.name: Piercing Light
Level4.shortText: Chastise pierces.<n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit two Heroes to increase Spell Power.
Level4.fullText: Chastise pierces to hit an additional Hero.Quest: Hitting two Heroes with a single Chastise permanently increases Spell Power by 1, to a maximum of 10.

Level7.name: Binding Heal
Level7.shortText: Flash Heal also heals Anduin
Level7.fullText: Casting Flash Heal on an ally heals Anduin for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Level7.name: Blessed Recovery
Level7.shortText: Recover Health after taking high damage
Level7.fullText: If Anduin loses more than <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of his maximum Health at once, recover <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> second cooldown.<n/><n/>Current Health required: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">133</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>

Level7.name: Desperate Prayer
Level7.shortText: Activate to desperately heal an allied Hero
Level7.fullText: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">375</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, but kneel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, unable to act.

Level10.name: Holy Word: Salvation
Level10.shortText: Protect and heal allies near Anduin
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of their max Health and are Protected.

Level10.name: Lightbomb
Level10.shortText: Stun enemies around an ally
Level10.fullText: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, it explodes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.<n/><n/>The target gains a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Speed of the Pious
Level13.shortText: Divine Star grants Move Speed, reduce cooldown
Level13.fullText: While Divine Star is traveling, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Movement Speed. Each allied Hero healed by Divine Star on its return to Anduin reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Push Forward!
Level13.shortText: Damage Heroes for Move Speed, increased healing
Level13.fullText: Damaging an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> and the amount healed by Pursued By Grace by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. These effects stack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> times.

Level13.name: Enchant Boots - Lion's Speed
Level13.shortText: Leap of Faith grants Move Speed, heals
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> Movement Speed. This bonus is quadrupled while Leap of Faith's cooldown is available. Allies pulled by Leap of Faith are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">280</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Renew
Level16.shortText: Flash Heal heals over time
Level16.fullText: Flash Heal heals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. The duration of this heal is refreshed each time Anduin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack.

Level16.name: Holy Nova
Level16.shortText: Divine Star explodes when caught
Level16.fullText: After Anduin catches Divine Star, it explodes, healing nearby allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">105</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and damaging enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Level16.name: Glyph of Faith
Level16.shortText: Leap of Faith gains a charge
Level16.fullText: Leap of Faith gains a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge.

Level16.name: Inner Focus
Level16.shortText: Activate to reset Flash Heal cooldown
Level16.fullText: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more.<n/><n/>Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Light of Stormwind
Level20.shortText: Holy Word: Salvation grants allies Invulnerability
Level20.fullText: Holy Word: Salvation grants allied Heroes Invulnerability instead of Protected. This does not affect Anduin. <n/><n/>Channeling Holy Word: Salvation for its full duration reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Inner Fire
Level20.shortText: Lightbomb increases Move Speed, grants Armor
Level20.fullText: The target of Light Bomb gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Move Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Censure

Level20.fullText: Chastise Stuns for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and its Root duration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Varian's Legacy
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks burn enemies
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks burn enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">87</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and Anduin heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage dealt.

Anubarak.name: Anub'arak
Anubarak.title: Traitor King
Anubarak.searchText: Anub'arak Anubarak Noob Nub Undead Crypt Lord World of WoW Warcraft III 3 War3 WC3 Warcraft3 Frozen Throne FT WotLK Wrath of the Lich King Bug Beatle Stun CC Initiation Mobile Mobility Dive Escape
Anubarak.description: A Tank who specializes against Mages.
Anubarak.infoText: Once a proud nerubian king, Anub'arak dared to stand against the Lich King's invasion, but despite his bravery, he too fell to the unrelenting Scourge. Resurrected into undeath, the Traitor King now serves as a towering weapon of destruction.

Basic.name: Impale
Basic.shortText: Shoot line of spikes that damages and stuns enemies
Basic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Stuns for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Basic.name: Harden Carapace
Basic.shortText: Gain a shield
Basic.fullText: Gain a Shield that grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Spell Armor and absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">340</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Burrow Charge
Basic.shortText: Burrow underground and charge in a direction
Basic.fullText: Burrow to the target location, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">91</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and briefly stunning enemies in a small area upon surfacing, slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Burrow Charge can be reactivated to surface early.

Heroic.name: Locust Swarm
Heroic.shortText: Damages enemies while healing
Heroic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">68</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">24</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Cocoon
Heroic.shortText: Wraps enemy in a cocoon
Heroic.fullText: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.

Trait.name: Scarab Host
Trait.shortText: Spawn a Beetle whenever an Ability is cast
Trait.fullText: Using an Ability spawns a Beetle which loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, attacking nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Mount.name: Summon Mount

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Activable.fullText: <c val="BB0000">Press to toggle Legion of Beetles OFF.</c>

Activable.name: The Traitor King

Activable.fullText: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

Level1.name: Nerubian Armor
Level1.shortText: Increase Harden Carapace's Spell Armor
Level1.fullText: Increase Harden Carapace's Spell Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c>.

Level1.name: Legion of Beetles
Level1.shortText: Spawn Beetles periodically
Level1.fullText: Beetles have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Spell Armor. Automatically spawn a Beetle every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds. Can be toggled on and off.

Level1.name: Regeneration Master
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes increase Health Regen
Level1.fullText: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases your Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 30. Reward: After gathering 25 Regeneration Globes, you also gain 500 Health.

Level4.name: Bed of Barbs
Level4.shortText: Impale slows and damages over time
Level4.fullText: Create a bed of spikes along Impale's path that Slows enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">21</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Spikes persist for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Shed Exoskeleton
Level4.shortText: Harden Carapace increases Move Speed
Level4.fullText: Harden Carapace grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Underking
Level4.shortText: Increases Burrow Charge range and damage
Level4.fullText: Increases Burrow Charge range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level7.name: Chitinous Plating
Level7.shortText: Reduces Harden Carapace cooldown
Level7.fullText: While Harden Carapace is active, taking damage from enemy Abilities reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Subterranean Shield
Level7.shortText: Burrow Charge grants Shield
Level7.fullText: Burrow Charge also grants a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> point Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Leeching Scarabs
Level7.shortText: Beetles heal Anub'arak
Level7.fullText: Beetles gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> bonus attack damage and they heal Anub'arak for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of their damage with each attack if he is nearby.

Level10.name: Locust Swarm
Level10.shortText: Damages enemies while healing
Level10.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">68</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">24</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Cocoon
Level10.shortText: Wraps enemy in a cocoon
Level10.fullText: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.

Level13.name: Urticating Spines
Level13.fullText: Casting Harden Carapace will also deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. Deals double damage against Heroes.

Level13.name: Burning Beetles
Level13.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">21</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Beetles deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies.

Level13.name: Acid-Drenched Mandibles
Level13.fullText: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Epicenter
Level16.shortText: Increases Burrow Charge area and reduces cooldown
Level16.fullText: Increases Burrow Charge impact area by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> and lowers the cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second for each Hero hit.

Level16.name: Debilitation
Level16.shortText: Burrow Charge, Impale reduce enemy Spell Power
Level16.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Burrow Charge or Impale have their Spell Power reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Beetle, Juiced
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks spawn Beetles
Level16.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Beetles gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased health.<n/><n/>Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4th</c> Basic Attack spawns a Beetle.

Level20.name: Hive Master
Level20.shortText: Gain a permanent life-stealing Locust
Level20.fullText: Gain a permanent Vampire Locust that attacks a nearby enemy every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. The Vampire Locust deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and returns to heal Anub'arak for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> health.

Level20.name: Cryptweave
Level20.shortText: Increases Cocoon duration, damage on exit
Level20.fullText: Staying near the Cocoon allows Anub'arak to extend the duration by up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds per Cocoon. Upon exiting the Cocoon, enemies take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. This damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> for each second that they were inside.

Level20.name: The Traitor King
Level20.shortText: Gain Health and Armor
Level20.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> bonus maximum Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Spell Armor.<n/><n/>Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Rewind
Level20.shortText: Activate to reset cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

Artanis.name: Artanis
Artanis.title: Hierarch of the Daelaam
Artanis.searchText: Artanis Protoss Aiur LotV Legacy of the Void StarCraft II 2 SC2 Brood War BW SC 1 SC1 Star2 Starcraft2 Displace Blind Zealot Offlaner Shields
Artanis.description: A tough Bruiser that deals high damage if the enemy team is unable to shut him down.
Artanis.infoText: Despite his relative youth, Artanis was named Hierarch of the Daelaam after the fall of Aiur. Driven by the promise of a brighter future, he hopes to reclaim the protoss' fallen home world and rebuild their once glorious civilization.<n/><n/>Artanis is FREE to purchasers of StarCraft® II: Legacy of the Void™

Basic.name: Blade Dash
Basic.shortText: Dash forward then back again, damaging enemies along the way
Basic.fullText: Dash forward and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">63</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies, then return and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">171</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Every enemy hit reduces the cooldown on Shield Overload by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, and Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Twin Blades
Basic.shortText: Charge and Basic Attack twice
Basic.fullText: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.

Basic.name: Phase Prism
Basic.shortText: Swap positions with an enemy Hero
Basic.fullText: Fire a Phase Prism that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first Hero hit and swaps Artanis's position with theirs. Hitting a Hero also grants Artanis Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5 </c>seconds. Can be used during Blade Dash.

Heroic.name: Purifier Beam
Heroic.shortText: Chase an enemy with an orbital beam
Heroic.fullText: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">184</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.

Heroic.name: Suppression Pulse
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Blind enemies in a large area
Heroic.fullText: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">114</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Blinding enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Unlimited range.

Trait.name: Shield Overload
Trait.shortText: Gain a Shield when attacked at low Health
Trait.fullText: After taking damage while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Health, Artanis gains a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">365</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Shield Overload by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Twin Blades (Primed)
Basic.fullText: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Level1.name: Reactive Parry
Level1.shortText: Twin Blades, Blade Dash gives Physical Armor
Level1.fullText: Damaging enemy Heroes with Twin Blades or Blade Dash grants Artanis <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level1.name: Amateur Opponent
Level1.shortText: Increases Twin Blades damage to non-Heroes
Level1.fullText: Twin Blades attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> bonus damage to non-Heroes.

Level1.name: Protector Of Aiur
Level1.shortText: Quest: Attacks against Heroes increase damage
Level1.fullText: Quest: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Artanis's Attack damage by 0.1%. Takedowns grant 1% bonus damage.

Level4.name: Psionic Synergy
Level4.shortText: Phase Prism grants Armor
Level4.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Shield Battery
Level4.shortText: Shield Overload recharges faster while active
Level4.fullText: Shield Overload's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> faster while its Shield is active. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Shield Overload's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Shield Surge
Level4.shortText: Increase Shield Overload shield at low Health
Level4.fullText: Increases Shield Overload's Shields by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health.

Level7.name: Solarite Reaper
Level7.shortText: Increases Blade Dash damage
Level7.fullText: Increases the damage of the first dash of Blade Dash by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175%</c>.

Level7.name: Chrono Surge
Level7.shortText: Phase Prism grants Attack Speed, Slows
Level7.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> bonus Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and Slows the enemy's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Final Cut
Level7.shortText: Abilities increase Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> additional damage. While under <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health, this damage bonus is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level10.name: Suppression Pulse
Level10.shortText: Damage and Blind enemies in a large area
Level10.fullText: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">114</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Blinding enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Unlimited range.

Level10.name: Purifier Beam
Level10.shortText: Chase an enemy with an orbital beam
Level10.fullText: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">184</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.

Level13.name: Templar's Zeal
Level13.shortText: Reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash
Level13.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Blade Dash from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c>. Each time that Shield Overload activates, reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Triple Strike
Level13.fullText: Increases Twin Blades's number of Basic Attacks to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c>, but increase its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Graviton Vortex
Level13.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Phase Prism from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c>. Hitting an enemy Hero with Basic Attacks or Blade Dash reduces the cooldown of Phase Prism by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Phase Bulwark
Level13.fullText: Shield Overload grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Spell Armor while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after it expires.

Level16.name: Titan Killer
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks deal percent damage
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to<c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> 0.5%</c> of the target's maximum Health in damage, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> when empowered by Twin Blades.

Level16.name: Force of Will
Level16.shortText: Abilities reduce Shield Overload cooldown
Level16.fullText: Casting Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Blades of a Templar
Level16.shortText: Gain Attack Speed, Slow enemies
Level16.fullText: Increase Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. Basic Attacks Slow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Orbital Bombardment
Level20.shortText: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge
Level20.fullText: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge.  There is a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> second cooldown between uses.

Level20.name: Target Purified
Level20.shortText: Purifier Beam is faster, recasts if target dies
Level20.fullText: Increase the speed of Purifier Beam by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>. If the target of Purifier Beam dies, it automatically recasts on the nearest visible enemy Hero.

Level20.name: Zealot Charge
Level20.shortText: Increase Twin Blades charge distance
Level20.fullText: Increase Twin Blades' charge distance by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level20.name: Plasma Burn
Level20.shortText: Shield Overload burns nearby enemies
Level20.fullText: While Shield Overload is active, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies.

Arthas.name: Arthas
Arthas.title: The Lich King
Arthas.searchText: Arthas Lich King Artas LK Prince Menethil Death Knight Undead WoW World of Warcraft III 3 War3 WC3 Warcraft3 Reign of Chaos RoC Frozen Throne FT WotLK Wrath of the Lich King Hearthstone HS Ice Frost Slow Root Sustain
Arthas.description: A Tank who is proficient against melee Physical Attackers, slowing them.
Arthas.infoText: Once the crown prince of Lordaeron, and protégé of Uther the Lightbringer, Arthas was corrupted by the cursed blade Frostmourne in a bid to save his people. Now he rules over the damned as the Lich King and all shall know his wrath.

Basic.name: Death Coil
Basic.shortText: Deals damage to a target or heal Arthas
Basic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">164</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to target enemy.<n/><n/>Can be self-cast to heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">262</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Basic.name: Howling Blast
Basic.shortText: Root and damage enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Root enemies within the target area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">68</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Basic.name: Frozen Tempest
Basic.shortText: Damage and slow nearby enemies. Drains Mana while active
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">36</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies and Slow them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per second, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per second, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. Frozen Tempest's effects last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Army of the Dead
Heroic.shortText: Raise ghouls that fight enemies, heal Arthas
Heroic.fullText: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds and attack for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> charges.<n/><n/>Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Summon Sindragosa
Heroic.shortText: Disables enemies and Structures
Heroic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slows enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Frostmourne Hungers
Trait.shortText: Activate to empower the next attack and restore Mana on hit
Trait.fullText: Activate to make Arthas's next Basic Attack strike immediately and deal 71 (+4% per level) bonus damage. Dealing damage restores 40 Mana.Quest: Killing a Minion or hitting a Hero with Frostmourne Hungers permanently increases its bonus damage and Arthas's Basic Attack damage by 1.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Cancel Frozen Tempest
Basic.fullText: Cancels the Frozen Tempest ability.

Heroic.name: Sacrifice
Heroic.shortText: Sacrifice a Ghoul to heal
Heroic.fullText: Sacrifice a Ghoul to restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Trait.name: Frostmourne Hungers Primed
Trait.fullText: The next Basic Attack deals 71 (+4% per level) bonus damage. Dealing damage restores 40 Mana.Quest: Killing a Minion or hitting a Hero with Frostmourne Hungers permanently increases its bonus damage and Arthas' Basic Attack damage by 1.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Icebound Fortitude
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain Armor, reduce disabling effects
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Anti-Magic Shell
Activable.shortText: Activate to become immune to Spell Damage
Activable.fullText: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and heal Arthas for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of the damage prevented.

Activable.name: Path of Frost
Activable.shortText: Gain empowered Mount, Slow nearby enemies
Activable.fullText: Activate to instantly mount with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level1.name: Frost Presence
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Root Heroes to empower Howling Blast, Death Coil
Level1.fullText: Increase the area of Howling Blast by 20%.Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Howling Blast.Reward: After Hitting 15 Heroes, Howling Blast's range is increased by 20% and it hits enemies in its path.Reward: After Hitting 30 Heroes, Death Coil Slows Heroes hit by 50% for 0.75 seconds.

Level1.name: Borean Winds
Level1.shortText: Frozen Tempest increases Movement Speed
Level1.fullText: After Frozen Tempest has been active for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Arthas gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Frozen Tempest's Slowing effects last an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds and its Mana cost is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> per second.

Level1.name: Rime
Level1.shortText: Periodically gain Physical Armor, Health
Level1.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>. Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Arthas heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">24</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second while Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.

Level4.name: Shattered Armor
Level4.shortText: Howling Blast reduces Armor
Level4.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Howling Blast have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Icy Talons
Level4.shortText: Frozen Tempest increases Attack Speed
Level4.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds every time a Hero is damaged by Frozen Tempest, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level4.name: Frost Strike
Level4.shortText: Frostmourne Hungers damages area, Slows
Level4.fullText: Frostmourne Hungers deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">115</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Spell Damage in an area and Slows enemy Heroes hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Immortal Coil
Level7.shortText: Death Coil always heals
Level7.fullText: Gain the healing effect of Death Coil even when used on enemies. If Death Coil is used on Arthas, it heals for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> bonus healing and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Rune Tap
Level7.shortText: Consecutive Basic Attacks heal, increased Health
Level7.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack heals Arthas for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> of his max Health.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Each stack of Frostmourne Hungers increases Arthas's maximum Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c>.

Level7.name: Icebound Fortitude
Level7.shortText: Activate to gain Armor, reduce disabling effects
Level7.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Army of the Dead
Level10.shortText: Raise ghouls that fight enemies, heal Arthas
Level10.fullText: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds and attack for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> charges.<n/><n/>Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Summon Sindragosa
Level10.shortText: Disables enemies and Structures
Level10.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slows enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Deathlord
Level13.shortText: Death Coil hits an additional Hero, increased damage
Level13.fullText: If Death Coil is used on an enemy Hero, launch an additional Death Coil at a nearby enemy Hero.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Death Coil deals more damage the lower Arthas's current Health is, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> bonus damage.

Level13.name: Deathchill
Level13.shortText: Increase Howling Blast damage, more against low health Heroes
Level13.fullText: Howling Blast's damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> for each stack of Frostmourne Hungers. <n/><n/>Howling Blast deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> additional damage and Roots for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds against Heroes under <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health.

Level13.name: Biting Cold
Level13.fullText: Each second an enemy is damaged by Frozen Tempest, it deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> bonus damage, up to a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> bonus.

Level16.name: Remorseless Winter
Level16.shortText: Frozen Tempest can Root enemy Heroes, heal Arthas
Level16.fullText: Enemy Heroes that remain within Frozen Tempest for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds are Rooted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds and heal Arthas for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of his maximum Health. This effect has an <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> second cooldown per target.

Level16.name: Frostmourne Feeds
Level16.shortText: Reduce Frostmourne Hungers cooldown, heals Arthas
Level16.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Frostmourne Hungers by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. Arthas heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the Basic Attack damage dealt by Frostmourne Hungers.

Level16.name: Anti-Magic Shell
Level16.shortText: Activate to become immune to Spell Damage
Level16.fullText: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and heal Arthas for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of the damage prevented.

Level20.name: Legion of Northrend
Level20.shortText: Reduce Army of the Dead charge cooldown, spawn more Ghouls
Level20.fullText: Reduce Army of the Dead's charge cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each charge consumed spawns an additional Ghoul to attack nearby enemies. These Ghouls cannot be sacrificed.

Level20.name: Absolute Zero
Level20.shortText: Increases Sindragosa range and disable duration
Level20.fullText: Sindragosa flies twice as far. Enemy Heroes are Rooted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, and then Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Death Pact
Level20.shortText: Double stacks of Frostmourne Hungers
Level20.fullText: Instantly double your stacks of Frostmourne Hungers, but it no longer gains stacks from hitting Heroes or killing Minions.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Takedowns grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> stacks of Frostmourne Hungers.

Level20.name: Path of Frost
Level20.shortText: Gain empowered Mount, Slow nearby enemies
Level20.fullText: Activate to instantly mount with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Auriel.name: Auriel
Auriel.title: Archangel of Hope
Auriel.searchText: Ariel Angel Archangel Diablo 3 III D3 Diablo3 Stun Displace Healer
Auriel.description: A Healer that excels when paired with a high-octane damage dealer.
Auriel.infoText: It is through the archangel Auriel that the power of hope flows into the fabric of creation. Her eternal light illuminates even the darkest souls. Seeking harmony in all things, she is a mediator, a counselor, and when the need arises, a fearless warrior.

Basic.name: Sacred Sweep
Basic.shortText: Damages enemies in an a wide arc, bonus damage to enemies in the center
Basic.fullText: Sweep the area with sacred power, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies caught in the center.

Basic.name: Ray of Heaven
Basic.shortText: Spend all energy to heal allied Heroes in an area
Basic.fullText: Consume Auriel's stored energy and heal allied Heroes in the area for the amount of energy consumed.

Basic.name: Detainment Strike
Basic.shortText: Knock an enemy Hero back, stunning them if they collide with terrain
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">55</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy Hero hit and knock them back. If they collide with terrain, they are also stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds and take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Heroic.name: Resurrect
Heroic.shortText: Bring an allied Hero back to life
Heroic.fullText: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second delay, they are brought back to life with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of their maximum Health at the location where they died.<n/><n/>Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.

Heroic.name: Crystal Aegis
Heroic.shortText: Put an allied Hero into a Stasis crystal that explodes
Heroic.fullText: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">255</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies.

Trait.name: Bestow Hope
Trait.shortText: Bestowed ally's damage grants energy
Trait.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of the damage Auriel deals to Heroes and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> dealt to non-Heroes is stored as energy.<n/><n/>Bestow an allied Hero with Hope. While they remain near Auriel, <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of their damage to Heroes and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of their damage to non-Heroes is converted to energy. Auriel can only have Bestow Hope on <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> ally at a time.<n/><n/>Auriel can store up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">475</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> energy.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Heroic.name: Resurrect
Heroic.shortText: Bring an allied Hero back to life
Heroic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second delay, you are brought back to life with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of maximum Health at the location where you died.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Angelic Flight
Activable.shortText: Activate to fly to a location
Activable.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, fly to a target location.

Activable.name: Shield of Hope
Activable.shortText: Shield nearby allies based on their missing Health
Activable.fullText: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the amount of Health they are missing.

Level1.name: Increasing Clarity
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increases center damage by hitting Heroes
Level1.fullText: Quest: Every time Sacred Sweep hits a Hero in the center, increase the center damage by 2, up to 50. Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, this center damage bonus is increased to 180.

Level1.name: Righteous Assault
Level1.shortText: Reduce Sacred Sweep cooldown by hitting Heroes
Level1.fullText: Reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sweep by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds for each enemy Hero hit by its center.

Level1.name: Searing Light
Level1.shortText: Ray of Heaven also damages Heroes in the area
Level1.fullText: Ray of Heaven also deals damage to enemy Heroes in the area equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of the energy consumed.

Level4.name: Majestic Span
Level4.shortText: Increases Sacred Sweep radius
Level4.fullText: Increases the radius of Sacred Sweep by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level4.name: Heavy Burden
Level4.shortText: Detainment Strike Slows
Level4.fullText: Detainment Strike Slows enemy Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. Slow amount and duration doubled on enemies it Stuns.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Increase Detainment Strikes' Stun duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Repeated Offense
Level4.shortText: Increases Detainment Strike range<n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increases damage when Heroes are stunned
Level4.fullText: Enemies hit by Detainment Strike are knocked back 30% farther.Quest: Every time Detainment Strike stuns a Hero, increase the stun damage by 10, up to 60.Reward: After stunning 6 Heroes, increase this damage bonus to 250.

Level7.name: Glimmer of Hope
Level7.shortText: Regen Globes reduce Ray of Heaven energy cost
Level7.fullText: Collecting a Regeneration Globe reduces the cost of Auriel's next Ray of Heaven by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level7.name: Empathic Link
Level7.shortText: Allied damage taken grants energy
Level7.fullText: Auriel stores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of damage taken by allies with Bestow Hope.

Level7.name: Energized Cord
Level7.shortText: Increases energy from Auriel Basic Attacks
Level7.fullText: Increases the energy stored from Auriel's Basic Attacks to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130%</c> of the damage against Heroes and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of the damage against non-Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Does not affect Auriel's Bestow Hope ally.</c><n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Basic Attack Range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.1</c>.

Level10.name: Resurrect
Level10.shortText: Bring an allied Hero back to life
Level10.fullText: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second delay, they are brought back to life with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of their maximum Health at the location where they died.<n/><n/>Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.

Level10.name: Crystal Aegis
Level10.shortText: Put an allied Hero into a Stasis crystal that explodes
Level10.fullText: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">255</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies.

Level13.name: Blinding Flash
Level13.shortText: Sacred Sweep blinds enemies in the center
Level13.fullText: Enemies hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep are blinded for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Converging Force
Level13.shortText: Sacred Sweep pushes enemies towards the center
Level13.fullText: Enemies hit by the outer area are pushed slightly toward the center.

Level13.name: Piercing Lash
Level13.shortText: Detainment Strike hits all enemy Heroes in a line
Level13.fullText: Detainment Strike now pierces and hits all enemy Heroes in a line, reducing the cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds for each Hero hit.

Level16.name: Reservoir of Hope
Level16.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increases maximum Ray of Heaven energy
Level16.fullText: Quest: Each maximum energy Ray of Heaven Auriel casts increases the maximum amount of energy that can be stored by 55.

Level16.name: Will of Heaven
Level16.shortText: Bestow Hope ally gains Attack Speed
Level16.fullText: Allies with Bestow Hope gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Attack Speed.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Auriel gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> increased Basic Attack Damage.

Level16.name: Wrath of Heaven
Level16.shortText: Bestow Hope ally gains Spell Power
Level16.fullText: Allies with Bestow Hope gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Spell Power.<n/><n/>Enemy Heroes hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep or the terrain collision of Detainment Strike have their Spell Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Light Speed
Level20.shortText: Resurrected allies gain Move Speed, reduce cooldown
Level20.fullText: Resurrected allies gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> increased Movement Speed, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. While a resurrected ally remains alive, Resurrect's next cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.

Level20.name: Diamond Resolve
Level20.shortText: Crystal Aegis grants Armor
Level20.fullText: When Crystal Aegis expires, it grants the target <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level20.name: Angelic Flight
Level20.shortText: Activate to fly to a location
Level20.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, fly to a target location.

Level20.name: Shield of Hope
Level20.shortText: Shield nearby allies based on their missing Health
Level20.fullText: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the amount of Health they are missing.

Azmodan.name: Azmodan
Azmodan.title: Lord of Sin
Azmodan.searchText: Azmodan Demon Lord Sin D3 Diablo3 Diablo 3 III dunk Mage Push Siege Summoner
Azmodan.description: A Summoner that can also deal high damage from far away.
Azmodan.infoText: The Lord of Sin rules over a densely populated land of Hell where both the greatest joys and despair, and the deepest depravities can be experienced. But it is never enough for Azmodan, who has set his eyes on the realm of Sanctuary.

Basic.name: Globe of Annihilation
Basic.shortText: Launch a long range orb of destruction dealing area damage
Basic.fullText: Shoot a globe of destruction, dealing 176 (+4% per level) damage on impact. Deals 50% damage to non-Heroes.Quest: Hitting a Hero or killing a Minion within 3 seconds of being hit by Globe Of Annihilation grants 2 stacks of Annihilation. Each stack increases its damage by 1. Mythic Reward: After gaining 450 Annihilation, the area of Globe of Annihilation is increased by 15% and it deals 150 additional damage.

Basic.name: Summon Demon Warrior
Basic.shortText: Summon a Demon Warrior
Basic.fullText: Spawn a Demon Warrior that marches forward. Warriors deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">53</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per Attack. Loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">17</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> bonus damage to Minions and Mercenaries.<n/><n/>Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.

Basic.name: All Shall Burn
Basic.shortText: Channel a beam of death on an enemy
Basic.fullText: Channel a beam of death on an enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. If the Channel lasts its full duration, deal an extra <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">340</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target.<n/><n/>Azmodan's Movement Speed is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> while Channeling.

Heroic.name: Demonic Invasion
Heroic.shortText: Damage area and create an army of Grunts
Heroic.fullText: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per impact. Grunts deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">39</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">750</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health and last up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes.<n/><n/>Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.

Heroic.name: Tide of Sin

Trait.name: Demon Lieutenant
Trait.shortText: Azmodan summons a Demon Lieutenant to assist Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons
Trait.fullText: Summon a Demon Lieutenant at any allied Mercenary, Minion, or Azmodan Demon. The Lieutenant will cast Demonic Smite every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds, instantly killing an enemy Minion. Loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">21</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: All Shall Burn
Basic.fullText: Cancel channeling All Shall Burn.

Heroic.name: Tide of Sin
Heroic.shortText: Empower Globe of Annihilation
Heroic.fullText: Your next Globe of Annihilation costs no Mana and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Trample
Activable.shortText: Charge a short distance
Activable.fullText: Activate to charge a short distance, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies caught in the path by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> second.<n/><n/>After hitting an enemy Hero with Trample, reduce the cooldown of Azmodan's Heroic Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level1.name: Greed

Globe of Annihilation's damage penalty against Minions and Mercenaries is removed.

Level1.name: Gluttony

Level1.fullText: Increase the number of stacks of Annihilation gained by hitting Heroes with Globe of Annihilation from 2 to 4.Quest: After gaining 225 Annihilation, each enemy hit by Globe of Annihilation reduces its cooldown by 0.25 seconds, doubled against Heroes. Globe of Annihilation's damage penalty against Minions and Mercenaries is removed.

Level1.name: Wrath
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Basic Attacks grant Annihilation
Level1.fullText: Every other Basic Attack against Heroes or Structures grant Annihilation. Quest: After gaining 225 Annihilation, hitting a Hero with Globe of Annihilation increases the damage of Azmodan's next Basic Attack against them within 3 seconds by 85% the amount of Annihilation he has. Globe of Annihilation's damage penalty against Minions and Mercenaries is removed.

Level4.name: Army of Hell
Level4.shortText: Summon additional Demon Warrior
Level4.fullText: Summon Demon Warrior spawns an additional Demon, but its cooldown is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Hellforged Armor
Level4.shortText: Increase Demon Armor and duration
Level4.fullText: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Armor and lose <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> less health per second.

Level4.name: Battleborn
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Demon cooldowns
Level4.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Summon Demon Warrior from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c>. Azmodan's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Summon Demon Warrior by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and Demon Lieutenant by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Art of Chaos
Level7.shortText: Globe grants additional Annihilation
Level7.fullText: If Globe of Annihilation hits <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes, restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Mana and gain an extra <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Annihilation.

Level7.name: Bombardment
Level7.shortText: Globe empowers Basic Attacks
Level7.fullText: After casting Globe of Annihilation, Azmodan's Basic Attacks within the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds have an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> range and can hit <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> additional targets. Hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks empowered by Bombardment grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Annihilation.

Level7.name: Master of Destruction
Level7.shortText: All Shall Burn explodes
Level7.fullText: If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration, All Shall Burn's final damage applies to all enemies in an area around the target and grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Annihilation per Hero hit.

Level10.name: Demonic Invasion
Level10.shortText: Damage area and create an army of Grunts
Level10.fullText: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per impact. Grunts deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">39</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">750</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health and last up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes.<n/><n/>Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.

Level10.name: Tide of Sin
Level10.shortText: Empower Globe of Annihilation
Level10.fullText: Activate to make the next Globe of Annihilation cost no Mana and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage.<n/><n/>Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.

Level13.name: Brutish Vanguard
Level13.shortText: Demons have more Health, Warriors Slow
Level13.fullText: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> increased Health. Demon Warriors Slow attacked targets by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level13.name: Cydaea's Kiss
Level13.shortText: Reduce All Shall Burn Channel, final damage heals
Level13.fullText: Reduces the Channel time of All Shall Burn by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration against a Hero, Azmodan is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of his maximum Health.

Level13.name: Chain of Command
Level13.fullText: The cooldown of Demon Lieutenants' Demonic Smite is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and they grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> increased damage to nearby friendly Minions, Mercenaries, and Azmodan's summoned Demons.

Level16.name: Total Annihilation
Level16.shortText: Increase Globe damage to Heroes
Level16.fullText: Globe of Annihilation damages Heroes for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of their maximum Health.

Level16.name: Hell Rift
Level16.shortText: All Shall Burn summons and buffs Demon Warriors
Level16.fullText: If All Shall Burn Channels for its full duration or kills the target, a Demon Warrior is summoned at the target's location and all Demon Warriors deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> increased damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Trample
Level16.shortText: Charge a short distance
Level16.fullText: Activate to charge a short distance, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies caught in the path by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> second.<n/><n/>After hitting an enemy Hero with Trample, reduce the cooldown of Azmodan's Heroic Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level20.name: Siegebreaker
Level20.shortText: Demons deal more Structure damage
Level20.fullText: Azmodan's Demons deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> increased damage to Structures.

Level20.name: Black Pool
Level20.shortText: Tide of Sin damages and reduces Armor over time
Level20.fullText: Globes of Annihilation empowered by Tide of Sin also leave a Black Pool at their impact location for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Enemies within the pool lose <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> Armor per second, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c>, and take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">56</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second.

Level20.name: Inescapable Annihilation

Level20.fullText: Globe of Annihilation can now be cast globally.

Level20.name: Sin's Grasp

Level20.fullText: All Shall Burn Slows enemy Heroes. While active, the target is Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>, and if it lasts its full duration, they are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration against a Hero, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Barbarian.name: Sonya
Barbarian.title: Wandering Barbarian
Barbarian.searchText: Sonya Sonia Barbarian Nephalem D3 Diablo 3 Diablo3 III Reaper of Souls RoS Stun Initiation Clear Ganker Sustain Dive Offlaner
Barbarian.description: A Bruiser that's great at capturing Mercenary camps and likes to dive into the enemy team.
Barbarian.infoText: From the frozen Dreadlands of the north come the mighty Barbarian warriors. After surviving the destruction of her home and death of her tribe, Sonya wanders Sanctuary in search of battle and a better life for her people.

Basic.name: Ancient Spear
Basic.shortText: Throw a spear and pull self to the first enemy hit, stunning and dealing damage
Basic.fullText: Throw out a spear that pulls Sonya to the first enemy hit, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">173</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and briefly stunning them. If this hits an enemy, generate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Fury.

Basic.name: Seismic Slam
Basic.shortText: Damage an enemy and splash damage behind them
Basic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">176</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target enemy, and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">44</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to enemies behind the target.

Basic.name: Whirlwind
Basic.shortText: Damage nearby enemies and heal for a percentage of damage dealt
Basic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">138</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second to nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of damage dealt. Healing tripled versus Heroes.

Heroic.name: Leap
Heroic.shortText: Jump to a location, deal damage, and stun enemies
Heroic.fullText: Leap into the air, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies, and stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Wrath of the Berserker
Heroic.shortText: Increase damage and reduce disable duration
Heroic.fullText: Increase damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows against Sonya by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds, and extends by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second for every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Fury gained.

Trait.name: Fury
Trait.shortText: Generate Fury in combat. All Abilities grant Move Speed
Trait.fullText: Use Fury instead of Mana, which is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Using a Basic or Heroic Ability grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Basic.name: Cancel Whirlwind
Basic.fullText: Cancels the Whirlwind ability

Heroic.name: Cancel Leap
Heroic.fullText: Cancels Arreat Crater

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Trait.name: Fury
Trait.fullText: Use Fury instead of Mana, which is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Using a Basic or Heroic Ability grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Activable.shortText: Increase damage to Mercenaries, activate to heal

Usable while Whirlwinding.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Sonya deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage to Mercenaries.
