Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of your maximum Health as a Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Usable while Whirlwinding.

Activable.name: Striding Giant
Activable.fullText: Activate to become unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Usable only when Wrath Of The Berserker is active.

Activable.name: Ignore Pain
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain massive Armor
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, taking <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> less damage. Usable while Whirlwinding.

Level1.name: Furious Blow
Level1.shortText: Empower Seismic Slam
Level1.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4th</c> cast of Seismic Slam deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more damage to the primary target and costs no Fury.

Level1.name: War Paint
Level1.shortText: Basic Attacks heal
Level1.fullText: Sonya's Basic Attacks heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level1.name: Tough As Nails
Level1.shortText: Periodically gain Physical Armor
Level1.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges. Charges refresh <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> faster while Fury's Movement Speed bonus is active.

Level4.name: Shattered Ground
Level4.shortText: Increase Seismic Slam splash damage
Level4.fullText: Increase Seismic Slam's splash damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c>. Targeting a Hero with Seismic Slam further increases its splash damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c>, while targeting other enemies increases the length of its splash by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66%</c>.

Level4.name: Hurricane
Level4.shortText: Whirlwind removes Slows and Roots
Level4.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Whirlwind by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Casting Whirlwind removes all Slows and Roots from Sonya.

Level4.name: Shot Of Fury
Level4.shortText: Activate to gain Fury
Level4.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Fury. Usable while Whirlwinding.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> After casting Seismic Slam, your next Basic Attack deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more damage.

Level7.name: Poisoned Spear
Level7.shortText: Ancient Spear deals damage over time
Level7.fullText: Ancient Spear deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Life Funnel
Level7.shortText: Increases Whirlwind healing
Level7.fullText: Increases the healing of Whirlwind to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of damage dealt.

Level7.name: Battle Rage
Level7.shortText: Increase damage to Mercenaries, activate to heal
Level7.fullText: Activate to instantly restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of Sonya's maximum Health. Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges. Usable while Whirlwinding.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Sonya deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage to Mercenaries.

Level10.name: Leap
Level10.shortText: Jump to a location, deal damage, and stun enemies
Level10.fullText: Leap into the air, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies, and stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Wrath of the Berserker
Level10.shortText: Increase damage and reduce disable duration
Level10.fullText: Increase damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows against Sonya by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds, and extends by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second for every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Fury gained.

Level13.name: Mystical Spear
Level13.shortText: Ancient Spear always pulls, cooldown reduced
Level13.fullText: Ancient Spear always pulls Sonya to the target location even if it doesn't hit an enemy. When used this way, Ancient Spear's cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Ruthless
Level13.shortText: Increase Whirlwind damage to low Health targets
Level13.fullText: Whirlwind deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to Heroes below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health. Does not generate additional healing.

Level13.name: No Escape
Level13.fullText: Increases the Movement Speed bonus from using Basic and Heroic Abilities to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level16.name: Giant Slammer
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks and Seismic Slam deal bonus damage
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks and Seismic Slam deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> of Heroes' maximum Health as damage and heal Sonya for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level16.name: Rampage
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Ancient Spear cooldown
Level16.fullText: Increase Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Ancient Spear by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Nerves of Steel
Level16.shortText: Activate to gain a Shield
Level16.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of your maximum Health as a Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Usable while Whirlwinding.

Level20.name: Arreat Crater
Level20.shortText: Leap creates a crater and has reduced cooldown
Level20.fullText: Leap leaves behind an impassable crater for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.  Reduces Leap's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Striding Giant
Level20.shortText: Wrath of the Berserker can grant Unstoppable
Level20.fullText: Wrath of the Berserker increases maximum Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> and grants Striding Giant, which can be activated to become Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> second cooldown.

Level20.name: Composite Spear
Level20.shortText: Increase Ancient Spear range, grants Armor
Level20.fullText: Increases Ancient Spear's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Hitting an enemy Hero with Ancient Spear grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Ignore Pain
Level20.shortText: Activate to gain massive Armor
Level20.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, taking <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> less damage. Usable while Whirlwinding.

Butcher.title: Flesh Carver
Butcher.searchText: The Butcher TheButcher Demon D1 D3 Diablo 1 3 I III Diablo1 Diablo3 Stun Ganker Initiation Tether Sustain Dive
Butcher.description: An Assassin who starts slow, but deals extreme damage after collecting enough Meat.
Butcher.infoText: An unrelenting hacking echoed off the walls of the Cathedral and as Prince Aidan made his way through its depths, the sound only grew louder. There were no screams; just that dreadful sound... over and over.

Basic.name: Hamstring
Basic.shortText: Deals damage in an area and slows enemies
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slow enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. The Butcher's next Basic Attack will strike immediately.

Basic.name: Butcher's Brand
Basic.shortText: Brand an enemy, granting Life Steal against them
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">37</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to an enemy and Brand them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. The Butcher's Basic Attacks against the Branded target heal him for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the damage done.<n/><n/>Basic Attacks against Branded Heroes heal for double and extend the duration of the Brand by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Ruthless Onslaught
Basic.shortText: Charges at an enemy, stunning and dealing damage
Basic.fullText: Charge at an enemy, becoming Unstoppable and gaining Movement Speed. If The Butcher reaches the target, they are stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">119</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Heroic.name: Furnace Blast
Heroic.shortText: Deal damage around The Butcher after a delay
Heroic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies.<n/><n/>Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.

Heroic.name: Lamb to the Slaughter
Heroic.shortText: Chain an enemy Hero to a post
Heroic.fullText: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second delay. This deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">171</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Fresh Meat
Trait.shortText: Gather strength by killing enemies and collecting their meat
Trait.fullText: Upon dying, nearby enemy Minions drop 1 Fresh Meat and enemy Heroes drop 20 Fresh Meat. Fresh Meat can be picked up to gain 0.5 Attack Damage per Meat. The Butcher loses 15 Fresh Meat upon dying.Quest: Collect 200 Fresh Meat.Reward: Gain an additional 125 Attack Damage and 25% increased Attack Speed. Heroes continue to drop 10 Fresh Meat, Minions no longer drop Fresh Meat, and Fresh Meat is no longer lost on death.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Ruthless Onslaught Cancel
Basic.fullText: Cancels the Ruthless Onslaught ability.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Enraged
Activable.fullText: While below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.<n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> second cooldown.

Activable.name: Bolt of the Storm
Activable.shortText: Activate to teleport a short distance
Activable.fullText: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

Level1.name: Invigoration
Level1.shortText: Reduces Hamstring Mana cost, cooldown
Level1.fullText: If Hamstring hits a Hero, half of the Mana cost is refunded and the cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level1.name: Chop Meat
Level1.shortText: Increases Hamstring damage to non-Heroes
Level1.fullText: Increases Hamstring damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

Level1.name: Block
Level1.shortText: Periodically gain Physical Armor
Level1.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level4.name: Flail Axe
Level4.shortText: Increases Hamstring length
Level4.fullText: Increases the length of Hamstring by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level4.name: Cheap Shot
Level4.shortText: Increase Hamstring damage to disabled targets
Level4.fullText: Hamstring does <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more damage to targets affected by a Slow, Root, or Stun.

Level4.name: Unrelenting Pursuit
Level4.shortText: Reduces Ruthless Onslaught cooldown on impact
Level4.fullText: Reduces the cooldown of Ruthless Onslaught by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c> upon impact.

Level7.name: Insatiable Blade
Level7.shortText: Increases Move Speed while enemies are branded
Level7.fullText: While facing a branded enemy, The Butcher's Movement Speed is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level7.name: Meat Shield
Level7.shortText: Ruthless Onslaught grants Spell Armor
Level7.fullText: When Ruthless Onslaught impacts an enemy Hero, The Butcher gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level7.name: Victuals
Level7.shortText: Nearby Minion deaths heal
Level7.fullText: Every time a nearby enemy minion dies, The Butcher heals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> of his maximum health.

Level10.name: Furnace Blast
Level10.shortText: Deal damage around The Butcher after a delay
Level10.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies.<n/><n/>Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.

Level10.name: Lamb to the Slaughter
Level10.shortText: Chain an enemy Hero to a post
Level10.fullText: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second delay. This deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">171</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Brutal Strike
Level13.fullText: After using Hamstring, The Butcher's next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Basic Attacks within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> damage.

Level13.name: Savage Charge
Level13.fullText: Ruthless Onslaught deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of their maximum Health.

Level13.name: Cleaver
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of The Butcher's Basic Attack Damage in an area around the target.

Level16.name: Crippling Slam
Level16.shortText: Hamstring slow no longer fades and lasts longer
Level16.fullText: Hamstring's Slow no longer decays, and its duration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level16.name: Enraged
Level16.shortText: Gain Attack Speed and Armor at low Health
Level16.fullText: While below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.<n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> second cooldown.

Level16.name: Blood Frenzy
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks grant Attack and Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> increased Attack and Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level20.name: Fires of Hell
Level20.shortText: Furnace Blast explodes twice
Level20.fullText: Furnace Blast explodes a second time <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after the initial explosion.

Level20.name: Slaughterhouse
Level20.shortText: Lamb to the Slaughter chains all enemy Heroes
Level20.fullText: Lamb to the Slaughter now chains all enemy Heroes in range.

Level20.name: Nexus Blades
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks deal more damage and Slow
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Bolt of the Storm
Level20.shortText: Activate to teleport a short distance
Level20.fullText: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

Chen.name: Chen
Chen.title: Legendary Brewmaster
Chen.searchText: Chen Shen Stormstout Pandaren WoW World of Warcraft WC3 Warcraft3 Warcraft III 3 War3 Frozen Throne FT Mists of Pandaria MoP Slow Displace Shields Dive Offlaner
Chen.description: A potent Bruiser that wears downs enemies and is resistant to burst damage.
Chen.infoText: To be a brewmaster is to be an explorer, a lover of nature, and when the need arises; a powerful fighter. For years Chen Stormstout has wandered the world of Azeroth in search of rare ingredients, stirring stories, and of course, good brew.

Basic.name: Flying Kick
Basic.shortText: Kick through target enemy
Basic.fullText: Kick through target enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Basic.name: Keg Smash
Basic.shortText: Drench enemies in a nearby area with Brew, Slowing them
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and soak enemies in Brew for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, the Slow is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.<n/><n/>After being used, this Ability becomes Breath of Fire.<n/><n/><c val="ff0000" hlt-name="#ColorRed">Breath of Fire</c><n/>Deal damage and Ignite Brew-soaked enemies.

Basic.name: Stagger
Basic.shortText: Become immune to damage, then convert it to damage over time
Basic.fullText: Damage taken over the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds is prevented.  Once this effect ends, Chen receives <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the damage taken over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. This damage cannot be modified.

Heroic.name: Storm, Earth, Fire
Heroic.shortText: Split into three elemental spirits
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds, each with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.<n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Storm</c> can grant the spirits a Shield. <n/><c val="00ff00">Earth</c> can leap to an area and Slow enemies. <n/><c val="ff6600">Fire</c> can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.

Heroic.name: Wandering Keg
Heroic.shortText: Roll around in the barrel and knock away enemies
Heroic.fullText: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> increased Movement Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">59</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Fortifying Brew
Trait.shortText: Gain Brew and a Shield while drinking
Trait.fullText: Chen drinks from his keg, gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Brew and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> temporary Shields per second, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">540</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> while drinking. Shields persist for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds after he stops drinking.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Brew.

Basic.name: Breath of Fire
Basic.shortText: Breathe fire in target direction, dealing damage and Igniting drenched enemies
Basic.fullText: Breathe a cone of flames, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Enemies that are soaked in Brew are Ignited, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">342</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> additional damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds and adding <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds to the duration of the Slow from Keg Smash. <n/><n/>After being used or after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, this ability becomes Keg Smash.<n/><n/><c val="e1c72c" hlt-name="#ColorYellow">Keg Smash</c><n/>Damage and Slow enemies.

Basic.name: Storm
Basic.shortText: Gain a Shield
Basic.fullText: The spirits gain a Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If this is the final Ability cast, the shield amount is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">750</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> with no limited duration, and the duration of Storm, Earth, Fire is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Earth
Basic.shortText: Leap to a location, damaging and Rooting enemies
Basic.fullText: Fire and Earth leap to the target location, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">32</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies in a large area by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If this is the final Ability cast, increase the damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300%</c> and instead of Slowing, the leap Roots enemy Heroes hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Fire
Basic.shortText: Increase Attack Speed, damage
Basic.fullText: Increase the Attack Speed and Basic Attack damage of the spirits by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If this is the final Ability cast, the Attack Speed and damage bonus is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and the spirits gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Movement Speed for its duration.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Elusive Brawler
Activable.shortText: Activate to evade all Basic Attacks
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Accumulating Flame
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Burn enemy Heroes to gain damage, range
Level1.fullText: Reward: Damage enemy Heroes with Breath of Fire to permanently increase periodic damage by 0.25. Kills grant 2.Reward: After gaining 20 damage, increase the range of Keg Smash.Mythic Reward: Upon gaining 75 damage, Breath of Fire reduces enemy Armor by 20 and its duration is increased by 0.75 seconds each time Chen attacks the Hero.

Level1.name: Freshest Ingredients
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes heal more
Level1.fullText: Increase the healing duration of Regeneration Globes by 150%.Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.Reward: Reduce Fortifying Brew's cooldown by 2 seconds, and 50% of its Shield persists indefinitely after drinking.

Level1.name: Stormstout Secret Recipe
Level1.shortText: Basic Abilities heal Chen
Level1.fullText: Chen heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5%</c> of his maximum Health when his Basic Abilities hit an enemy Hero.

Level4.name: Deadly Strike
Level4.shortText: Increase Flying Kick damage and remove Brew cost
Level4.fullText: Flying Kick no longer costs Brew. Additionally, its damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> while Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.

Level4.name: Eye of the Tiger
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage, heal
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks against Brew-soaked enemy Heroes deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and heal Chen for<c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> 60%</c> of the damage done.

Level4.name: Withering Flames
Level4.shortText: Igniting Heroes reduces their Spell Power
Level4.fullText: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Gift of the Ox
Level7.shortText: Increase Stagger's duration, reduce damage taken
Level7.fullText: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of damage taken.

Level7.name: Brewmaster's Balance
Level7.shortText: Gain bonuses based on current level of Brew
Level7.fullText: While at or below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Brew, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed. While at or above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Brew, regenerate an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.

Level7.name: Elusive Brawler
Level7.shortText: Activate to Evade Basic Attacks
Level7.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Wandering Keg
Level10.shortText: Roll around in the barrel and knock away enemies
Level10.fullText: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> increased Movement Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">59</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Storm, Earth, Fire
Level10.shortText: Split into three elemental spirits
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds, each with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.<n/><n/><c val="00ffff">Storm</c> can grant the spirits a Shield. <n/><c val="00ff00">Earth</c> can leap to an area and Slow enemies. <n/><c val="ff6600">Fire</c> can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.

Level13.name: Pressure Point
Level13.fullText: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, or by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.

Level13.name: A Touch of Honey
Level13.shortText: Increase Keg Smash Slow amount, duration
Level13.fullText: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> and its duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Ring of Fire
Level13.shortText: Damage nearby enemies after Igniting them
Level13.fullText: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every second to nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Enough to Share
Level13.fullText: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">420</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Level16.name: Flying Leap
Level16.shortText: Increased Range, reduce cooldown
Level16.fullText: Increase Flying Kick's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> and reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.

Level16.name: Celerity

Cho.description: Head 1 of a 2 Headed Hero, Cho controls the body of Cho'gall.
Cho.infoText: Cho’gall is one of the most powerful, intelligent, and insane ogre-magi to have ever lived. As the leader of the Twilight's Hammer the two brothers seek to bring about an age of destruction... whenever they aren’t bickering that is.

Basic.name: Surging Fist

The dash range increases by up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c>, depending on how long it is charged.

Basic Attacking burning enemies re-Ignites them. Cho is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> when an enemy is Ignited.

Gall can use Runic Blast to detonate it to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">210</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area.

Chromie.name: Chromie
Chromie.title: Keeper of Time
Chromie.searchText: Chronormu Bronze Dragon WoW World of Warcraft Wrath of the Lich King WotLK Cataclysm Mists of Pandaria MoP Warlords of Draenor WoD Mage Gnome Slow Disable Displace Burst Time Stop Artillery
Chromie.description: A long range, high burst damage Mage, who requires good timing and setup.
Chromie.infoText: At first glance, Chromie appears to be an ordinary gnome. In truth, she is Chronormu, Bronze Dragon and a master of time. When it comes to temporal manipulation there's no problem she can't solve... with some help from her future self, of course.

Basic.name: Sand Blast
Basic.shortText: Fire a long range blast that damages an enemy
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, fire a missile that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">305</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Casting Sand Blast leaves an Echo behind that mimics Chromie's Sand Blast and Basic Attack, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> damage. Maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Echo active at a time.

Basic.name: Dragon’s Breath
Basic.shortText: Fire a series of blasts in an area
Basic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Launch <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> blasts into the air that land every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds towards the targeted direction, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">215</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each.

Basic.name: Time Trap
Basic.shortText: Place a trap that Time Stops Heroes
Basic.fullText: Place a Time Trap that arms and Stealths after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Chromie's Trait can be activated to detonate the trap, placing all nearby allied or enemy Heroes in Time Stop for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> trap active at a time.

Heroic.name: Temporal Loop
Heroic.shortText: Return an enemy Hero to a previous position
Heroic.fullText: Choose an enemy Hero. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.<n/><n/>Basic Abilities recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500%</c> faster for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after casting Temporal Loop.

Heroic.name: Slowing Sands
Heroic.shortText: Create a Slowing area
Heroic.fullText: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c>.

Trait.name: Timewalker
Trait.shortText: Gain Talents earlier than everyone else
Trait.fullText: Chromie has traveled to the future, and as such, will learn her Talents <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> levels earlier than her teammates!<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Detonate Time Trap</s><n/><n/>Detonates active Time Traps.

Mount.name: Summon Mount

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Level1.name: Once Again the First Time

Level1.name: Deep Breathing

Activate to reveal the targeted area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Deathwing.name: Deathwing
Deathwing.title: The Destroyer
Deathwing.searchText: Warcraft WC2 WoW Cataclysm dragon Neltharion the Earth-Warder Warcraft 2 Stun Slow CC Global Offlaner Fire
Deathwing.description: A Massive Unstoppable Dragon that can withstand punishment while dishing it out, but is unaffected by allied Abilities.
Deathwing.infoText: One of the five Dragon Aspects and the leader of the Black Dragonflight, Neltharion the Earth-Warder was once a protector of Azeroth. During the War of the Ancients, he was driven mad by the Old Gods and turned against his former allies. Now known as Deathwing the Destroyer, he has found his way to the Nexus where his limitless rage drives his ultimate goal of widespread destruction and the eventual end of all living things.

Drains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Energy per second.

Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer: Incinerate</c><n/>Damage enemies near Deathwing
