Trait.fullText: Deathwing is fitted with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> Armor Plates which grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor each. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health lost causes Deathwing to lose a plate. Plates are only restored when Dragonflight is used, based on the amount of Health Deathwing has when landing.<n/><n/>Deathwing is also a mighty Dragon Aspect who is permanently Unstoppable and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> additional Spell Damage to Heroes, but views his allies with contempt and ignores any of their friendly effects.

Mount.name: Dragonflight
Mount.shortText: Take to the sky
Mount.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, fly into the sky, becoming Immune to all effects and gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> Health per second. Once cast, this ability cannot be interrupted. Cannot be cast for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds after taking damage, Basic Attacking or casting an Ability.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms.

Basic.name: Cancel
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, Deathwing breathes a stream of flame, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">19</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.125</c> seconds. Drains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Energy per second.

Basic.name: Onslaught
Basic.shortText: Lunge in a direction
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Deathwing lunges in a direction dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Deathwing bites enemies at the end of the lunge, dealing an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/><c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker: Earth Shatter</c><n/>Damage and Stun enemies in two lines

Basic.name: Earth Shatter
Basic.shortText: Damage and Stun enemies in two lines
Basic.fullText: Create a fissure of earth that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit and Stuns them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer: Onslaught</c><n/>Lunge in a direction

Basic.name: Destroyer
Basic.shortText: Land on the ground in Destroyer form
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area and landing in <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after landing.

Basic.name: World Breaker
Basic.shortText: Land on the ground in World Breaker form
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area and landing in <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker</c> form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after landing.

Basic.name: Skyfall
Basic.shortText: Deathwing can drop meteors while in Dragonflight
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.8</c> seconds, a meteor falls from the sky, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">58</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area.<n/><n/>If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of his maximum Health.

Activable.name: Bellowing Roar
Activable.shortText: Roar Fears nearby Heroes
Activable.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Elementium Plating
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain a Shield, restore Health
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of Deathwing's missing Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of his maximum Health per second. <n/><n/>When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.<n/><n/>The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.

Level1.name: Dragon Soul
Level1.shortText: <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Incinerate</c>, <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Lava Burst</c> explosion heal Deathwing
Level1.fullText: <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer:</c> <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Incinerate</c> heals Deathwing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker: Lava Burst's</c> explosion damage heals Deathwing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.

Level1.name: Molten Blood
Level1.shortText: Armor Plates increase Regen
Level1.fullText: While Deathwing has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> or more Armor Plates, he heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.6%</c> of his maximum Health per second.

Level1.name: Draconic Might
Level1.shortText: Protected from Armor Plate loss, Basic Attacks heal
Level1.fullText: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Infernus
Level4.shortText: Increase Molten Flame damage at high Energy
Level4.fullText: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. Increase this damage bonus to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> when Molten Flame is cast at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Energy or higher.

Level4.name: Heat Wave
Level4.shortText: Increase <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Incinerate</c> and <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Lava Burst</c> damage
Level4.fullText: <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer:</c> After hitting an enemy Hero with <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Incinerate</c>, Deathwing deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">9</c> seconds. Stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.<n/><n/><c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker:</c> Increase the explosion damage of <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Lava Burst</c> by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>.

Level4.name: Dragon's Ire
Level4.shortText: Deathwing gains damage while missing Armor Plates
Level4.fullText: While Deathwing has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level7.name: Firestorm
Level7.shortText: Meteors upon landing, reduced landing delay.
Level7.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> meteors near the landing area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">77</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit. <n/><n/>Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.

Level7.name: Death Drop
Level7.shortText: Landing on Heroes reduces Spell Armor
Level7.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> or <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker's</c> landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Skyfall
Level7.shortText: Deathwing can drop meteors to heal himself
Level7.fullText: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">58</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area. Has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.<n/><n/>If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of his maximum Health.

Level10.name: Burn Beneath My Shadow
Level10.shortText: Destroying Forts or Keeps refreshes Cataclysm
Level10.fullText: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>.

Level10.name: Bellowing Roar
Level10.shortText: Roar Fears nearby Heroes
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Wicked Inferno
Level13.fullText: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c>. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Energy over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Ruination
Level13.shortText: <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Onslaught</c> bite Slows, <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Earth Shatter</c> cost reduced
Level13.fullText: <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer:</c> The bite from <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Onslaught</c> now Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker:</c> Reduce <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">Earth Shatter's</c> cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds and its Energy cost by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c>.

Level13.name: Fire and Fury
Level13.shortText: Empower Basic Attacks against disabled enemies
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Conflagration
Level16.shortText: Molten Flame causes Heroes to explode
Level16.fullText: Dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">320</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds causes them to burn for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. While burning, they explode every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies.

Level16.name: Gaze Onto Destruction
Level16.shortText: Landing on Heroes Slows and reduces damage
Level16.fullText: Hitting Heroes with <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> or <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker's</c> landing causes their damage to be reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and Slows them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5</c> Seconds.

Level16.name: Elementium Plating
Level16.shortText: Activate to gain a Shield, restore Health
Level16.fullText: Activate to gain a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of Deathwing's missing Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of his maximum Health per second. <n/><n/>When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.<n/><n/>The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.

Level20.name: Stood in the Fire
Level20.shortText: Cataclysm Slows, duration increased
Level20.fullText: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Arrival of a God
Level20.shortText: Landing damage increased, gain all level 7 talents
Level20.fullText: <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> or <c val="d8ab80-87564b" hlt-name="#DeathwingWorldBreaker">World Breaker's</c> landing damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400%</c>.<n/><n/>Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> talents.

Level20.name: Destroyer's Rampage
Level20.shortText: Landing in <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> form empowers Deathwing
Level20.fullText: For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds after landing in <c val="ef6e28-ad231e" hlt-name="#DeathwingDestroyer">Destroyer</c> form, Deathwing's damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.<n/><n/>Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect.

Deckard.name: Deckard
Deckard.title: The Last Horadrim
Deckard.searchText: Cain D1 D2 D3 Diablo 1 2 3 I II III Diablo1 Diablo2 Diablo3 Root Displace Sleep Healer Potion
Deckard.description: A burst Healer who excels at preparing the battlefield before a fight and can cripple enemies with crowd control.
Deckard.infoText: As an avid scholar, Deckard Cain has dedicated his life to the pursuit of knowledge. He has been an advisor, storyteller, and friend to Sanctuary's greatest heroes, guiding them through peril time and again. When Deckard speaks, it's wise to stay awhile and listen.

Basic.name: Healing Potion
Basic.shortText: Throw Potions that heal allies
Basic.fullText: Throw a Healing Potion on the ground that heals the first allied Hero that comes in contact with it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">285</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.<n/><n/>Limit <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> active Potions.

Basic.name: Horadric Cube
Basic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Release the Horadric Cube. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds it explodes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in the area and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Scroll Of Sealing
Basic.shortText: Damage and Root enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Unfurl an enchanted scroll over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.25</c> seconds, forming a triangle that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies inside and Roots them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Stay Awhile and Listen
Heroic.shortText: Put enemies to Sleep with a fascinating story
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Channel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after.<n/><n/>Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.

Heroic.name: Lorenado
Heroic.shortText: Conjure a lorenado that knocks enemies away
Heroic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to Heroes hit.

Trait.name: Fortitude of the Faithful
Trait.shortText: Nearby allies grant Armor, cooldown reduction
Trait.fullText: When at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Cancel Stay Awhile and Listen
Heroic.fullText: Stop Channeling.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Sapphire
Activable.shortText: Next Horadric Cube Slow increased
Activable.fullText: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100% </c>and its slow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.<n/><n/>Only <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.

Activable.name: Ruby
Activable.shortText: Next Horadric Cube creates Lesser Healing Potions
Activable.fullText: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100% </c> and it spawns <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Only <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.

Activable.name: Emerald
Activable.shortText: Next Horadric Cube reduces enemy healing received
Activable.fullText: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100% </c>and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Only <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.

Trait.name: Fortitude of the Faithful
Trait.shortText: Nearby allies grant Armor, cooldown reduction
Trait.fullText: When at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.

Level1.name: Scroll of Identify
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Scroll of Sealing damage, reduces Armor
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Scroll of Sealing permanently increases its damage by 2.Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to 15 and its duration to 6 seconds.

Level1.name: Field Study
Level1.shortText: Scroll of Sealing can grant Spell Power
Level1.fullText: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level1.name: Sapphire
Level1.shortText: Next Horadric Cube Slow increased
Level1.fullText: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100% </c>and its slow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.<n/><n/>Only <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.

Level4.name: Potion of Shielding
Level4.shortText: Healing Potions grant a Shield
Level4.fullText: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Rejuvenation Potion
Level4.shortText: Healing Potions restore Mana, heal more
Level4.fullText: Healing Potions restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Mana and heal for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">114</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Ruby
Level4.shortText: Next Horadric Cube creates Lesser Healing Potions
Level4.fullText: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100% </c> and it spawns <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Only <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.

Level7.name: Cube Mastery
Level7.shortText: Horadric Cube reduces Scroll of Sealing cooldown
Level7.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c>. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Kanai's Cube
Level7.shortText: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt
Level7.fullText: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Emerald
Level7.shortText: Next Horadric Cube reduces enemy healing received
Level7.fullText: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100% </c>and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Only <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Gem may be active at a time.

Level10.name: Stay Awhile and Listen
Level10.shortText: Put enemies to Sleep with a fascinating story
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Channel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after.<n/><n/>Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.

Level10.name: Lorenado
Level10.shortText: Conjure a lorenado that knocks enemies away
Level10.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to Heroes hit.

Level13.name: Super Healing Potion
Level13.shortText: Healing Potions heal more after a duration
Level13.fullText: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, it heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Healing Potion heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more when the target is under <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> health.

Level13.name: Potion of Revival
Level13.shortText: Healing Potions heal in an area
Level13.fullText: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the healing amount.

Level13.name: Ancient Blessings
Level13.shortText: Activate Fortitude to empower ally Attacks
Level13.fullText: Activate Fortitude of the Faithful to empower nearby allied Hero Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, causing them to deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">62</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area and heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> for each Hero hit. This effect can only occur once per second.

Level16.name: Scroll of Stone Curse
Level16.shortText: Scroll of Sealing can deal more damage
Level16.fullText: Scroll of Sealing deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> more damage when hitting at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Heroes.

Level16.name: Safety in Numbers
Level16.shortText: Additional allies empower Fortitude of the Faithful
Level16.fullText: If at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor, <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Mana Regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.

Level16.name: Horadric Staff
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks periodically Stun Heroes
Level16.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Respect the Elderly
Level20.shortText: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences, Blinds
Level20.fullText: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds upon waking up from Sleep.

Level20.name: Morenados!
Level20.shortText: Gain Lorenado charge, reduce cooldown
Level20.fullText: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Bottomless Flask
Level20.shortText: Healing Potions recharge after use
Level20.fullText: After use, Healing Potions recharge after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Perfect Gems
Level20.shortText: Reduce Gem, Horadric Cube cooldown
Level20.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Dehaka.name: Dehaka
Dehaka.title: Primal Pack Leader
Dehaka.searchText: Dahaka Deaka Primal Zerg SC 2 SC2 Star2 Starcraft2 StarCraft II Heart of the Swarm HotS Stun Displace Slow Silence Global Sustain Offlaner
Dehaka.description: A Bruiser with a strong, global presence that can effectively clear groups of minions.
Dehaka.infoText: Cunning and wise, Dehaka is one of the last surviving pack leaders of the forgotten world of Zerus. As with all primal zerg, he is driven by a powerful desire to consume the essence of his foes and evolve into newer and more deadly forms.

Basic.name: Drag
Basic.shortText: Deal light damage and drag an enemy
Basic.fullText: Dehaka lashes out his tongue, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit, Stunning and dragging them with him for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If Dehaka is Stunned or Silenced while using Drag, the effect ends.

Basic.name: Dark Swarm
Basic.shortText: Damage nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">48</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds to nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5</c> seconds. While active, you are able to move through units. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.

Basic.name: Burrow
Basic.shortText: Gain Stasis by burrowing into the ground
Basic.fullText: Burrow into the ground, entering Stasis and becoming Invulnerable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. While Burrowed, Dehaka can move at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> movement speed.

Heroic.name: Isolation
Heroic.shortText: Silence, Slow, and reduce vision of an enemy
Heroic.fullText: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Adaptation
Heroic.shortText: Heal back damage taken
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage Dehaka took over this period.

Trait.name: Essence Collection
Trait.shortText: Collect and consume enemy Essence to heal
Trait.fullText: Heal Dehaka for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">29</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per stored Essence over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Essence from Takedowns and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Essence from nearby Minions dying. Maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Essence.

Mount.name: Brushstalker
Mount.shortText: Burrow to a bush on the Battleground.
Mount.fullText: Activate to burrow to a bush on the Battleground.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> movement speed while in a bush and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after leaving. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gathering a Regeneration Globe reduces the cooldown of Brushstalker by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Cancel Burrow
Basic.shortText: Unburrow
Basic.fullText: Cancels Burrow

Level1.name: Enduring Swarm
Level1.shortText: Increases Dark Swarm duration, grants Spell Armor
Level1.fullText: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds and grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Spell Armor while active.

Level1.name: Tissue Regeneration
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Essence increases Health Regen, max Essence
Level1.fullText: Regeneration Globes grant 10 Essence.Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases Health Regeneration by 4, up to 40, and maximum Essence by 1, up to 10.

Level1.name: Enhanced Agility
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Essence increases Brushstalker Move Speed
Level1.fullText: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 4 seconds after leaving a bush.Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases the Movement Speed bonus of Brushstalker by 2%, up to 20%.

Level4.name: Lurker Strain
Level4.shortText: Burrow Stealths, knocks enemies away
Level4.fullText: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level4.name: One-Who-Collects
Level4.shortText: Increases Essence from Minions, Dark Swarm damage to Mercenaries
Level4.fullText: Increases Essence collected from Minions by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Dark Swarm deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more damage to Mercenaries.

Level4.name: Hero Stalker
Level4.shortText: Takedowns grant more Essence
Level4.fullText: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>, and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Essence for each enemy Hero hit by Dark Swarm, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> at once.

Level7.name: Feeding Frenzy
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Gambit:</c> Basic Attacks reduce Drag cooldown
Level7.fullText: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.Gambit: Basic Attacks reduce Drag's cooldown by 1.5 seconds. Every death reduces this cooldown reduction by 0.25 seconds, up to 3 times.

Level7.name: Paralyzing Enzymes
Level7.shortText: Drag Slows, reduces Healing
Level7.fullText: Drag Slows the target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> and reduces their healing received by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after ending. Dehaka's Basic Attacks increase the duration of the healing reduction to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Symbiosis
Level7.shortText: Reduces Dark Swarm cooldown against Heroes
Level7.fullText: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.4</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Isolation
Level10.shortText: Silence, Slow, and reduce vision of an enemy
Level10.fullText: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Adaptation
Level10.shortText: Heal back damage taken
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage Dehaka took over this period.

Level13.name: Ferocious Stalker
Level13.shortText: Brushstalker Slows, increases Dark Swarm damage
Level13.fullText: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.

Level13.name: Primal Swarm
Level13.fullText: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, causing them to take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> extra damage.

Level13.name: Primal Rage
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25%</c> increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.

Level16.name: Elongated Tongue
Level16.shortText: Increases Drag range
Level16.fullText: Increase Drag range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level16.name: Tunneling Claws
Level16.shortText: Increase Burrow movement speed
Level16.fullText: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120%</c>.

Level16.name: Pack Leader
Level16.shortText: Gain Armor, Attack Speed near bushes
Level16.fullText: Dehaka gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds after leaving.

Level20.name: Contagion
Level20.shortText: Isolation splashes to nearby Heroes
Level20.fullText: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> less damage to all targets.

Level20.name: Change Is Survival
Level20.shortText: Enhanced Adaptation healing, cooldown
Level20.fullText: Increases Adaptation healing to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Essence Claws
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks slow, grant Essence
Level20.fullText: Dehaka's Basic Attacks slow the target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Essence.

Level20.name: Apex Predator
Level20.shortText: Reduced Brushstalker cooldown, cast time
Level20.fullText: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c> seconds and the cast time by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

DemonHunter.name: Valla
DemonHunter.title: Demon Hunter
DemonHunter.searchText: Valla Demon Hunter demonhunter DH Nephalem Nephalem D3 Diablo 3 III  Diablo3 Reaper of Souls RoS Stun Mobile Mobility Marksman
DemonHunter.description: A well-rounded Assassin that's mobile and can deal high sustained damage.
DemonHunter.infoText: Valla witnessed the ferocity of hellspawn firsthand as the demons ravaged her village and left her for dead. Now, with no people to call her own, her only allegiance is to her cause: to rid Sanctuary of the demonic filth corrupting its lands.

Basic.name: Hungering Arrow
Basic.shortText: Fire an arrow which seeks out and strikes multiple targets
Basic.fullText: Fire an arrow that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first target hit, then seeks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional enemies, prioritizing Heroes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Can hit an enemy multiple times.

Basic.name: Multishot
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">159</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies within the target area.

Basic.name: Vault
Basic.shortText: Dash to a location
Basic.fullText: Dash to the target area. Valla's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> increased damage per stack of Hatred.

Heroic.name: Strafe
Heroic.shortText: Unleashes a flurry of arrows at enemies
Heroic.fullText: Rapidly attack enemies within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> range for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Rain of Vengeance
Heroic.shortText: Area attack that Stuns enemies
Heroic.fullText: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Trait.name: Hatred
Trait.shortText: Basic Attacks grant bonus Attack Damage and Move Speed temporarily
Trait.fullText: Basic Attacks grant a stack of Hatred, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c>. Each Hatred stack increases Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> and Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Gloom
Activable.shortText: Consume Hatred to gain Spell Armor
Activable.fullText: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.2</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.

Level1.name: Puncturing Arrow
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Gain Hungering Arrow bounce, damage
Level1.fullText: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Hungering Arrow refunds 40 Mana and permanently increases the damage of its initial impact by 6.

Level1.name: Fire At Will
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Gain Multishot damage, Hatred
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Multishot grants 2 Hatred and permanently increases its damage by 2.Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes with Multishot, increase its damage by 40.

Level1.name: Creed of the Hunter
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Gambit:</c> Gain Attack Speed<n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Hatred Basic Attack bonus
Level1.fullText: Quest: Every 50 Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by 1%, up to 6%.Gambit: Gain 25% bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.

Level4.name: Arsenal
Level4.shortText: Increase Multishot range, launch grenades
Level4.fullText: Increase the range of Multishot by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. Multishot also fires <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> grenades that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and refund <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.

Level4.name: Death Dealer
Level4.shortText: Increases Vault damage bonus, reduce cooldown
Level4.fullText: Increase Vaults Basic Attack damage bonus from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Vault by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Repeating Arrow
Level4.shortText: Vault refreshes Hungering Arrow
Level4.fullText: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.

Level7.name: Monster Hunter
Level7.shortText: Increase Hungering Arrow non-Hero damage
Level7.fullText: Hungering Arrow deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

Level7.name: Frost Shot
Level7.shortText: Gain Multishot Slow, Hungering Arrow damage
Level7.fullText: Multishot Slows enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. Hungering Arrows deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage to Slowed enemies.

Level7.name: Hot Pursuit
Level7.shortText: Increase Hatred Move Speed bonus
Level7.fullText: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c>.

Level10.name: Strafe
Level10.shortText: Unleashes a flurry of arrows at enemies
Level10.fullText: Rapidly attack enemies within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> range for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Rain of Vengeance
Level10.shortText: Area attack that Stuns enemies
Level10.fullText: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level13.name: Siphoning Arrows
Level13.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c>.

Level13.name: Tempered by Discipline
Level13.shortText: Basic Attacks heal, increased by Hatred
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of the damage dealt, increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> per Hatred stack.

Level13.name: Gloom
Level13.shortText: Consume Hatred to gain Spell Armor
Level13.fullText: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.2</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.

Level16.name: Punishment
Level16.shortText: Reduce Multishot cooldown at max Hatred
Level16.fullText: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Multishot's Mana cost from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">55</c>.

Level16.name: Seething Hatred
Level16.shortText: Increase all damage at max Hatred
Level16.fullText: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>.

Level16.name: Manticore
Level16.shortText: Increase Basic Attacks against Heroes
Level16.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.

Level20.name: Death Siphon
Level20.shortText: Strafe lasts longer, fires penetrating bolts
Level20.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.125</c> seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">34</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Storm of Vengeance
Level20.shortText: Reduce cooldown, gain Attack Speed
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c>. While at max Hatred, gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Attack Speed.

Level20.name: Acrobat
Level20.shortText: Gain Vault charges, drop Caltrops
Level20.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges of Vault. Drop <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Caltrops while Vaulting that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slow enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Farflight Quiver
Level20.shortText: Gain Basic Attack range, increased by Hatred
Level20.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Basic Attack range.

Diablo.name: Diablo
Diablo.title: Lord of Terror
Diablo.searchText: Diablo Demon Lord Terror D1 D2 D3 Diablo 1 2 3 I II III Diablo1 Diablo2 Diablo3 red Fire Stun CC Initiation
Diablo.description: A risky Tank who can devastate an enemy team with his "all-in" combo potential.
Diablo.infoText: Known in the ancient tongue as Al'Diabolos, the Prime Evil of Terror, the Demon Lord Diablo seeks to claim the world of Sanctuary for the Burning Hells. His victims are innumerable, his schemes unknowable, and his gender... malleable.

Basic.name: Shadow Charge
Basic.shortText: Charge to a target enemy and push them back
Basic.fullText: Charge an enemy, knocking them back, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. If the enemy hits terrain, they are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Basic.name: Fire Stomp
Basic.shortText: Unleash fire waves in a direction
Basic.fullText: Unleashes fire waves toward the targeted area that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each. Once they reach maximum range they return, dealing an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">36</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Diablo heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130%</c> of the damage dealt to Heroes.

Basic.name: Overpower
Basic.shortText: Grab an enemy and slam them behind Diablo, stunning them and dealing damage
Basic.fullText: Grabs the target and slams it behind Diablo, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">73</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Apocalypse
Heroic.shortText: Stun all enemy Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds the rune explodes dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">137</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Lightning Breath
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in front of Diablo
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. <n/><n/>Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.

Trait.name: Black Soulstone
Trait.shortText: Gather souls from enemies to gain Health and resurrect faster
Trait.fullText: Repeatable Quest: Gain 10 Souls per Hero killed and 1 Soul per Minion, up to 100. For each Soul, gain 0.3% maximum Health. If Diablo has 100 Souls upon dying, he will resurrect in 5 seconds but lose 100 Souls.After reaching level 10, Diablo only consumes 75 Souls when resurrecting.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Lightning Breath Cancel
Heroic.fullText: Cancels the Lightning Breath ability.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Soul Shield
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain Spell Armor per Soul
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> plus <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Activable.name: Lord of Terror

Level1.name: Feast on Fear
Level1.shortText: Shadow Charge, Overpower heal
Level1.fullText: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of his maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Devil's Due

Level1.name: Soul Shield
Level1.shortText: Activate to gain Spell Armor per Soul
Level1.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> plus <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level4.name: Sacrificial Soul

Level4.fullText: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Souls and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. While at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c> Souls, increase this Armor to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c>.

Level4.name: Souls to the Flame

Level4.name: Life Leech
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks grant Souls and heal
Level4.fullText: Diablo gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Soul and heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75%</c> of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c> Souls, increase this healing to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5%</c> of his maximum Health.

Level7.name: Eternal Flames

Level7.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> Mana.

Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level7.name: Diabolical Momentum

Level7.fullText: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Apocalypse
Level10.shortText: Stun all enemy Heroes
Level10.fullText: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds the rune explodes dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">137</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Lightning Breath
Level10.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in front of Diablo
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. <n/><n/>Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.

Level13.name: Devastating Charge
Level13.shortText: Quest: Shadow Charge reduces Armor
Level13.fullText: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.

Level13.name: Hellfire
Level13.fullText: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.  While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies.

Level13.name: Cruelty

Level16.name: Domination

Level16.fullText: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.

Level16.name: Debilitating Flames

Heroes Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">24%</c> or more by Debilitating Flames deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage.

Level16.name: Overpowering Nightmare
Level16.shortText: Gain charges of Overpower
Level16.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges of Overpower, with a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> second cooldown between uses.

Level20.name: Dying Breath
Level20.shortText: Apocalypse triggers on death
Level20.fullText: Apocalypse's cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> seconds for every enemy Hero hit (to a minimum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds) and is cast for free when Diablo dies.

Level20.name: Hellstorm
Level20.shortText: Lightning Breath lasts longer
Level20.fullText: Lightning Breath lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> longer.

Level20.name: Lord of Terror
Level20.shortText: Steal Health, Souls from nearby enemy Heroes
Level20.fullText: Activate to steal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of the maximum Health of nearby enemy Heroes and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Souls per Hero hit.

Level20.name: Hellgate
Level20.shortText: Teleport and create an Apocalypse
Level20.fullText: Teleport and place a demonic rune at target location. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds the rune explodes dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">137</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and stunning enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.

Dryad.name: Lunara
Dryad.title: First Daughter of Cenarius
Dryad.searchText: Lunara Dryad Night Elf Cenarius WoW World of Warcraft Legion Heroes of the Storm Hearthstone Slow Mobile Mobility Marksman
Dryad.description: A sustained Assassin who can wear down her enemies from afar with her poison.
Dryad.infoText: While her younger sisters frolicked in idyllic forests, Lunara watched as mortals exploited nature’s splendor. On Azeroth, her father Cenarius forbade her from retaliating. But this is the Nexus, and it’s time for nature to take its revenge.

Basic.name: Noxious Blossom
Basic.shortText: Deals area damage
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, cause an area to explode with pollen dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Basic.name: Crippling Spores
Basic.shortText: Slow enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin and extend duration
Basic.fullText: Enemies currently afflicted by Nature's Toxin have its duration increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3 </c>seconds and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Wisp
Basic.shortText: Spawns a Wisp to scout
Basic.fullText: Spawn a Wisp to scout an area. Can be redirected once active. When the Wisp is in a bush for more <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, its vision radius is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Thornwood Vine
Heroic.shortText: Damages in a line
Heroic.fullText: Send forth vines that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">184</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in a line.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Heroic.name: Leaping Strike
Heroic.shortText: Leap over enemies, damaging and Slowing
Heroic.fullText: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.35 </c>seconds and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">271</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Trait.name: Nature's Toxin
Trait.shortText: Basic Attacks and damaging Abilities deal damage over time
Trait.fullText: Lunara's Basic Attacks and damaging Abilities poison their target, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Every additional application increases the duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">9</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Dryad's Swiftness
Mount.shortText: Lunara moves about <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> faster by leaping short distances.
Mount.fullText: Lunara moves <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> faster by leaping short distances.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Relocate Wisp
