Basic.fullText: Moves the Wisp to a new location.

Activable.name: Greater Spell Shield - Disabled
Activable.shortText: Greatly reduces incoming Ability Damage
Activable.fullText: Greater Spell Shield is disabled and will not trigger.<n/><n/>Click this button to enable Greater Spell Shield.

Activable.name: Abolish Magic
Activable.shortText: Remove crowd control from a target and Lunara
Activable.fullText: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Activable.name: Greater Spell Shield - Enabled
Activable.shortText: Greatly reduces incoming Ability Damage
Activable.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/>Click this button to disable Greater Spell Shield from Triggering automatically.

Mount.name: Dryad's Swiftness
Mount.shortText: Lunara moves about <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> faster by leaping short distances.
Mount.fullText: Lunara moves <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> faster by leaping short distances.

Level1.name: Sentinel Wisp
Level1.shortText: Wisp's bonus vision radius is increased
Level1.fullText: After remaining in a bush for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, Wisp's vision radius is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> and reveals the surrounding area.

Level1.name: Natural Perspective
Level1.shortText: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies
Level1.fullText: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.

Level1.name: Hippity Hop
Level1.shortText: Increase Dryad's Swiftness bonus
Level1.fullText: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>.

Level4.name: Blossom Swell
Level4.shortText: Increases Noxious Blossom range and radius
Level4.fullText: Increases Noxious Blossom's cast range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. and its radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. Blossom Swell applies <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.

Level4.name: Nature's Culling
Level4.shortText: Increases Nature's Toxin damage to non-Heroes
Level4.fullText: Increases Nature's Toxin's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> to non-Heroes.

Level4.name: Siphoning Toxin
Level4.shortText: Nature's Toxin heals Lunara
Level4.fullText: While at least one enemy is afflicted by Nature's Toxin, heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">9</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> per second. When an enemy Hero has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks of Nature's Toxin, increase this healing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">19</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> per second.

Level7.name: Splintered Spear
Level7.shortText: Noxious Blossom makes Basic Attack spread
Level7.fullText: Casting Noxious Blossom grants Lunara <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks of Splintered Spear. When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack for each target. Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks.<n/><n/>Splintered Spear deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.

Level7.name: Choking Pollen
Level7.shortText: Nature's Toxin increases Noxious Blossom damage
Level7.fullText: Noxious Blossom deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more damage to enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175%</c> against enemies with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks.

Level7.name: Wild Vigor
Level7.shortText: Crippling Spores increases Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: Using Crippling Spores increases the damage of Lunara's next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> Basic Attacks by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c>.

Level10.name: Thornwood Vine
Level10.shortText: Damages in a line
Level10.fullText: Send forth vines that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">184</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in a line.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Level10.name: Leaping Strike
Level10.shortText: Leap over enemies, damaging and Slowing
Level10.fullText: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.35 </c>seconds and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">271</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level13.name: Endless Spores
Level13.shortText: Nature's Toxin can reduce Crippling Spores cooldown
Level13.fullText: Casting Crippling Spores while at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Heroes are afflicted by Nature's Toxin reduces the cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and refunds <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Mana.

Level13.name: Let Them Wither
Level13.fullText: Increases Crippling Spores' Slow duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and causes it to no longer decay.

Level13.name: Greater Spell Shield
Level13.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

Level13.name: Abolish Magic
Level13.shortText: Remove crowd control from a target and Lunara
Level13.fullText: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level16.name: Accelerated Contamination
Level16.shortText: Noxious Blossom recharges faster
Level16.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Noxious Blossom from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c>. While at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> enemy Hero is afflicted with Nature's Toxin, Noxious Blossom's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> faster.

Level16.name: Star Wood Spear
Level16.shortText: Crippling Spores increases Basic Attack range
Level16.fullText: Increase Lunara's Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c>. Using Crippling Spores increases Lunara's Basic Attack range by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.25</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Invigorating Spores
Level16.shortText: Crippling Spores empowers Basic Attacks
Level16.fullText: Crippling Spores grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks of Nature's Toxin deal damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> of their maximum Health.

Level16.name: Unfair Advantage
Level16.shortText: Increases Nature's Toxin damage to disabled Heroes
Level16.fullText: Nature's Toxin deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> more damage to Heroes that are Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.

Level20.name: For the Wildlands
Level20.shortText: Thornwood Vine shoots in an arc
Level20.fullText: Thornwood Vine shoots <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> additional vines in an arc.

Level20.name: Boundless Stride
Level20.shortText: Leaping Strike can target allies
Level20.fullText: All Leaping Strike charges are returned every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. Leaping Strike can be used on allies.

Level20.name: Forest's Wrath
Level20.shortText: Heroic applies more Nature's Toxin, range increased
Level20.fullText: Lunara's Heroic Ability applies <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies, and its range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Lunara's vision radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>.

Level20.name: Intensifying Toxin
Level20.shortText: Increase Nature's Toxin damage
Level20.fullText: At <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks, Nature's Toxin deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more damage.

Level20.name: Galloping Gait
Level20.shortText: Activate to increase Movement Speed
Level20.fullText: Activate to increase the Movement Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

DVa.name: D.Va
DVa.title: MEKA Pilot
DVa.searchText: Dva Diva Hana Song Overwatch OW Human Stun Slow Offlaner
DVa.description: A hard-to-kill Bruiser that can peel enemies away from her allies with high disruption.
DVa.infoText: Hana Song, also known as "D.Va," is both a world champion professional gamer and a burgeoning global icon. As a member of South Korea’s elite MEKA unit, she fights to protect her homeland from the colossal omnic threat lurking within the East China Sea.

Basic.name: Boosters
Basic.shortText: Move fast and knockback enemies
Basic.fullText: Increase D.Va's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">115%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds. Enemies that are hit take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are knocked away. <n/><n/>D.Va cannot be Slowed while Boosters are active, and each enemy can only be hit once per use.

Basic.name: Defense Matrix
Basic.shortText: Reduce damage of enemy Heroes in an area
Basic.fullText: Project a defensive field in the target direction for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, reducing the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside it by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.<n/><n/>Activate again to change the angle of projection.<n/><n/>Damage dealt to the Mech from enemies within Defense Matrix still grants the same amount of Self-Destruct Charge.

Basic.name: Self-Destruct
Basic.shortText: Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct for massive damage
Basic.fullText: Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a large area, depending on distance from center. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage against Structures.<n/><n/><c val="FF8000">Gain </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c><c val="FF8000"> Charge for every </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c><c val="FF8000"> seconds spent Basic Attacking, and </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c><c val="FF8000"> Charge per </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c><c val="FF8000"> of Mech Health lost.</c>

Heroic.name: Bunny Hop
Heroic.shortText: Become Unstoppable and Stun nearby Heroes
Heroic.fullText: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">78</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a large area. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4th</c> consecutive hit on a Hero deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> more damage and Stuns them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Requires Mech Mode.

Heroic.name: Micro Missiles
Heroic.shortText: Fire a stream of missiles that damage and Slow
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">.375</c> seconds, Channel to launch a volley of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12 </c>missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a small area and Slowing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges with a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second cooldown between each use.<n/><n/>Requires Mech Mode.

Trait.name: Mech Mode
Trait.shortText: D.Va can eject from her Mech and continue to fight
Trait.fullText: When D.Va's Mech dies, she is ejected out after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and can continue to fight. D.Va's Mech only awards <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of a normal Hero's experience upon dying.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Fusion Cannons</s><n/><n/>D.Va's Mech Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">22</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a large area every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> bonus damage against enemies very close to the Mech.

Mount.name: Mechanized Walker
Mount.shortText: While in her Mech, D.Va can shoot while moving, but her Movement Speed is reduced.
Mount.fullText: D.Va's Mech can shoot while moving. While shooting or channeling an ability, the Mech's Movement Speed is quickly reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.shortText: Cancel Boosters
Basic.fullText: Cancel Boosters

Basic.shortText: Retarget Defense Matrix
Basic.fullText: Retarget Defense Matrix

Trait.shortText: Stop channeling Defense Matrix
Trait.fullText: Stop channeling Defense Matrix

Heroic.name: Bunny Hop
Heroic.shortText: Cancel Bunny Hop
Heroic.fullText: Cancel Bunny Hop

Activable.name: Liquid Cooling
Activable.shortText: Empower Healing Fountain in Mech Mode
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> seconds and its effects last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> longer.

Level1.name: Full Metal
Level1.shortText: Increase Mech Health, Fusion Cannons heal
Level1.fullText: D.Va's Mech gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> increased Health and its Fusion Cannons heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16%</c> of the damage dealt to enemies in its bonus area.

Level1.name: Pro Moves
Level1.shortText: Taking damage increases Move Speed, Armor
Level1.fullText: D.Va's Mech gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> Movement Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Armor every time it takes damage, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> times. Stacks of this effect decay every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes in Pilot Mode reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> additional second.

Level1.name: Liquid Cooling
Level1.shortText: Empower Healing Fountain in Mech Mode
Level1.fullText: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> seconds and its effects last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> longer.

Level4.name: Rush-down
Level4.shortText: Boosters steals Health, increase non-hero damage
Level4.fullText: Boosters deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2% </c>of maximum Health as damage to Heroes and heals D.Va's Mech for the damage dealt. Boosters deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> increased damage to non-Heroic enemies.

Level4.name: Aggression Matrix
Level4.shortText: Defense Matrix reduces healing, lower cooldown
Level4.fullText: Enemy Heroes within your Defense Matrix receive <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> less healing.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Defense Matrix by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.1875</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Nuclear Option
Level4.shortText: Empower Fusion Cannons and Self-Destruct
Level4.fullText: Hitting your self-destructing Mech with Big Shot causes it to self-destruct <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> When Fusion Cannons deal bonus damage to an enemy Hero, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> Self-Destruct Charge.

Level7.name: Get On The Point!
Level7.shortText: Reduce Boosters cooldown, grants allies move speed
Level7.fullText: Casting Boosters grants nearby allies <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>If D.Va has not taken damage in the last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Boosters' cooldown refreshes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.

Level7.name: Hit the Nitrous
Level7.shortText: Boosters give extra immediate speed, stuns
Level7.fullText: The initial speed bonus of Boosters is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300%</c>, then decays to normal boost speed over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. During this time, Boosters Stuns for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Fusion Generator
Level7.shortText: Defense Matrix adds Self-Destruct Charge
Level7.fullText: Every time an enemy Hero deals damage while inside Defense Matrix, D.Va's Self-Destruct Charge increases by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c>. Max of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Charge gained per use. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>While at full Self-Destruct charge, Fusion Cannons' bonus damage is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level10.name: Bunny Hop
Level10.shortText: Become Unstoppable and Stun nearby Heroes
Level10.fullText: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">78</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a large area. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4th</c> consecutive hit on a Hero deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> more damage and Stuns them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Requires Mech Mode.

Level10.name: Micro Missiles
Level10.shortText: Fire a stream of missiles that damage and Slow
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">.375</c> seconds, Channel to launch a volley of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12 </c>missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a small area and Slowing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges with a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> second cooldown between each use.<n/><n/>Requires Mech Mode.

Level13.name: Target Locked
Level13.fullText: Enemy Heroes that remain in your Defense Matrix for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> and their Movement Speed reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Good To Go
Level13.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Pilot Mode:</c> Unlocks the Torpedo Dash and Concussive Pulse abilities.<n/><n/><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Torpedo Dash:</c> Dash a short distance. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> second cooldown.<n/><n/><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Concussive Pulse:</c> Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> second cooldown.

Level13.name: Pew! Pew! Pew!
Level13.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Pilot Mode: </c>Instead of a single shot, Big Shot fires <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> shots over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Each shot deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> damage.

Level16.name: In For The Kill
Level16.shortText: Boosters grants a Shield, increases attack damage
Level16.fullText: Casting Boosters grants a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of maximum life for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. Each Enemy Hero hit by Boosters increases D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.

Level16.name: Diverting Power
Level16.shortText: Increase Defense Matrix area, adds healing
Level16.fullText: Defense Matrix's area grows drastically in size and each time it reduces damage dealt to Heroes D.Va's Mech is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">31</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Level16.name: Emergency Shielding
Level16.shortText: Mech gains a Shield instead of dying

Level20.name: Stop and Pop

Level20.fullText: Increase Bunny Hop's duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, and it does not decay while D.Va's Mech is stationary.

Level20.name: Timing Attack
Level20.shortText: Gain a charge, Hero hits reduce cooldown

Level20.name: Headshot!
Level20.shortText: Increase Big Shot damage, reduce cooldown

Level20.name: Ablative Armor
Level20.shortText: Heal for portion of Spell damage taken
Level20.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c> of Spell damage dealt to D.Va's Mech is returned as healing over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4 </c>seconds.

Basic.name: Torpedo Dash
Basic.shortText: Dash towards target location
Basic.fullText: Dash towards the target location, passing through enemies along the way.

Basic.name: Concussive Pulse
Basic.shortText: Damage and knockback nearby enemies

Basic.name: Call Mech
Basic.fullText: Call a new Mech and enter Mech Mode.<n/><n/>Basic Attacks lower this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds each.

Heroic.name: Big Shot
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in a line as a Pilot
Heroic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies in a line. Heroes hit have their Movement Speed Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. The cooldown of Call Mech is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds for each enemy Hero hit.<n/><n/>Requires Pilot Mode.

Trait.name: Pilot Mode
Trait.fullText: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. As a Pilot, D.Va only awards <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of a normal Hero's experience upon dying.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Self-Destruct
Activable.shortText: Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct for massive damage
Activable.fullText: Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a large area, depending on distance from center. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage against Structures.<n/><n/><c val="FF8000">Gain </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c><c val="FF8000"> Charge for every </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c><c val="FF8000"> seconds spent Basic Attacking, and </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c><c val="FF8000"> Charge per </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c><c val="FF8000"> of Mech Health lost.</c>

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

FaerieDragon.name: Brightwing
FaerieDragon.title: Faerie Dragon
FaerieDragon.searchText: Brightwing BW Sprite Darter Faerie Dragon WoW World of Warcraft Legion Heroes of the Storm Polymorph Displace Global Sustain Healer
FaerieDragon.description: A Healer who can teleport to allies, excelling on large battlegrounds.
FaerieDragon.infoText: Like many faerie dragons, Brightwing is happiest darting around the forests of Ashenvale, healing friends, and then grabbing a light snack. By the way, did you know a human head only weighs ten pounds? Talk about light!

Basic.name: Arcane Flare
Basic.shortText: Fire a damaging flare

If a Hero is hit by the center, Soothing Mist's passive healing instantly activates.

Basic.name: Polymorph

Heroic.name: Blink Heal

Heroic.name: Emerald Wind
Heroic.shortText: Damages and pushes enemies in area

Trait.name: Soothing Mist

Mount.name: Phase Shift

Hearth.name: Hearthstone

Heroic.name: Double Wyrmhole
Heroic.fullText: Teleport to a nearby ally, healing them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Activable.name: Pixie Charm

Level1.name: Pixie Charm

Level10.name: Blink Heal

Level10.name: Emerald Wind
Level10.shortText: Damages and pushes enemies in area
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, create an expanding nova of wind, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> </c>damage and pushing enemies away.

Level13.name: Pixie Boost

While Stealthed by Invisible Friends, Heroes heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> health per second.<n/><n/>Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

Level20.name: Faerie Protector

Falstad.name: Falstad
Falstad.title: Wildhammer Thane
Falstad.searchText: Falstad Gryphonrider Wildhammer Dwarf Alliance WoW World of Warcraft Cataclysm BFA Battle for Azeroth Slow Displace Global Mobile Mobility Escape
Falstad.description: An Assassin that can fly large distances, excelling on large battlegrounds.
Falstad.infoText: Falstad is the High Thane of the Wildhammer Clan and a founding member of the Council of Three Hammers that presides over Ironforge. Despite speculation, Falstad has never been dead and anyone who claims such is a liar.

Basic.name: Hammerang
Basic.shortText: Throw out a Hammer that returns and explodes
Basic.fullText: Throw out a Hammer that returns to Falstad, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Reactive to explode the Hammer, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">95</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.

Basic.name: Lightning Rod
Basic.shortText: Deal damage to target enemy while staying close to them

Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> increased damage to Minions and Mercenaries.

The cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds for every enemy Hero hit.

Mount.shortText: Instead of mounting, Falstad can fly a great distance over terrain
Mount.fullText: Instead of mounting, Falstad can fly a great distance over terrain.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Explode

Activable.name: Frequent Flyer

Level1.name: Gathering Storm
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Hammerang damage
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Hammerang. Restore 6 Mana for each Hero hit. Upon dying, Lose 8 stacks.Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals 30% more damage.Reward: After hitting 80 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 50% damage.Mythic Reward: After hitting 150 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 70% damage.

Level1.name: Dishonorable Discharge
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Lightning Rod damage, strikes

If a Hero dies under its effect, generate 2 stacks.Reward: After 20 stacks, its damage is increased by 30%.Reward: After 45 stacks, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and its damage is increased by an additional 75%.Mythic Reward: After 75 stacks, its number of strikes is increased by 2 and the final strike Stuns for 1.25 seconds.

Level1.name: Frequent Flyer

Hero Takedowns grant 5 stacks.Reward: After 60 stacks, gain 20 Attack Damage.Reward: After 150 stacks, gain 50 additional Attack Damage.Mythic Reward: After 300 stacks, gain 125 additional Attack Damage.

Level4.name: Updraft
Level4.shortText: Increases Barrel Roll range, Shield
Level4.fullText: Increases Barrel Roll's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> and Shield amount by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c>, and its Shield now lasts indefinitely.

Level4.name: Hammer Gains
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks heal
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage dealt to the primary target.

Level7.name: Secret Weapon
Level7.shortText: Increases Hammerang range, Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: Increases Hammerang's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> and Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> bonus damage while Hammerang is in flight.

Level7.name: BOOMerang
Level7.shortText: Increase Hammerang's explosion damage
Level7.fullText: Hammerang's explosion deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> additional damage, and hitting enemy Heroes reduces their Spell Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Thunderstrikes
Level7.shortText: Lightning Rod deals increasing damage
Level7.fullText: Lightning Rod deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage each subsequent strike.

Level10.name: Hinterland Blast
Level10.shortText: Long range damage beam
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">475</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4.75% per level)</c> damage to enemies within a long line. The cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds for every enemy Hero hit.

Level10.name: Mighty Gust
Level10.shortText: Push away enemies and slow them
Level10.fullText: Push enemies away, and Slow them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Charged Up
Level13.shortText: Increases Lightning Rod range, resets on takedown
Level13.fullText: Increases Lightning Rod range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. Hero Takedowns reset Lightning Rod's cooldown.

Level13.name: Flow Rider
Level13.fullText: While Tailwind is active, Falstad's Basic Abilities recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.

Level13.name: Sustained Winds
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> while Tailwind is active.

Level16.name: Crippling Hammer
Level16.shortText: Increases Hammerang Slow, explosion Slows
Level16.fullText: Increase Hammerang's Slow from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, and Hammerang's explosion also Slows.

Level16.name: Aerie Gusts
Level16.shortText: Reduce Tailwind delay, increase Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Reduces the activation time for Tailwind from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, and increases the Movement Speed bonus from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level16.name: Afterburner
Level16.shortText: Barrel Roll increases Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Barrel Roll increases Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Call of the Wildhammer
Level20.shortText: Increases Hinterland Blast range and damage
Level20.fullText: Hinterland Blast has double the range and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage.

Level20.name: Wind Tunnel
Level20.shortText: Mighty Gust constantly knocks back
Level20.fullText: Mighty Gust creates a wind tunnel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemies caught in the tunnel will periodically be pushed back.

Level20.name: Nexus Frenzy
Level20.shortText: Increases Attack Speed and Range
Level20.fullText: Increases Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and Attack Range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.1</c>.

Level20.name: Epic Mount
Level20.shortText: Reduces Flight cooldown and delay
Level20.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Flight by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> seconds, reduce the cast time before flying to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, and increase the speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Fenix.name: Fenix
Fenix.title: Steward of the Templar
Fenix.searchText: Fenix Dragoon Protoss SC SC1 StarCraft II 2 SC2 Brood War BW Mobile Mobility Shields Dive Escape Marksman
Fenix.description: A sustained damage Assassin with a regenerating Shield that enables him to efficiently duel his opponents.
Fenix.infoText: As one of the greatest heroes in protoss history, Fenix's deeds on the battlefield are legendary. After falling to the zerg during the invasion of Aiur, his body was recovered and implanted into a dragoon so he could continue to fight. Not even death can stop Fenix from achieving glory and valor.

Basic.name: Plasma Cutter
Basic.shortText: Summon a laser that circles Fenix, damaging and Slowing enemies
Basic.fullText: Create a laser beam at the target point that circles around Fenix twice, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon
Basic.shortText: Basic Attack speed increased
Basic.fullText: Basic Attack speed increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>.<n/><n/>Activate to change to <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb</c>, increasing Basic Attack range and damage, and causing Basic Attacks to splash.

Basic.name: Warp
Basic.shortText: Warp to a location
Basic.fullText: Warp to a targeted location, phasing out after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, and arriving <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds later.

Heroic.name: Planet Cracker
Heroic.shortText: Fire a laser across the battleground
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">112</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.

Heroic.name: Purification Salvo
Heroic.shortText: Fire a barrage of homing missiles
Heroic.fullText: Channel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> missiles at each locked Hero, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">79</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> increased damage to Slowed targets.

Trait.name: Shield Capacitor
Trait.shortText: Permanent Shield that regenerates out of combat
Trait.fullText: Fenix has a permanent <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">760</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield which regenerates at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per second after not taking damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Weapon Mode: Phase Bomb
Basic.shortText: Basic Attacks splash, deal more damage, have longer range
Basic.fullText: Basic Attacks have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> increased range, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage, and splash to nearby enemies.<n/><n/>Activate to change to <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Weapon Mode: Repeater Cannon</c>, increasing Basic Attack speed.

Heroic.name: Planet Cracker Cancel
Heroic.fullText: Cancel Planet Cracker

Trait.name: Shield Capacitor
Trait.shortText: Permanent Shield that regenerates out of combat
Trait.fullText: Fenix has a permanent <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">760</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield which regenerates at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per second after not taking damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Divert Power: Weapons
Activable.shortText: Activate to increase damage, lose Shield
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Basic Attack damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Basic Attacking a Hero refreshes this duration. Once Divert Power: Weapons ends, drain all of Shield Capacitor's Shields.

Activable.name: Unconquered Spirit
Activable.shortText: Fatal damage recharges Shield Capacitor
Activable.fullText: Upon taking fatal damage, Shield Capacitor regains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">800</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shields. This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c> second cooldown.

Level1.name: Advanced Targeting
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Plasma Cutter circles an additional time
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Plasma Cutter permanently increases Fenix's Basic Attack damage by 0.5, up to 60.Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Plasma Cutter circles an additional time.

Level1.name: Arsenal Synergy
Level1.shortText: Repeater Cannon empowers Phase Bomb
Level1.fullText: After hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times while Repeater Cannon is active, the next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> more damage and splashes in a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> larger area.

Level1.name: Mobile Offense
Level1.shortText: Movement empowers Basic Attacks
Level1.fullText: After moving, Fenix's next Basic Attack deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> more damage to Heroes.

Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks against Slowed Heroes with Repeater Cannon active grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level4.name: Inhibiting Energy

Level4.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, Fenix's next Basic Attack with Phase Bomb active Slows all enemies hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Emergency Protocol
Level4.shortText: Gain Move Speed, more when Shield depletes
Level4.fullText: While Fenix has shields from Shield Capacitor, he gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed. This bonus is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> when Fenix loses shields from Shield Capacitor.

Level7.name: Combat Advantage
Level7.shortText: Plasma Cutter deals more damage to Slowed targets
Level7.fullText: Plasma Cutter deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> more damage to Slowed targets.

Level7.name: Warp Warfare
Level7.shortText: Warp grants Attack Speed
Level7.fullText: After arriving with Warp, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds while in Repeater Cannon mode. Hero Takedowns reset Warp's cooldown.

Level7.name: Divert Power: Weapons
Level7.shortText: Activate to increase damage, lose Shield
Level7.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Basic Attack damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Basic Attacking a Hero refreshes this duration. Once Divert Power: Weapons ends, drain all of Shield Capacitor's Shields.

Level10.name: Purification Salvo
Level10.shortText: Fire a barrage of homing missiles
Level10.fullText: Channel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> missiles at each locked Hero, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">79</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> increased damage to Slowed targets.

Level10.name: Planet Cracker
Level10.shortText: Fire a laser across the battleground
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, Channel a powerful beam that spans across the battleground for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">112</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to non-Structure enemies hit.

Level13.name: Adanium Shell
Level13.fullText: After arriving with Warp, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Dampening Field
Level13.fullText: Fenix gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Spell Armor while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.

Level13.name: Rapid Recharge
Level13.fullText: The time before Shield Capacitor begins regenerating after taking damage is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Whenever Fenix is healed, Shield Capacitor's Shield recharges for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> of the healing received.

Level13.name: Auxiliary Shields
Level13.fullText: Permanently reduce Fenix's maximum Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> but increase Shield Capacitor's Shield by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. Basic Attacks regenerate Shields equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level16.name: Offensive Cadence
Level16.shortText: Successive Repeater Cannon attacks empowered
Level16.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack against Heroes while Repeater Cannon is active deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> of the target's maximum Health as damage.

Level16.name: Photonic Weaponry
Level16.shortText: Shield Capacitor increases damage dealt
Level16.fullText: Fenix deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage while he has a Shield from Shield Capacitor.

Level16.name: Arsenal Overcharge
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Ability cooldowns
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks with Repeater Cannon reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Basic Attacks with Phase Bomb active reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds per Hero hit.

Level20.name: Armageddon Beam
Level20.shortText: Increase Planet Cracker width, reduce cooldown
Level20.fullText: Planet Cracker's width increases by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Reduce Planet Cracker's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Secondary Fire
Level20.shortText: Plasma Cutter can fire Purification Salvo missiles
Level20.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plasma Cutter fires a Purification Salvo missile at them after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">79</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> increased damage to Slowed targets.

Level20.name: Singularity Charge
Level20.shortText: Increase Weapon Mode bonuses
Level20.fullText: Repeater Cannon grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more Attack Speed, and Phase Bomb grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> more range.

Level20.name: Unconquered Spirit
Level20.shortText: Fatal damage recharges Shield Capacitor
Level20.fullText: Upon taking fatal damage, Shield Capacitor regains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">800</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shields. This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c> second cooldown.

Firebat.name: Blaze
Firebat.title: Veteran Firebat
Firebat.searchText: Firebat Terran Heroes of the Storm Stun Slow CC Initiation Sustain Dive
Firebat.description: A ranged Tank that specializes in initiating fights and dealing area damage by spreading his flames.
Firebat.infoText: Cpl. Miles "Blaze" Lewis has always been drawn to the flame, but it wasn't until he joined up with Raynor's Raiders that he put his pyromania to good use. He's seen his fair share of battles since then, and has never failed to bring the heat.

Basic.name: Flame Stream
Basic.shortText: Fire two streams of flames
Basic.fullText: Fire two streams that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">76</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit, and an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to non-Structure enemies hit by both streams. Flame Stream Ignites Oil Spills it comes in contact with.

Basic.name: Oil Spill
Basic.shortText: Splash oil that Slows and can be Ignited to damage enemies and heal Blaze
Basic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Dispense a slick of oil that lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and Slows enemies that come in contact with it by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.<n/><n/>Oil Spills are Ignited for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds when hit by Flame Stream. Ignited Oil Spills no longer Slow enemies, but instead deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.3</c> seconds. Additionally, Blaze is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">49</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.3</c> seconds while standing in Ignited Oil Spills.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Basic.name: Jet Propulsion
Basic.shortText: Charge forward, Stunning and damaging enemy Heroes
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.375</c> seconds, charge forward. Colliding with an enemy Hero deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">52</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemy Heroes and Stuns them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Bunker Drop
Heroic.shortText: Call down a Bunker
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, deploy and enter a Bunker with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1435</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Blaze and his allies can enter and exit the Bunker at will. While in the Bunker, occupants gain access to Flamethrower, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line. <n/><n/>Exiting the Bunker grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Bunkers last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, or until destroyed.

Heroic.name: Combustion
Heroic.shortText: Channel to damage and Slow enemies
Heroic.fullText: Channel for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.6</c> seconds. Upon ending, Slow nearby enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">55</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Combustion's Slow and damage over time duration is extended the longer Blaze Channels, from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Blaze's Movement Speed is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> while Channeling.

Trait.name: Pyromania
Trait.shortText: Gain Armor and damage nearby enemies
Trait.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each Hero hit by Flame Stream reduces Pyromania's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Combustion Cancel
Heroic.fullText: Cancel Combustion.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Adrenaline Stimpack
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain Attack Speed, Move Speed
Activable.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> While over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> Health, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> bonus Movement Speed.<n/><n/>Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Endurance Stimpack
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain a Shield

Level7.name: Suppressive Fire

Level10.name: Bunker Drop

Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, deploy and enter a Bunker with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1435</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Blaze and his allies can enter and exit the Bunker at will. While in the Bunker, occupants gain access to Flamethrower, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line. <n/><n/>Exiting the Bunker grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Level13.name: Collision Course

Garrosh.name: Garrosh

Garrosh.searchText: Garosh WoW Orc Warchief Mists of Pandaria MoP Warlords of Draenor WoD Burning Crusade BC Hearthstone HS Wrath of the Lich King WotLK Cataclysm Horde Stun Slow CC Initiation Displace
Garrosh.description: A frontline Tank that enters the fray, trying to isolate a single opponent for elimination.
Garrosh.infoText: As the new warchief of the Horde, Garrosh is a proud and vicious warrior who rules with an iron fist. His hatred for the Alliance burns like wildfire, and he will stop at nothing to destroy them. By his axe, the orcs will reclaim their rightful glory.

Basic.name: Groundbreaker
Basic.shortText: Deal damage to enemies, can Stun them

Heroes hit on the outer edge are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds and then Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40% </c>for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Healing is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> against Heroes.

Greymane.name: Greymane
Greymane.title: Lord of the Worgen
Greymane.searchText: Greymane Genn GM Graymane Worgen Gilneas Alliance WoW World of Warcraft War2 WC2 Warcraft2 Tides of Darkness ToD II Cataclysm Legion BFA Battle for Azeroth Ganker Burst Dive Escape Camps Marksman
Greymane.description: A high damage Assassin that wears down enemies from afar and dives in for the kill.10 Armor (in Worgen Form)
Greymane.infoText: Like most Gilneans, Genn Greymane is afflicted by the worgen curse. Though he feels at fault for his people’s ill fate, he has embraced his inner beast without giving in to its feral nature. Now he leads his pack as both their alpha and their king.

Heroic.name: Go for the Throat

Heroic.fullText: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c>, slashing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">355</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds for free.

Heroic.name: Cursed Bullet
Heroic.shortText: Remove a portion of enemy's current Health
Heroic.fullText: Greymane shapeshifts into a <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c> and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of their current Health in damage.<n/><n/>Does not affect Vehicles.

Trait.name: Curse of the Worgen
Trait.shortText: Able to shapeshift between a Human and a Worgen
Trait.fullText: Greymane can use certain Abilities to shapeshift between a <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c> and a <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c>.<n/><n/>While <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c>, Greymane's Basic Attacks are ranged.<n/><n/>While <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c>, Greymane gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor, and his Basic Attacks become melee but deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more damage.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: Shapeshift into Human form and increase Greymane's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Inner Beast
Basic.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Basic Attacks refresh this duration, and reduce the cooldown of Inner Beast by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Razor Swipe
Basic.shortText: Swipe forward and damage enemies
Basic.fullText: Swipe in the targeted direction, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">126</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit.<n/><n/><c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human: Gilnean Cocktail</c><n/>Damage the first enemy hit and deal heavy damage behind them.

Basic.name: Disengage
Basic.shortText: Roll away and transform into a Human
Basic.fullText: Roll away and shapeshift into a <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c>.<n/><n/><c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human: Darkflight</c><n/>Leap at an enemy and shapeshift into a <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c>.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Level1.name: Wolfheart
Level1.shortText: Increase <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Armor, Inner Beast cooldown reduction
Level1.fullText: Increase the cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks during Inner Beast from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.2</c> seconds, and <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Form's Armor bonus from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c>.

Level1.name: Perfect Aim
Level1.shortText: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range and refunds Mana against Heroes
Level1.fullText: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> and refunds <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> Mana if it hits an enemy Hero.

Level1.name: Viciousness
Level1.shortText: Increases Inner Beast duration, Abilities refresh
Level1.fullText: Increases Inner Beast's duration to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, and causes Ability damage to also refresh its duration.

Level4.name: Thick Skin
Level4.shortText: Darkflight grants Physical Armor
Level4.fullText: Using Darkflight grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Physical Armor against the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Hero Basic Attacks while in <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Form, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level4.name: Eyes in the Dark
Level4.shortText: Disengage grants Stealth
Level4.fullText: Disengage grants Stealth for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Insatiable
Level4.shortText: Gain Mana, reduce Healing Fountain cooldown
Level4.fullText: Inner Beast causes Basic Attacks to restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Mana, and reduce the cooldown of Healing Fountain by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Quicksilver Bullets
Level7.shortText: Increases Human Basic Attack range
Level7.fullText: Increases Greymane's <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c> Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.1</c>.

Level7.name: Incendiary Elixir
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increases Gilnean Cocktail damage
Level7.fullText: Quest: Reduce the cooldown of Gilnean Cocktail by 2 seconds. Every time Greymane hits an enemy Hero with the explosion damage from Gilnean Cocktail, increase its explosion damage by 25, up to 375.Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, the cooldown is reduced by an additional 3 seconds.

Level7.name: Wizened Duelist
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Basic Attack Heroes to gain damage
Level7.fullText: Quest: Every 6 Human Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Basic Attack damage by 1%, up to 30%. Worgen Basic Attacks grant credit for 3 Basic Attacks. Half of this bonus is lost upon death.

Level10.name: Go for the Throat
Level10.shortText: Eviscerate a Hero, refresh cooldown if they die
Level10.fullText: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c>, slashing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">355</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds for free.

Level13.name: Running Wild

Level13.fullText: Increases Darkflight and Disengage's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>, and reduce their cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Unfettered Assault
Level13.shortText: Increases Razor Swipe range, reduces cooldown
Level13.fullText: Increases Razor Swipe's lunge distance by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>, and <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Basic Attacks reduce Razor Swipe's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: On the Prowl
Level13.fullText: Inner Beast increases Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> once it has been active for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Eager Wolf
Level16.shortText: Increases Inner Beast Attack Speed
Level16.fullText: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Inner Beast by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40% </c>after it has been active for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Lord of His Pack
Level16.shortText: Attacking disabled Heroes increases damage
Level16.fullText: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Greymane's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> while in <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Form.

Level16.fullText: <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.

Level20.name: Unleashed
Level20.shortText: Increase Go for the Throat damage, reset Ability cooldowns
Level20.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive</c>: Go For The Throat's damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.<n/><n/>If Go for the Throat kills its target, refund its Mana cost and reset the cooldowns of Greymane's Abilities.

Level20.name: Gilnean Roulette
Level20.shortText: Cursed Bullet deals less damage, lower cooldown
Level20.fullText: Cursed Bullet's damage is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of current health but its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">24</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Hunter's Blunderbuss
Level20.shortText: <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c> Basic Attacks splash
Level20.fullText: <c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Human</c> Basic Attacks splash for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage behind the target.

Level20.name: Tooth and Claw
Level20.shortText: Empower <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> form
Level20.fullText: <c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Worgen</c> Basic Attacks cleave for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage. Increase Razor Swipe's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Guldan.name: Gul'dan
Guldan.title: Darkness Incarnate
Guldan.searchText: Guldan Orc Mage Warlock War1 1 I War2 War3 WC1 WC2 WC3 Warcraft1 Warcraft2 Warcraft3 Warcraft 2 Tides of Darkness ToD II 2 III 3 Reign of Chaos RoC WoW World of Warcraft Burning Crusade BC Warlords of Draenor WoD Legion Horde Hearthstone HS Displace Sustain Clear Artillery
Guldan.description: A sustained damage Mage who uses his health as fuel but can steal life from his enemies.
Guldan.infoText: Abandoning the ways of shamanism, Gul'dan entered a pact with the demon lord Kil'jaeden and betrayed his people in exchange for limitless power. With the orcish Horde under his master's thrall, both Draenor and Azeroth nearly fell into his grasp.

Basic.name: Fel Flame
Basic.shortText: Release a wave of flame that damages enemies
Basic.fullText: Release a wave of flame, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">210</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies.

Basic.name: Drain Life
Basic.shortText: Drain Health from an enemy, dealing damage and healing Gul'dan
Basic.fullText: Drain the life from an enemy over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">132</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and healing Gul'dan for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">188</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.

Basic.name: Corruption

Corruption can stack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times on an enemy.

Heroic.name: Horrify

Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.

Heroic.name: Rain of Destruction
Heroic.shortText: Summon a rain of meteors in an area
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds. Each meteor deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a small area.

Trait.name: Life Tap
Trait.shortText: Restore Mana at the cost of Health
Trait.fullText: Gul'dan does not regenerate Mana.<n/><n/>Activate to restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of Gul'dan's Mana.

Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Level4.name: Health Funnel

Level4.fullText: Drain Life's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.

While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.

Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds. Each meteor deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in a small area.

Level13.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level13.name: Harvest Life

Level13.name: Dark Bargain
Level13.fullText: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> but his respawn time is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Healthstone

Level16.name: Rampant Hellfire
Level16.shortText: Increases Fel Flame's damage
Level16.fullText: Fel Flame's damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.

Level16.name: Ruinous Affliction
Level16.shortText: Corruption deals bonus damage
Level16.fullText: Corruption deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">242</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level16.name: Darkness Within

Level20.name: Haunt
