Level20.fullText: Increases the duration of Horrify by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, and while Feared, enemies lose <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Armor, causing them to take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> increased damage.

Level20.name: Deep Impact
Level20.shortText: Rain of Destruction slows enemy Movement Speed
Level20.fullText: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Demonic Circle
Level20.shortText: Summon a Demonic Circle that Gul'dan can teleport to
Level20.fullText: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.

Hanzo.name: Hanzo
Hanzo.title: Master Assassin
Hanzo.searchText: Human Overwatch OW Shimada Stun Mobility Escape Marksman
Hanzo.description: A ranged Assassin who specializes in scouting and taking out enemies from a distance.
Hanzo.infoText: Once heir to the Shimada clan's criminal empire, Hanzo abandoned his birthright after he almost killed his younger brother. He now strives to perfect his skills as a warrior, and sees the Nexus and its endless conflict as the ideal training ground.

Basic.name: Storm Bow
Basic.shortText: Charge up to fire a deadly arrow
Basic.fullText: Activate to charge an arrow that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">291</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit. Storm Bow's range increases the longer it is Channeled.

Basic.name: Scatter Arrow
Basic.shortText: Fire an arrow that ricochets and splits
Basic.fullText: Fire an arrow that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">88</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to the first enemy Hero hit. Scatter Arrow can collide with terrain and Structures, splitting into <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> arrows that travel extra distance, ricochet up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> additional times, and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">88</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each to the first enemy hit.

Basic.name: Sonic Arrow
Basic.shortText: Reveal a large area
Basic.fullText: Fire an arrow that grants vision in a large area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Enemies inside are revealed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. If Sonic Arrow lands directly on an enemy, it deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them and follows them as they move.

Heroic.name: Dragonstrike
Heroic.shortText: Summon a pair of Spirit Dragons to damage enemies
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> increased damage.

Heroic.name: Dragon's Arrow
Heroic.shortText: Fire a global arrow that Stuns, damages
Heroic.fullText: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">260</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and the Stun duration to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.<n/><n/>After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">390</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and the Stun duration to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Natural Agility
Trait.shortText: Jump over terrain
Trait.fullText: Jump over unpathable terrain or Structures, up to a maximum range.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Heroic.name: Play of the Game
Heroic.fullText: Activate to teleport to Hanzo's Dragon's Arrow.

Level1.name: Target Practice
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit all enemy Heroes to empower Storm Bow
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by 100.

Level1.name: Simple Geometry
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Gain additional Scatter Arrows
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast 20 times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.

Level1.name: Redemption
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit Heroes to gain Attack Speed
Level1.fullText: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within 10 seconds grants 1 Redemption, stacking up to 12. Dying decreases Redemption by 3, and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.Reward: At 12 Redemption, gain 50% Attack Speed.

Level4.name: Explosive Arrows
Level4.shortText: Storm Bow arrows explode on Minions, Monsters
Level4.fullText: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> of its damage to enemies around its target.

Level4.name: Serrated Arrows
Level4.shortText: Scatter Arrow deals more damage to non-Heroes
Level4.fullText: Scatter Arrow deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

Level4.name: Ignore All Distractions
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions, increase range
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: The Dragon Hungers
Level7.shortText: Storm Bow grants Spell Power
Level7.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level7.name: Never Outmatched
Level7.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Scatter Arrow cooldown
Level7.fullText: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Sharpened Arrowheads
Level7.shortText: Basic Attacks, Storm Bow reduce Armor
Level7.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, up to a maximum reduction of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Armor.

Level10.name: Dragonstrike
Level10.shortText: Summon a pair of Spirit Dragons to damage enemies
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> increased damage.

Level10.name: Dragon's Arrow
Level10.shortText: Fire a global arrow that Stuns, damages
Level10.fullText: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">260</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and the Stun duration to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.<n/><n/>After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">390</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and the Stun duration to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Fleet of Foot
Level13.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level13.name: Ninja Assassin
Level13.shortText: Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility cooldown
Level13.fullText: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.

Level13.name: Mounted Archery
Level13.shortText: Increase Mount Speed, Natural Agility mounts
Level13.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Upon mounting, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> additional Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.

Level16.name: Flawless Technique
Level16.shortText: Storm Bow, Basic Attacks empower each other
Level16.fullText: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level16.name: Piercing Arrows
Level16.shortText: Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow pierce
Level16.fullText: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> enemy each time it ricochets.

Level16.name: Giant Slayer
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks, Scatter Arrow deal bonus damage
Level16.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.6%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.

Level20.name: The Dragon Awakens
Level20.shortText: Abilities and Attacks reduce Dragonstrike cooldown
Level20.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Play of the Game
Level20.shortText: Activate to teleport to Dragon's Arrow
Level20.fullText: While in flight or for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">132</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to each target hit by the impact.<n/><n/>Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.

Level20.name: Bullseye
Level20.shortText: Sonic Arrow travels faster, Stuns
Level20.fullText: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Perfect Agility
Level20.shortText: Gain Natural Agility charge, cooldown reduced
Level20.fullText: Natural Agility gains a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Hogger.name: Hogger
Hogger.title: Scourge of Elwynn
Hogger.searchText: Gnoll Wow World of Warcraft Riverpaw pack Elwinn Forest Ball Chain Stun Slow CC Initiation Mobile Mobility Sustain Dive Escape Offlaner
Hogger.description: A chaotic Bruiser that deals heavy area damage and can create terrain.
Hogger.infoText: Once largely a threat to fledgling adventurers’ egos in Elwynn Forest, the Riverpaw gnoll Hogger has finally found a realm vast enough to sate his hunger… which is expanding to fill the space.

Basic.name: Staggering Blow
Basic.shortText: Knock enemies in an arc
Basic.fullText: Swing your chain in a wide arc, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. If an enemy hits terrain, deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, Stun for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Rage.

Basic.name: Ez-Thro Dynamite
Basic.shortText: Throw a bundle of Dynamite
Basic.fullText: Toss a bundle of Dynamite with a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second fuse. Upon detonation, enemies take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. <n/><n/>The Dynamite instantly detonates when landing on an enemy Hero granting Hogger <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Rage.

Basic.name: Hogg Wild
Basic.shortText: Rapidly spin, dealing damage
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds, become Unstoppable and uncontrollably spin towards the target direction, ricocheting off terrain. Ricocheting off terrain refreshes the duration.<n/><n/>Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.125</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">44</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby non-Structure enemies. Damage against Heroes is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">.5%</c> for each point of Rage.

Heroic.name: Hoardapult
Heroic.shortText: Launch Loot Hoard, Hogger
Heroic.fullText: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.

Heroic.name: Shockwave
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Stun in long line
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">335</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Loot Hoard
Trait.shortText: Create terrain and restore Health
Trait.fullText: Toss a pile of junk onto the battlefield, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">102</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area, knocking enemies away, and acting as terrain for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>When the Loot Hoard expires or is destroyed, a chunk of Meat falls out that can be picked up to restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of maximum Health every second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Reactivate to destroy Loot Hoard.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Cancel Hogg Wild
Basic.fullText: Stop spinning.

Heroic.name: Destroy Hoardapult
Heroic.shortText: Destroy Hoardapult's Loot Hoard
Heroic.fullText: Destroy Hoardapult's Loot Hoard.

Trait.name: Destroy Loot Hoard
Trait.shortText: Destroy Loot Hoard
Trait.fullText: Destroy Loot Hoard.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: On The Prowl
Activable.shortText: Periodically heal, activate to gain Rage
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Rage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> You heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health every second, increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> per point of Rage.

Activable.name: No Control
Activable.shortText: Chase enemies with Hogg Wild
Activable.fullText: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.<n/><n/>Cannot be cancelled.

Level1.name: Journeyman Cooking
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Ez-Thro Dynamite heals, increases Health
Level1.fullText: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by 10, to a maximum of 750 bonus Health.

Level1.name: Bones to Gnaw
Level1.shortText: Loot Hoard creates more Meat, gain Armor
Level1.fullText: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor.

Level1.name: On The Prowl
Level1.shortText: Periodically heal, activate to gain Rage
Level1.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Rage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> You heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health every second, increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> per point of Rage.

Level4.name: Brute Force
Level4.shortText: Increases Loot Hoard damage, range.<n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit Heroes with Staggering Blow.
Level4.fullText: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 25% and its damage by 50%.Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 2, to a maximum of 150 bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional 6 damage.

Level4.name: Aggro Range
Level4.shortText: Increase Hogg Wild radius, generates Rage
Level4.fullText: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and each enemy hit generates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> Rage, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> against Heroes.

Level4.name: Hogger's Joggers
Level4.shortText: Rage increases Move Speed, healing received
Level4.fullText: While above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30 </c>Rage, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> increased Movement Speed and healing received. <n/><n/>When at or above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50 </c>Rage, increase these bonuses to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level7.name: Dense Blasting Powder
Level7.shortText: Create more Ez-Thro Dynamite
Level7.fullText: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.<n/><n/>Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.

Level7.name: Garbage Fire
Level7.shortText: Loot Hoard deals area damage, Slows
Level7.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">23</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level7.name: Seeing Red
Level7.shortText: Rage empowers Basic Abilities, Basic Attacks
Level7.fullText: While above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50 </c>Rage, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> faster.

Level10.name: Hoardapult
Level10.shortText: Launch Loot Hoard, Hogger
Level10.fullText: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.

Level10.name: Shockwave
Level10.shortText: Damage and Stun in long line
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">335</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Dust Devil
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds after. When at or above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50 </c>Rage, increase this Armor to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c>.

Level13.name: Pummel
Level13.shortText: Hogg Wild Slows, reduces Spell Power
Level13.fullText: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times. <n/><n/>Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Bloodthirst
Level13.shortText: Basic Attacks and some Abilities heal
Level13.fullText: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level16.name: Headbanger
Level16.shortText: Increase Staggering Blow damage, Stun
Level16.fullText: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Kablooie!
Level16.shortText: Empower Ez-Thro Dynamite instant detonations
Level16.fullText: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, and increase its Slow amount to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level16.name: Furzerker
Level16.shortText: Empower Basic Attacks, increase Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.<n/><n/>When Hogg Wild ends, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Secret Stash
Level20.shortText: Loot Hoard launches Dynamite and Meat
Level20.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.<n/><n/>Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.

Level20.name: Power Spike
Level20.shortText: Shockwave reduces Armor, reduced cooldown
Level20.fullText: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Rage.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.

Level20.name: No Control
Level20.shortText: Chase enemies with Hogg Wild
Level20.fullText: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.<n/><n/>Cannot be cancelled.

Level20.name: Anger Management
Level20.shortText: Increase max Rage, increase Rage gains
Level20.fullText: Increase maximum Rage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c>, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> additional Rage.

Illidan.name: Illidan
Illidan.title: The Betrayer
Illidan.searchText: Illidan Ilidan Stormrage Demon Hunter DH Night Elf WoW World of Warcraft War3 WC3 Warcraft3 III 3 Reign of Chaos RoC Frozen Throne FT Burning Crusade BC Legion Stun Camps Sustain Dive Escape
Illidan.description: A mobile, sustained damage Assassin who pairs well with Heroes that can enable him.
Illidan.infoText: Illidan Stormrage, the first demon hunter, betrayed his people and created a new Well of Eternity after the demonic invasion of Azeroth. Now Illidan lords over Outland slaying unsuitably prepared Heroes who venture into his domain.

Basic.name: Dive
Basic.shortText: Dive and flip over an enemy
Basic.fullText: Dive at the target, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and flipping to the other side of the target.

Basic.name: Sweeping Strike
Basic.shortText: Dash and damage enemies while gaining Basic Attack damage
Basic.fullText: Dash towards target point, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">119</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies along the way. Hitting an enemy increases Illidan's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Evasion
Basic.shortText: Evade enemy Basic Attacks
Basic.fullText: Evade enemy Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: The Hunt
Heroic.shortText: Charge a target from a very long range
Heroic.fullText: Charge to target unit, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">251</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage on impact and stunning for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Heroic.name: Metamorphosis
Heroic.shortText: Damage area and increase max Health
Heroic.fullText: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">46</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Betrayer's Thirst
Trait.shortText: Basic Attacks heal for part of the damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns
Trait.fullText: Basic Attacks heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.fullText: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

Level1.name: Immolation

Level1.fullText: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">22</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Unending Hatred
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Killing enemies grants Basic Attack damage
Level1.fullText: Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 1 Basic Attack Damage.Reward: After gaining 20 increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional 20 Basic Attack Damage.

Level4.fullText: Using Dive grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Hero Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level4.name: Thirsting Blade
Level4.shortText: Sweeping Strike grants more Lifesteal
Level4.fullText: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.

Level4.name: Hunter's Onslaught
Level4.shortText: Damage from Basic Abilities heals
Level4.fullText: Basic Abilities heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.

Level7.name: Rapid Chase
Level7.shortText: Dive increases Move Speed, reduces cooldown
Level7.fullText: Dive grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level7.name: Friend or Foe
Level7.shortText: Increases Dive range and can Dive to allies
Level7.fullText: Increases the range of Dive by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.

Level7.name: Unbound
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Sweeping Strike can go over terrain
Level7.fullText: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.

Level10.name: Metamorphosis
Level10.shortText: Damage area and increase max Health
Level10.fullText: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">46</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds.

Level10.name: The Hunt
Level10.shortText: Charge a target from a very long range
Level10.fullText: Charge to target unit, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">251</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage on impact and stunning for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Nimble Defender
Level13.fullText: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level13.name: Elusive Strike
Level13.fullText: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.

Level13.name: Sixth Sense
Level13.fullText: While active, Evasion grants Illidan <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor against the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level16.name: Marked for Death
Level16.shortText: Repeated Dives deal extra damage
Level16.fullText: Dive deals an extra <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage if used consecutively on a target within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Fiery Brand

Level16.name: Blades of Azzinoth

Level20.name: Demonic Form
Level20.shortText: Demon form lasts forever, grants Attack Speed
Level20.fullText: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.

Level20.name: Nowhere to Hide
Level20.shortText: Increases The Hunt range and reveal low Health Heroes
Level20.fullText: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Health anywhere on the Battleground.

Level20.name: Nexus Blades
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks deal more damage and Slow
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Bolt of the Storm
Level20.shortText: Activate to teleport a short distance
Level20.fullText: Activate to teleport to a nearby location.

Imperius.name: Imperius
Imperius.title: Archangel of Valor
Imperius.searchText: Imperious Impirius Angel Archangel Diablo 3 III D3 Diablo3 Stun Initiation Offlaner
Imperius.description: An all-in Bruiser that leads the charge with strong initiation and single target damage.
Imperius.infoText: Leader of the Angiris Council and Aspect of Valor, Imperius has valiantly led the armies of the High Heavens to innumerous victories over the demons of the Burning Hells. While his methods are exact and severe, there is no greater defender of righteousness in the entirety of creation.

Basic.name: Celestial Charge
Basic.shortText: Charge forward and Stun enemies
Basic.fullText: Lunge towards a targeted direction and stab, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. If an enemy Hero is hit, Channel to Stun for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> additional damage when it fully finishes.

Basic.name: Solarion's Fire
Basic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Release a fiery wave that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Enemies hit by the center take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> bonus damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Molten Armor
Basic.shortText: Burn nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Shroud Imperius in flames for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, striking a nearby enemy for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">19</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds. Imperius heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage dealt, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> against Heroes. Strikes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional targets if no Heroes are in range, and restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Mana for each strike on expiration.

Heroic.name: Angelic Armaments
Heroic.shortText: Gain a large Shield, reactivate to damage
Heroic.fullText: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">850</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds to launch <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> swords toward an area, each dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit.

Heroic.name: Wrath of the Angiris
Heroic.shortText: Ascend with an enemy into the Heavens
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.<n/><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them, increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Basic Attacks consume the target's marks, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus damage per mark and healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> per mark.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Level1.fullText: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.

Level4.name: Sovereign Armor

Level4.fullText: Molten Armor grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Molten Armor extends the duration of this Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Battle Hunger

Level7.fullText: Activate to reset Imperius's Basic Attack cooldown and cause the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> Basic Attacks within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds to cleave for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> additional damage.

Level10.name: Angelic Armaments

Level10.fullText: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">850</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds to launch <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> swords toward an area, each dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit.
