Level10.shortText: Ascend with an enemy into the Heavens
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.<n/><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them, increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Pathetic Mortals
Level13.shortText: Celestial Charge reduces Move Speed, damage
Level13.fullText: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and their damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Divine Rage
Level13.shortText: Valorous Brand reduces Molten Armor cooldown
Level13.fullText: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark reduces the cooldown of Molten Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Heat of Battle
Level13.shortText: Molten Armor heals more against Heroes
Level13.fullText: Increase Molten Armor's healing against Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> for every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> Health Imperius is missing.

Level16.name: Celestial Swiftness
Level16.shortText: Celestial Charge grants Attack and Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds for each Hero Stunned with Celestial Charge.

Level16.name: Melting Touch
Level16.shortText: Molten Armor marks lower Armor
Level16.fullText: Consuming a Molten Armor mark reduces the target's Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Valorous Pursuit
Level16.shortText: Teleport to enemies marked by Valorous Brand
Level16.fullText: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Heavenly Host
Level20.shortText: Allied Heroes gain a weaponized Shield
Level20.fullText: Shields granted by Angelic Armaments no longer expire, and on initial activation, nearby allied Heroes gain a Shield that absorbs <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">600</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/>If a Shield granted to an allied Hero lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, it fires <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> sword at a nearby enemy, prioritizing closest Heroes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level20.name: Unrelenting Descent
Level20.shortText: Wrath of the Angiris heals, reduced cooldown
Level20.fullText: Descending from the Heavens restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Molten Wrath
Level20.shortText: Molten Armor always hits extra targets
Level20.fullText: Molten Armor's radius is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>, and it always strikes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional targets, even if there are Heroes in range.

Level20.name: Brand of Solarion
Level20.shortText: Valorous Brand no longer consumed
Level20.fullText: Reduce the duration of Valorous Brand to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, but it is no longer consumed when triggered.

Level20.name: Impervious
Level20.shortText: Activate to gain Unstoppable and Spell Armor
Level20.fullText: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Jaina.name: Jaina
Jaina.title: Archmage
Jaina.searchText: Jaina Proudmoore Human Mage Theramore Alliance WoW World of Warcraft War3 WC3 Warcraft3 III 3 Reign of Chaos RoC Frozen Throne FT Burning Crusade BC Wrath Lich King WotLK Cataclysm Mists of Pandaria MoP Warlords Draenor WoD Legion Hearthstone HS dreadlord? dread lord? BFA Battle for Azeroth Ice Frost Slow Root Burst Clear
Jaina.description: A frost Mage that can slow the entire enemy team.
Jaina.infoText: Once the apprentice of the Archmage Antonidas, Jaina Proudmoore led the survivors of Lordaeron to Kalimdor and founded the city of Theramore. Now, she serves the Alliance as a powerful voice fighting for reason and diplomacy.

Basic.name: Frostbolt
Basic.shortText: Shoot a bolt that deals damage and Chills the target
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">184</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Chill the target.

Basic.name: Blizzard
Basic.shortText: Creates a storm of ice at target location, damaging and slowing enemies
Basic.fullText: Bombard an area with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> waves of ice, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">142</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each. Damaged enemies are Chilled.

Basic.name: Cone of Cold
Basic.shortText: Deal damage in a cone and Chill targets
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Chill targets.

Heroic.name: Summon Water Elemental
Heroic.shortText: Summon a Water Elemental that Chills enemies
Heroic.fullText: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">62</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, splash for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">32</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Ring of Frost
Heroic.shortText: Create a ring that damages and Roots enemies
Heroic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Roots enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. The ring persists for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.

Trait.name: Frostbite
Trait.shortText: Jaina's Abilities Chill targets, slowing them and causing them to take more damage
Trait.fullText: Jaina's Abilities Chill targets, Slowing them by 25% and amplifying damage taken from her Abilities by 50%. Lasts 4 seconds.Quest: Deal Ability damage to Chilled Heroes.Reward: Upon dealing 12000 damage, unlock the Improved Ice Block Ability, allowing Jaina to become temporarily Invulnerable.Mythic Reward: Upon dealing 30000 damage, Ice Block upgrades to Ice Cold, allowing Jaina to move and cast while active.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Improved Ice Block
Activable.shortText: Gain Invulnerability and Chill enemies
Activable.fullText: Activate to place Jaina in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. When this effect expires, nearby enemies are Chilled.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Command Water Elemental
Heroic.fullText: Wills the Water Elemental to attack an enemy or move to an area.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Cancel Improved Ice Block
Activable.fullText: <n/><s val="8783e6" hlt-name="StandardTooltip">Cancel Improved Ice Block, removing the Stasis and Invulnerability and Chilling nearby enemies.</s>

Activable.name: Icy Veins
Activable.shortText: Reduce cooldowns and Mana costs
Activable.fullText: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> faster and reduce their Mana cost by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Ice Blink
Activable.shortText: Activate to teleport and Chill nearby enemies
Activable.fullText: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.

Level1.name: Winter's Reach
Level1.shortText: Increase Frostbolt range, travel speed
Level1.fullText: Increase the range and travel speed of Frostbolt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level1.name: Lingering Chill
Level1.shortText: Increase Chill duration
Level1.fullText: Increase the duration of Chill from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Fingers of Frost
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes increase Mana Regeneration
Level1.fullText: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to increase Jaina's Mana regeneration by 0.1 per second, up to 2 per second. Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, the damage bonus from Frostbite is increased by 10%.

Level4.name: Frost Shards
Level4.shortText: Frostbolt pierces first two targets
Level4.fullText: Frostbolt will now pierce the first two targets.

Level4.name: Arcane Intellect
Level4.shortText: Damage to Chilled targets returns Mana
Level4.fullText: Dealing damage to a Chilled target returns Mana to Jaina. Basic Attacks return <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Mana and Abilities return <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>While above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Mana, Jaina gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Spell Power.

Level4.name: Frost Armor
Level4.shortText: Chill attackers and gain Physical Armor
Level4.fullText: Enemies that attack Jaina are Chilled. Additionally, every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, Jaina gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level7.name: Ice Lance
Level7.shortText: Reduce Frostbolt cooldown on Chilled targets
Level7.fullText: Hitting a Chilled target with Frostbolt reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Mana.

Level7.name: Ice Floes
Level7.shortText: Increase Cone of Cold area, reduce cooldown
Level7.fullText: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, doubled against chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds per use.

Level7.name: Icefury Wand
Level7.shortText: Increase Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: Basic Attacks against Chilled enemies deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and lower the cooldown of Blizzard by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds. Doubled against enemy Heroes.

Level10.name: Ring of Frost
Level10.shortText: Create a ring that damages and Roots enemies
Level10.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Roots enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. The ring persists for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.

Level10.name: Summon Water Elemental
Level10.shortText: Summon a Water Elemental that Chills enemies
Level10.fullText: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">62</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, splash for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">32</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Storm Front
Level13.shortText: Increase Blizzard cast range and radius
Level13.fullText: Increase the cast range of Blizzard by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and its radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level13.name: Ice Barrier
Level13.fullText: Gain a Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of Ability damage dealt to Chilled targets. The shield lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Icy Veins
Level13.fullText: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> faster and reduce their Mana cost by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Snowstorm
Level16.shortText: Increase Blizzard damage
Level16.fullText: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. The damage of the third wave is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level16.name: Northern Exposure
Level16.shortText: Cone of Cold lowers Armor
Level16.fullText: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, increasing their damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level16.name: Numbing Blast
Level16.shortText: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets
Level16.fullText: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Cold Snap
Level20.shortText: Ring of Frost center deals damage, Roots
Level20.fullText: The center area of Ring of Frost deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Roots enemies after the outer ring expires. Each enemy Hero hit reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Wintermute
Level20.shortText: Increase cast range and mimics Basic Abilities
Level20.fullText: Increases the cast range of Water Elemental by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, and the Water Elemental will now mimic Jaina's Basic Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> damage.

Level20.name: Ice Blink
Level20.shortText: Activate to teleport and Chill nearby enemies
Level20.fullText: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.

Level20.name: Deep Chill
Level20.shortText: Chill Slow stacks
Level20.fullText: Frostbite's Chill can now stack a second time, slowing targets up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Junkrat.name: Junkrat
Junkrat.title: Junker Demolitionist
Junkrat.searchText: Junker Junkdude Grenademans Human Overwatch OW Jamison Fawkes Junk Rat Sustain Displace Escape Marksman
Junkrat.description: A mobile Assassin that bombards the enemy from afar, and sows chaos with traps and mines.
Junkrat.infoText: The destruction of the Australian omnium left the area an irradiated waste and survivors like Jamison Fawkes were greatly affected by radiation. Now as the explosive-obsessed criminal Junkrat, he is renowned for leaving havoc and bedlam in his wake.

Basic.name: Frag Launcher
Basic.shortText: Launch a bouncing grenade
Basic.fullText: Launch a grenade that explodes at the end of its path or upon hitting an enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">124</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. Grenades can ricochet off of terrain. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> less damage to Structures.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> charges. Frag Launcher's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.

Basic.name: Concussion Mine
Basic.shortText: Place a mine that can be detonated
Basic.fullText: Place a mine on the ground. Junkrat's Trait can be activated to detonate the mine, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.<n/><n/>Limit <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> active mine.

Basic.name: Steel Trap
Basic.shortText: Place a trap that Roots enemies
Basic.fullText: Place a trap on the ground that arms after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy that walks over it and Roots them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Limit <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> active trap.

Heroic.name: RIP-Tire
Heroic.shortText: Create a motorized bomb that explodes
Heroic.fullText: Create a motorized bomb with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">530</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.<n/><n/>RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">720</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">445</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to enemies on the edge.

Heroic.name: Rocket Ride
Heroic.shortText: Launch into the air, damaging enemies upon landing
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.<n/><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.75</c> seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">935</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> additional Movement Speed until dismounted.

Trait.name: Total Mayhem
Trait.shortText: Drop grenades upon death
Trait.fullText: Upon dying, drop <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> grenades that explode after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, each dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> less damage to Structures.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Detonate Mine</s><n/><n/>Detonate an active Concussion Mine.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Trait.name: Detonate Mine
Trait.shortText: Detonate the Concussion Mine
Trait.fullText: Detonate the planted Concussion Mine, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.

Basic.name: Jump!
Basic.shortText: Jump!
Basic.fullText: Activate to make the RIP-Tire jump. Can be used to pass over terrain and Structures.

Heroic.name: Detonate RIP-Tire
Heroic.shortText: Instantly destroy the RIP-Tire
Heroic.fullText: Instantly detonate the RIP-Tire, knocking nearby enemies back, and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">720</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">445</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to enemies on the edge.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Dirty Trickster
Activable.shortText: Trigger Total Mayhem more often
Activable.fullText: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> grenades at his feet that explode. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> second cooldown.

Activable.name: Spread Volley
Activable.fullText: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> Movement Speed.

Level1.name: Tricky Shuffles
Level1.shortText: Gain Move Speed while Frag Launcher replenishes
Level1.fullText: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> bonus damage.

Level1.name: Extra-Wound Timers
Level1.shortText: Frag Launcher grenades deal bonus damage
Level1.fullText: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds before automatically detonating.

Level1.name: Blow 'Em Up!
Level1.shortText: Concussion Mine and Steel Trap increase damage
Level1.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Taste For Explosions
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Frag Launcher damage
Level4.fullText: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.

Level4.name: BOOM POW
Level4.shortText: Hitting Heroes reduces Concussion Mine cooldown
Level4.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Chattering Teeth
Level4.shortText: Steel Traps chase Heroes
Level4.fullText: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.

Level7.name: Bogged Down
Level7.shortText: Concussion Mine Slows
Level7.fullText: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds upon landing.

Level7.name: Sticky Wicket
Level7.shortText: Steel Trap Silences Heroes
Level7.fullText: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Dirty Trickster
Level7.shortText: Trigger Total Mayhem more often
Level7.fullText: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> grenades at his feet that explode. <n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> second cooldown.

Level10.name: RIP-Tire
Level10.shortText: Create a motorized bomb that explodes
Level10.fullText: Create a motorized bomb with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">530</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.<n/><n/>RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">720</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">445</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to enemies on the edge.

Level10.name: Rocket Ride
Level10.shortText: Launch into the air, damaging enemies upon landing
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.<n/><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.75</c> seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">935</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> additional Movement Speed until dismounted.

Level13.name: Bombs Away
Level13.fullText: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>. Frag Launcher grenades fired within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds of using a Basic Attack deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> bonus damage.

Level13.name: Ripper Air
Level13.fullText: Junkrat is knocked back <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds if only Junkrat is hit.

Level13.name: Gotta Trap 'Em All!
Level13.fullText: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c>.

Level13.name: Big As
Level13.fullText: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level16.name: Burst Fire
Level16.shortText: Frag Launcher burst fires
Level16.fullText: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, but it loses <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> maximum charge.

Level16.name: Endless Nades
Level16.shortText: Hitting Heroes reduces Frag Launcher cooldown
Level16.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Spread Volley
Level16.shortText: Activate to make Frag Launcher spread
Level16.fullText: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.

Level20.name: Extra Oomph
Level20.shortText: Increase RIP-Tire knockback, reduce cooldown
Level20.fullText: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>, and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> seconds for each enemy Hero hit.

Level20.name: Puckish Scamp
Level20.shortText: Also gain RIP-Tire
Level20.fullText: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Cannonball!
Level20.shortText: Bigger Basic Attack, Frag Launcher explosions
Level20.fullText: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: I Hate Waiting!
Level20.shortText: Ride Junkrat's Rocket!
Level20.fullText: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Kaelthas.name: Kael'thas
Kaelthas.title: The Sun King
Kaelthas.searchText: Kael'thas Kaelthas KT Prince Sunstrider Mage Blood Elf WoW World of Warcraft War3 WC3 Warcraft3 III 3 Frozen Throne FT Burning Crusade BC Fire Stun Clear Burst
Kaelthas.description: A fire Mage that punishes enemies that stay close together.
Kaelthas.infoText: Like all Blood Elves, Prince Kael'thas was transformed by the fall of Quel'Thalas. Desperate to save his people from being consumed by their magical addiction, he joined forces with the Burning Legion and now lords over Tempest Keep.

Basic.name: Flamestrike
Basic.shortText: Deal damage in an area
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">345</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area. <n/><n/><c val="ff00">Verdant Spheres</c> increases the radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Basic.name: Living Bomb
Basic.shortText: Damage an enemy over time, eventually exploding in an area around them
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">126</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds to an enemy, then they explode dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">215</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies.  Other Heroes damaged by this explosion are also affected by Living Bomb, though the secondary explosions cannot spread.<n/><n/><c val="ff00">Verdant Spheres</c> makes this Ability cost no Mana and have no cooldown.

Basic.name: Gravity Lapse
Basic.shortText: Stun an enemy
Basic.fullText: Stun the first enemy hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. <n/><n/><c val="ff00">Verdant Spheres</c> causes Gravity Lapse to stun the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> enemies hit and increases the stun duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Heroic.name: Pyroblast
Heroic.shortText: Blast an enemy with a big fireball
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">810</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to an enemy Hero and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">405</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to enemies nearby.

Heroic.name: Phoenix
Heroic.shortText: Summon a Phoenix to burn enemies
Heroic.fullText: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds, attacking enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and splashing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">42</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Trait.name: Verdant Spheres
Trait.shortText: Make Kael'thas's next Basic Ability more powerful
Trait.fullText: Activate to make Kael'thas's next Basic Ability more powerful.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Phoenix Retarget
Heroic.fullText: Send the Phoenix to a different area.

Trait.name: Verdant Spheres Active
Trait.fullText: Kael'thas's next Basic Ability is more powerful

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Arcane Barrier
Activable.shortText: Gain a Shield based on maximum Mana
Activable.fullText: Gain a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of Kael'thas's maximum Mana for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Convection
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Flamestrike hits increase damage
Level1.fullText: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.

Level1.name: Fel Infusion
Level1.shortText: Increases Spell Power, Verdant Spheres heals
Level1.fullText: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c>. Kael'thas heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">94</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health when activating Verdant Spheres.

Level1.name: Mana Addict
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes grant Arcane Barrier
Level1.fullText: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.

Level4.name: Nether Wind
Level4.shortText: Increases Gravity Lapse range and restores Mana
Level4.fullText: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c> Mana.

Level4.name: Energy Roil
Level4.shortText: Reduce Gravity Lapse cooldown on Heroes
Level4.fullText: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70.</c> If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Mana Tap
Level4.shortText: Verdant Spheres restores Mana
Level4.fullText: Activating Verdant Spheres restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.

Level7.name: Burned Flesh
Level7.shortText: Empower Flamestrike against multiple Heroes
Level7.fullText: When Flamestrike damages <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of their maximum Health.

Level7.name: Sun King's Fury
Level7.shortText: Living Bomb deals more damage after spreading
Level7.fullText: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> more damage.

Level7.name: Sunfire Enchantment
Level7.shortText: Special attack on Verdant Spheres
Level7.fullText: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Basic Attacks to instead deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">115</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain<c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> 15%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Phoenix
Level10.shortText: Summon a Phoenix to burn enemies
Level10.fullText: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds, attacking enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and splashing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">42</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level10.name: Pyroblast
Level10.shortText: Blast an enemy with a big fireball
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">810</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to an enemy Hero and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">405</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to enemies nearby.

Level13.name: Pyromaniac
Level13.shortText: Living Bomb reduces Basic Ability cooldowns
Level13.fullText: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Backdraft
Level13.fullText: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Fission Bomb
Level13.fullText: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level16.name: Fury of the Sunwell
Level16.shortText: Flamestrike explodes twice
Level16.fullText: Flamestrike will explode a second time <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds later.

Level16.name: Ignite
Level16.shortText: Flamestrike applies Living Bomb
Level16.fullText: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.

Level16.name: Twin Spheres
Level16.shortText: Gain level 7 talents, Verdant Spheres charge
Level16.fullText: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Kael'thas benefits from all of his level <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> talents.

Level20.name: Rebirth
Level20.shortText: Increases Phoenix duration and may retarget
Level20.fullText: Increases Phoenix duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Level20.name: Presence Of Mind
Level20.shortText: Increases Pyroblast radius, lowers cooldown
Level20.fullText: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Master of Flames
Level20.shortText: Living Bomb spreads indefinitely
Level20.fullText: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.

Level20.name: Flamethrower
Level20.shortText: Increases Flamestrike's range
Level20.fullText: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. If Flamestrike hits <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

KelThuzad.name: Kel'Thuzad
KelThuzad.title: Archlich of Naxxramas
KelThuzad.searchText: KT Kelthuzad Mage undead WC3 Reign of Chaos Frozen Throne FT WoW Wrath WotLK Wrath of the Lich King Warcraft3 Warcraft III 3 War3 Ice Frost Stun Slow Initiation Burst Artillery
KelThuzad.description: A burst damage Mage that locks down enemies and devastates them with powerful combos.
KelThuzad.infoText: Kel'Thuzad has faithfully served the Lich King both in life and after death. Reanimated as the Archlich of the Scourge and given domain of the Dread Necropolis, Naxxramas, Kel’Thuzad remains Arthas’s most trusted advisor and master of the cold dark.

Basic.name: Death and Decay
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies and create a damaging pool
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, launch an orb that explodes upon hitting an enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area. The explosion leaves behind a pool of decay that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">82</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds to enemies.

Basic.name: Frost Nova
Basic.shortText: Damage and disable enemies
Basic.fullText: Create a nova that explodes after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies inside and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. Enemies in the center are Rooted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Basic.name: Chains of Kel'Thuzad
Basic.shortText: Pull enemy Heroes together
Basic.fullText: Launch a chain, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">97</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy Hero hit. For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after hitting an enemy, Chains can be reactivated to launch to an additional enemy, pulling both enemies together and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Frost Blast
Heroic.shortText: Root and damage enemies around a target
Heroic.fullText: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">115</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to its target and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Shadow Fissure
Heroic.shortText: Deal high damage in an area
Heroic.fullText: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">320</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Master of the Cold Dark
Trait.shortText: Kel'Thuzad becomes increasingly stronger as he disrupts enemies
Trait.fullText: Quest: Gain 1 Blight every time a Hero is Rooted by Frost Nova or hit by Chains of Kel'Thuzad.Reward: After gaining 15 Blight, gain the Glacial Spike Ability.Reward: After gaining 30 Blight, gain 75% Spell Power.Blight: 0/30

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Glacial Spike
Activable.shortText: Create a spike that explodes, deals damage
Activable.fullText: Activate to create a spike that detonates after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. The spike can be affected by Chains of Kel'Thuzad.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Chains of Kel'Thuzad
Basic.fullText: Launch a new chain from the currently chained enemy. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">97</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage upon impacting a Hero and pulls both enemies together.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Armor of the Archlich
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain Physical Armor, Slow enemies
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Physical Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Phylactery of Kel'Thuzad
Activable.fullText: Can be activated while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms, but must be charged again.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Kel'Thuzad heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.

Activable.name: Shifting Malice
Activable.shortText: Activate to dash and deal damage
Activable.fullText: Activate to dash forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.

Activable.name: The Damned Return
Activable.shortText: Create Shades that mimic Death and Decay
Activable.fullText: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.

Level1.name: The Plaguelands
Level1.shortText: Increase Death and Decay duration, radius
Level1.fullText: Increase Death and Decay's duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. After gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Blight, increase the radius of Death and Decay's pool by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level1.name: Blighted Frost
Level1.shortText: Increase Frost Nova center damage, duration
Level1.fullText: Frost Nova deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> more damage to enemies in the center. After gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Blight, increase Frost Nova's Root duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Barbed Chains
Level1.shortText: Chains deals more damage, reduces Armor
Level1.fullText: Increase Chains of Kel'Thuzad damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c>. After gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Blight, Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces the Armor of pulled Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Strip Shields
Level4.shortText: Chains grants Shield, damages Shields
Level4.fullText: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad grants Kel'Thuzad a permanent <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.<n/><n/>Additionally, Chains of Kel'Thuzad deals up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">270</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> bonus damage to Heroes' Shields.

Level4.name: Phylactery of Kel'Thuzad
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Collect Regen Globes for instant respawn
Level4.fullText: Quest: Collect 12 Regeneration Globes to charge Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery.Reward: Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery can be activated while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms, but must be charged again.Passive: Kel'Thuzad heals for 10% of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.

Level4.name: Armor of the Archlich
Level4.shortText: Activate to gain Physical Armor, Slow enemies
Level4.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Physical Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Accelerated Decay
Level7.shortText: Death and Decay damage increases
Level7.fullText: Each time a Hero is hit by Death and Decay's pool, they take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> more periodic damage from Death and Decay for the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> times.

Level7.name: Chilling Touch
Level7.shortText: Basic Attacks periodically deal area Spell damage
Level7.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, Kel'Thuzad's next Basic Attack hits all enemies in the area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>  additional damage, deals Spell damage instead of Physical, and Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Ice Cold
Level7.shortText: Reduce cooldown of Glacial Spike
Level7.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Glacial Spike by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds and increase its damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400%</c>.

Level10.name: Frost Blast
Level10.shortText: Root and damage enemies around a target
Level10.fullText: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">115</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to its target and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">275</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Shadow Fissure
Level10.shortText: Deal high damage in an area
Level10.fullText: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">320</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Icy Grasp
Level13.shortText: Increase Frost Nova Slow, reduce cooldown
Level13.fullText: Increase Frost Nova's Slow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. Each time Kel'Thuzad damages enemies Slowed by Frost Nova, reduce the cooldown of Frost Nova by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Chains of Ice
Level13.fullText: After Chains of Kel'Thuzad's Stun expires, the enemy is also Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Chain-Link
Level13.fullText: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and refunds its Mana cost.

Level16.name: Arcane Echoes

Level16.fullText: Whenever Kel'Thuzad hits an enemy Hero with Death and Decay's explosion, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Hungering Cold

Level16.fullText: Enemies that are Rooted take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">55</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage each time they are damaged by Kel'Thuzad.

Level16.name: Power of Icecrown

Level16.fullText: Stunning, Rooting, or Slowing a Hero grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.

Level20.name: Deathchill

Level20.fullText: When Frost Blast's Root expires, enemies are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Heroes killed while under the effects of Frost Blast instantly release another Frost Blast explosion.

Level20.name: Might of the Scourge

Level20.fullText: If a Hero is hit with Shadow Fissure, a second one is cast below them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second later. This second cast will not duplicate itself.

Level20.name: Shifting Malice
Level20.shortText: Activate to dash and deal damage
Level20.fullText: Activate to dash forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+2.5% per level)</c> damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.

Level20.name: The Damned Return
Level20.shortText: Create Shades that mimic Death and Decay
Level20.fullText: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.

Kerrigan.name: Kerrigan
Kerrigan.title: Queen of Blades
Kerrigan.searchText: Kerrigan Karrigan Kerigan Sarah Swarm Queen Blades Zerg HotS Heart of the Swarm StarCraft II 2 SC2 Brood War BW LotV Legacy Void Wings Liberty WoL SC 1 SC1 Star2 Starcraft2 Stun Initiation Displace Ganker Shields Dive Escape Burst Roam Infested
Kerrigan.description: A combo Assassin who goes all in, diving into the enemy team.
Kerrigan.infoText: Once a terran ghost with formidable psionic abilities, Sarah Kerrigan was betrayed by her allies and transformed into the Queen of Blades. Now freed of the dark one's corruption, Kerrigan faces a threat that could destroy the galaxy itself.

Basic.name: Ravage
Basic.shortText: Leap to an enemy and deal damage
Basic.fullText: Leap to a target, dealing 115 (+4% per level) damage. If the enemy dies within 0.75 seconds, restore 1 charge and refund 20 Mana.Quest: Kill enemies within a short distance of Kerrigan. Minions grant 1 stack and Heroes grant 7 stacks. Reward: After reaching 100 stacks, Ravage deals 125 additional damage and Hero kills now provide 14 stacks.Mythic Reward: After reaching a 250 stacks, Ravage deals a further 200 additional damage.

Basic.name: Impaling Blades
Basic.shortText: Stun and damage enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies within the target area, Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Primal Grasp
Basic.shortText: Pull and damage enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Pulls enemies within the target area towards Kerrigan, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, an explosion occurs around Kerrigan, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.

Heroic.name: Summon Ultralisk
Heroic.shortText: Summon a commandable Ultralisk
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.

Heroic.name: Maelstrom
Heroic.shortText: Persistently damage nearby enemies
Heroic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">74</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Assimilation
Trait.shortText: Gain a temporary Shield by attacking enemies
Trait.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of damage dealt from Abilities and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> from Basic Attacks as Shields for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. Shield amount gained doubled against Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Current maximum: </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1004</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Command Ultralisk
Heroic.fullText: Order the Ultralisk to attack an enemy or move to an area.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.fullText: <s val="8783e6" hlt-name="StandardTooltip">Cancel Chrysalis, removing the Stasis.</s>

Activable.name: Chrysalis
Activable.shortText: Activate to enter Stasis and heal
Activable.fullText: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">650</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of her maximum Health per second.<n/><n/>Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.

Activable.name: Psionic Shift
Activable.shortText: Activate to teleport a short distance, deal damage

Level1.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> points of Assimilation Shields.

Level1.name: Assimilation Mastery

Level1.fullText: Regeneration Globe healing grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>.

Level7.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level10.shortText: Persistently damage nearby enemies
Level10.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">74</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds.

Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.

Level13.name: Psionic Barrier

Level13.fullText: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Spell Armor and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed.

Level13.name: Volatile Power

Level13.name: Chrysalis

Level16.name: Mounting Potency

Level20.name: Assimilation Blades

L90ETC.infoText: The Power of the Horde incarnated by brutal rhythms and blistering guitar riffs into the most elite tauren chieftain to ever headbang across the surface of Azeroth. Don't bother putting on socks. He's just going to rock them off anyways.

Leoric.name: Leoric
Leoric.title: The Skeleton King
Leoric.searchText: Leoric Skeleton King Tristram Undead Diablo Diablo1 Diablo3 D1 I 1 D3 III 3 Skeleton Slow Wall Sustain Escape Dive Offlaner
Leoric.description: A Bruiser that deals high damage against teams with many high Health Heroes.
Leoric.infoText: Madness. Betrayal. Death. These are the legacy of the Black King Leoric's reign. Driven to madness by the spirit of Diablo, Leoric brought untold suffering on his kingdom. Even after his death there was no release for the Skeleton King.

If an enemy Hero is hit, refund <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the cooldown and Mana cost. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> additional damage to Minions. Peasants!

Leoric's Movement Speed is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> while this is active.

Basic.shortText: Leoric's ghost separates from his body to move unhindered

Enemies hit take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, and Heroes hit heal Leoric for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12%</c> of his maximum Health.

LiLi.infoText: Born upon Shen-zin Su, the Wandering Isle, Li Li Stormstout led an uneventful life until she began reading her uncle Chen's journals. Soon, nothing would sate her desire for adventure, exploration, and pestering adventurers around Halfhill.

Each attack deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">26</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and heals the ally for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.
