LostVikings.name: The Lost Vikings
LostVikings.title: Triple Trouble
LostVikings.searchText: The Lost Vikings TLV LV TheLostVikings Olaf Eric Baleog 2 LV2 Classic Slow Camps Double Soak
LostVikings.description: Three Heroes in one! Can gather experience from multiple locations.
LostVikings.infoText: The Lost Vikings are back! While they briefly considered retirement after defeating the emperor Tomator, there were only so many polar bears they could wrestle before falling into a Nexus portal seemed like a solid life decision.

Heroic.name: Longboat Raid!
Heroic.shortText: Load into a Longboat to attack enemies
Heroic.fullText: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">228</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area.  The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.</c>

Heroic.name: Play Again!
Heroic.shortText: Revive and summon Vikings
Heroic.fullText: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.</c>

Trait.name: Viking Hoard
Trait.shortText: Gather Regen Globes to increase Health Regen
Trait.fullText: Gathering a Regeneration Globe with a Viking permanently increases all their Health Regeneration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> per second.<n/><n/>Current Bonus: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0</c> Regen per second

Mount.name: Go Go Go!
Mount.shortText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Movement Speed
Mount.fullText: The Vikings gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Select Olaf
Activable.shortText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Olaf</c> has lots of health, regenerates health quickly, and charges to slow enemies
Activable.fullText: Olaf can charge enemies and slow their Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds by right-clicking on them. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> second cooldown. <n/><n/>Olaf gains increased Health Regeneration when out of combat for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Select Baleog
Activable.shortText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Baleog</c> deals splash damage to enemies behind his attack target
Activable.fullText: Baleog's Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to enemies behind his attack target.

Activable.name: Select Erik
Activable.shortText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Erik</c> moves faster than the other Vikings and has a longer attack range
Activable.fullText: Erik moves faster than the other Vikings and has increased Basic Attack range.

Activable.name: Select All Vikings
Activable.fullText: The Lost Vikings can be controlled individually or as a group. Each Viking has particular strengths.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Level1.name: Olaf the Stout
Level1.shortText: Olaf gains Health, Physical Armor
Level1.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Olaf gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> bonus maximum Health.<n/><n/>Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, Olaf gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level1.name: Spy Games
Level1.shortText: Erik gains Stealth and increases vision if stationary
Level1.fullText: After standing still for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, Erik gains Stealth and his Sight Radius is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>. The Stealth persists for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after moving and once removed, Erik gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> bonus Basic Attack damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Explosive Attacks
Level1.shortText: Increases Baleog splash to non-Heroic enemies
Level1.fullText: Baleog's Basic Attack splash damage against non-Heroes is no longer reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level1.name: Viking Bribery
Level1.shortText: Kill Minions to bribe a Mercenary
Level1.fullText: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c>.

Level4.name: Pain Don't Hurt
Level4.shortText: Baleog's attacks heal himself
Level4.fullText: Baleog's Basic Attacks and splash damage heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage dealt. Healing is doubled against Heroes.

Level4.name: Erik the Swift
Level4.shortText: Increases Erik's Move Speed and heal while running
Level4.fullText: Permanently increases Erik's base Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>, and as long as Erik is moving he heals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">34</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.

Level4.name: It's a Sabotage!
Level4.shortText: Erik's attacks stronger against Structures
Level4.fullText: Erik's Basic Attacks against Structures light them on fire for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, causing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level4.name: Mercenary Lord
Level4.shortText: Empower nearby Mercenaries
Level4.fullText: Friendly non-Boss Mercenaries near your Hero deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage. Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level7.name: Baleog the Fierce
Level7.shortText: Baleog gains Attack Speed, Range
Level7.fullText: Increase Baleog's attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c>. While near Olaf and Erik, he becomes inspired by the power of teamwork and his Attack Speed is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level7.name: Spin To Win!
Level7.shortText: Deals damage around each Viking
Level7.fullText: Activate to have each Viking deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.  Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> bonus damage to enemy Heroes.

Level7.name: Norse Force!
Level7.shortText: All Vikings gain a Shield
Level7.fullText: All Vikings gain a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">308</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Longboat Raid!
Level10.shortText: Load into a Longboat to attack enemies
Level10.fullText: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">228</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area.  The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.</c>

Level10.name: Play Again!
Level10.shortText: Revive and summon Vikings
Level10.fullText: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.</c>

Level13.name: Hunka' Burning Olaf
Level13.shortText: Olaf deals damage to nearby enemies
Level13.fullText: Olaf deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">34</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every second to nearby enemies.

Level13.name: Jump!
Level13.fullText: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Nordic Attack Squad
Level13.shortText: Vikings deal bonus damage when together
Level13.fullText: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25%</c> maximum Health to enemy Heroes.

Level16.name: Large and In Charge
Level16.shortText: Charge stuns enemies
Level16.fullText: When Olaf charges enemies, they are stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level16.name: Impatience Is a Virtue
Level16.shortText: Vikings' attacks reduce cooldowns of all Vikings
Level16.fullText: Enemies damaged by a Viking's Basic Attack reduce the cooldown of all Viking Abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.3125</c> seconds.

Level16.name: 64 KB Marathon
Level16.shortText: Run faster and break Slows and Roots
Level16.fullText: Activating Go Go Go! grants an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Movement Speed and breaks the Vikings out of Roots and Slows.

Level16.name: Executioner
Level16.shortText: Attacking disabled Heroes increases damage
Level16.fullText: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Ragnarok 'n' Roll!
Level20.shortText: Increased combat prowess
Level20.fullText: The Longboat can attack two targets at once and the range of its Mortar is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. Reduce Longboat Raid!'s cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Checkpoint Reached
Level20.shortText: Additional revive and heal
Level20.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds after using Play Again!, any dead Vikings are revived and summoned again, and all are healed to full.

Level20.name: The Sequel!
Level20.shortText: Reduces death timer for all Vikings
Level20.fullText: Reduces the Lost Vikings's death timer by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Fury of the Storm
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks chain to non-Heroes
Level20.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, the next Basic Attack will deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">41</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target, and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">105</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters. Each Viking has their own cooldown.

Basic.name: Spin To Win!
Basic.shortText: Deals damage around each Viking
Basic.fullText: Activate to have each Viking deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.  Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> bonus damage to enemy Heroes.

Basic.name: Norse Force!
Basic.shortText: All Vikings gain a Shield
Basic.fullText: All Vikings gain a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">308</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Jump!
Basic.shortText: Grants temporary Invulnerability
Basic.fullText: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Nordic Attack Squad
Basic.shortText: Vikings deal bonus damage when together
Basic.fullText: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25%</c> maximum Health to enemy Heroes.

Basic.name: Viking Bribery
Basic.shortText: Kill Minions to bribe a Mercenary
Basic.fullText: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c>.

Heroic.name: Play Again!
Heroic.shortText: Revive and summon Vikings
Heroic.fullText: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.</c>

Heroic.name: Longboat Raid!
Heroic.shortText: Load into a Longboat to attack enemies
Heroic.fullText: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">128</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">228</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area.  The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.</c>

Trait.name: Viking Hoard
Trait.shortText: Gather Regen Globes to increase Health Regen
Trait.fullText: Gathering a Regeneration Globe with a Viking permanently increases all their Health Regeneration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> per second.<n/><n/>Current Bonus: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0</c> Regen per second

Mount.name: Go Go Go!
Mount.shortText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Movement Speed
Mount.fullText: The Vikings gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Activable.shortText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Olaf</c> has lots of health, regenerates health quickly, and charges to slow enemies
Activable.fullText: Olaf can charge enemies and slow their Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds by right-clicking on them. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> second cooldown. <n/><n/>Olaf gains increased Health Regeneration when out of combat for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Lucio.name: Lúcio
Lucio.title: Freedom Fighting DJ
Lucio.searchText: Lucio Human Overwatch OW Displace Mobile Mobility Sustain Shields Healer
Lucio.description: A sustained Healer who gives his team mobility and peels enemies off allies.
Lucio.infoText: From the streets of Rio to the clubs on King's Row, Lúcio's beats bring the party to life, and drive the people to action. Now he's on tour in the Nexus, ready to break it down, and to continue fighting for what's right.

Basic.name: Soundwave
Basic.shortText: Knockback nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">105</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in an area and knock them back.

Basic.name: Crossfade
Basic.shortText: Play a <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> or <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> track
Basic.fullText: Currently playing <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c>, increasing the Movement Speed of Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>.<n/><n/>Toggle to play <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> instead.

Basic.name: Amp It Up
Basic.shortText: Boost the effect of Lúcio's Crossfade track
Basic.fullText: Raise Lúcio's Crossfade track volume for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, amping <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">112</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second and <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Movement Speed.

Heroic.name: Sound Barrier
Heroic.shortText: Shield nearby allies
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1296</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> point Shield that rapidly decays over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: High Five
Heroic.shortText: Skate to allies, healing and granting Unstoppable
Heroic.fullText: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, Lúcio is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, and both gain Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Trait.name: Push Off
Trait.shortText: Push off a wall to Slow enemies
Trait.fullText: While moving alongside terrain, activate to slide towards a targeted location. Enemies hit take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Mount.name: Wall Ride
Mount.shortText: Lúcio gains Move Speed near terrain and can move through units
Mount.fullText: When moving alongside terrain, Lúcio begins to Wall Ride for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. While Wall Ride is active, Lúcio can walk through units and gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Crossfade
Basic.shortText: Play a <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> or <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> track
Basic.fullText: Currently playing <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c>, passively healing Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second.<n/><n/>Toggle to play <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> instead.

Activable.name: Boombox
Activable.shortText: Drop a boombox that plays Crossfade
Activable.fullText: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Armor.<n/><n/>Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.

Activable.name: Summer Anthem
Activable.shortText: Activate for Crossfade to grant Unkillable
Activable.fullText: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Party Mix
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Crossfade radius, max Mana
Level1.fullText: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lúcio's maximum Mana by 10. Reward: Once you have played for 8 minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's radius by 20%.

Level1.name: Accelerando
Level1.shortText: Wall Ride gradually increases Move Speed
Level1.fullText: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.

Level1.name: Smooth Moves
Level1.shortText: Wall Ride Basic Attacks heal
Level1.fullText: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of the damage dealt and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> Mana.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Wall Ride duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level4.name: Subwoofer
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Empower Soundwave
Level4.fullText: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by 50% and its range by 20%.

Level4.name: Off the Wall
Level4.shortText: Wall Ride Soundwave hits reduce cooldown
Level4.fullText: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and refunds <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Mana.

Level4.name: Supersonic
Level4.shortText: Wall Ride recharges Push Off cooldown
Level4.fullText: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.

Level7.name: Good Vibrations
Level7.shortText: Soundwave grants Shield
Level7.fullText: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">38</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times this amount.

Level7.name: Reverse Amp
Level7.shortText: Amp It Up blasts Crossfade at enemy Heroes
Level7.fullText: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and <c val="3DFF7F">Speed Boost</c> Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.<n/><n/>This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.

Level7.name: Boombox
Level7.shortText: Drop a boombox that plays Crossfade
Level7.fullText: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Armor.<n/><n/>Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.

Level10.name: Sound Barrier
Level10.shortText: Shield nearby allies
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1296</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> point Shield that rapidly decays over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level10.name: High Five
Level10.shortText: Skate to allies, healing and granting Unstoppable
Level10.fullText: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, Lúcio is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, and both gain Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: All Together
Level13.shortText: Gain Move Speed from nearby allies
Level13.fullText: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.

Level13.name: Heavy Casters
Level13.shortText: Push Off Stuns the first Hero hit
Level13.fullText: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Slip
Level13.shortText: Gain Armor, Move Speed during Wall Ride
Level13.fullText: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, and grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Armor, for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level16.name: Rejuvenescência
Level16.shortText: <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> heals percent Health
Level16.fullText: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's <c val="FFF800">Healing Boost</c> heals for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of the target's maximum Health each second.

Level16.name: Up the Frequency
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Amp It Up cooldown
Level16.fullText: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.3</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.2</c>.

Level16.name: Up To Eleven
Level16.shortText: Increase Amp It Up duration
Level16.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up.<n/><n/>Soundwave grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds and Push Off grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Maiev.description: A mobile Assassin that excels against clustered enemies and prevents their escape.
Maiev.infoText: Maiev Shadowsong stood watch over the imprisoned Betrayer for ten thousand years, and hunted him relentlessly after he was released. Some say she's determined; others say she's obsessed. Either way, she will stop at nothing to ensure the security of her world.

Basic.name: Fan of Knives
Basic.shortText: Throw a volley of knives

Basic.name: Umbral Bind
Basic.shortText: Tether enemy Heroes to Maiev, pulling those that stray too far

If a tethered Hero moves too far from Maiev, they are pulled toward her, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and breaking the tether.

Basic.name: Spirit of Vengeance

If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce the cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Leaving Containment Silences the enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Containment Disc automatically activates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds after hitting a Hero.

Warden Avatars last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Malfurion.infoText: Malfurion Stormrage is the greatest druid on Azeroth, and a student of the demi-god Cenarius. Communing with nature and Cenarius through the Emerald dream, Malfurion protects the wilds from demonic influences.

Level7.fullText: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by <c val="00DFDF" hlt-name="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Tormented Souls
Level10.shortText: Apply Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies
Level10.fullText: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying <c val="00DFDF" hlt-name="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> to nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Last Rites
Level10.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Damage a Hero based on their missing Health
Level10.fullText: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.

Level13.name: Soul Siphon
Level13.fullText: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4.75%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.

Level13.name: Ethereal Existence
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by <c val="00DFDF" hlt-name="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c>, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c>.

Level13.name: Inevitable End
Level13.shortText: Activate to become Unstoppable, remove Marks
Level13.fullText: Activate to become Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, but remove all active <c val="00DFDF" hlt-name="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Marks</c>.

Level13.name: Shroud of Wisdom
Level13.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Soul Collector
Level16.shortText: Increase Soul Rip range, reduce cooldown
Level16.fullText: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds and increase its range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level16.name: Mortality
Level16.shortText: Wraith Strike deals bonus damage to Heroes
Level16.fullText: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.

Level16.name: Memento Mori
Level16.shortText: Reaper's Mark deals increased damage over time
Level16.fullText: <c val="00DFDF" hlt-name="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Reaper of Souls
Level20.shortText: Extend Tormented Souls duration
Level20.fullText: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration.<n/><n/>If <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls' radius, it does not decay.

Level20.name: Angel of Death
Level20.shortText: Last Rites heals
Level20.fullText: Last Rites heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.

Level20.name: Final Curtain
Level20.shortText: Death Shroud leaves a trail
Level20.fullText: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, applying <c val="00DFDF" hlt-name="#MalthaelTrait">Reaper's Mark</c> to enemies in its area.

Level20.name: No One Can Stop Death
Level20.shortText: Activate to respawn
Level20.fullText: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Medic.name: Lt. Morales
Medic.title: Combat Medic
Medic.searchText: Lt. Morales Medic Lieutenant LtMorales Terran Heroes of the Storm SC Brood War BW UED Displace Shields Healer
Medic.description: A strong, sustained Healer who's unbeatable if left alone by her enemies.
Medic.infoText: To good marines, the only thing more important than the rifle in their hand is the medic at their back. As one of the first officers deployed during the United Earth Directorate's invasion, Lt. Rosa Morales is the best of the best.

Basic.name: Healing Beam
Basic.shortText: Heals allies over time
Basic.fullText: Heal target allied Hero or Minion for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">172</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second as long as they are in range. After not channeling Healing Beam for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> Energy per second.<n/><n/>Reactivate to switch targets, or self-cast to cancel channeling.

Basic.name: Safeguard
Basic.shortText: Grants Armor to the target
Basic.fullText: Grant target ally Hero <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Displacement Grenade
Basic.shortText: Damages and knocks enemies away
Basic.fullText: Fire a grenade that can be manually detonated, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">208</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> to nearby enemies and knocking them away.

Heroic.name: Stim Drone
Heroic.shortText: Grant massive Attack and Movement Speed
Heroic.fullText: Grant an allied Hero <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Medivac Dropship
Heroic.shortText: Transport allies across long distances
Heroic.fullText: Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.

Trait.name: Caduceus Reactor
Trait.shortText: Restore Health while channeling Healing Beam
Trait.fullText: While channeling Healing Beam, Lt. Morales regenerates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of her maximum Health per second.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Redirect Healing Beam
Basic.shortText: Heals allies over time
Basic.fullText: Redirect Healing Beam to another Hero or Minion. Self-cast to cancel channeling.

Trait.name: Cancel Healing Beam
Trait.fullText: Stop channeling Healing Beam.

Basic.name: Detonate Displacement Grenade
Basic.shortText: Damages and knocks enemies away
Basic.fullText: Detonate Displacement Grenade, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">208</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and knocking them away.

Activable.name: Depart
Activable.fullText: Order your Medivac to travel to the original cast location.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Cellular Reactor
Activable.shortText: Consume Energy to heal, Safeguard restores Energy
Activable.fullText: Consume <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Energy to heal Lt. Morales for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of her maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Caduceus Reactor is disabled while this is active.

Activable.name: Trauma Trigger
Activable.shortText: Gain Armor at low Health
Activable.fullText: Taking damage while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Health grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> second cooldown.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the healing provided by Caduceus Reactor from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of Lt. Morales's maximum Health per second.

Activable.name: Reinforcements
Activable.shortText: Medivac appears at Hall of Storms
Activable.fullText: Activate to call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to the original cast location to unload its passengers. Cooldown is shared with Medivac Dropship.

Level1.name: Caduceus Feedback
Level1.shortText: Basic Attacks generate Energy
Level1.fullText: Increases Attack Range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.1</c> and Basic Attacks against Heroes generate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> Energy.

Level1.name: Life Support
Level1.shortText: Increase maximum Energy, recharge rate
Level1.fullText: During the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds of Energy regeneration, Healing Beam regenerates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more Energy.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Increase your maximum Energy by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c>.

Level1.name: Clear!
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit Heroes to empower Displacement Grenade
Level1.fullText: Quest: Each enemy Hero hit with Displacement Grenade restores 3 Energy.Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Displacement Grenade from 12 seconds to 9 seconds.Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, increase the detonation area of Displacement Grenade by 25%.

Level4.name: Cellular Reactor
Level4.shortText: Consume Energy to heal, Safeguard restores Energy
Level4.fullText: Consume <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Energy to heal Lt. Morales for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of her maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Caduceus Reactor is disabled while this is active.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Generate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Energy each time Safeguard reduces damage, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Energy per use.

Level4.name: Trauma Trigger
Level4.shortText: Gain Armor at low Health, increase Caduceus Reactor healing
Level4.fullText: Taking damage while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Health grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> second cooldown.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the healing provided by Caduceus Reactor from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of Lt. Morales's maximum Health per second.

Level4.name: Blast Shield
Level4.shortText: Displacement Grenade Slows, grants Shields
Level4.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second after being knocked away and grant Lt. Morales a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> of her maximum Health. This shield stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.

Level7.name: Physical Therapy
Level7.shortText: Safeguard removes Slows
Level7.fullText: Safeguard removes all Slows from its target and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Vanadium Plating
Level7.shortText: Stuns, Roots increase Safeguard Armor, increased duration
Level7.fullText: While an ally affected by Safeguard is Stunned or Rooted, Safeguard grants an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> Armor.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Safeguard by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level7.name: Medi-Drone
Level7.shortText: Healing Beam heals Safeguard targets
Level7.fullText: Allies with Safeguard receive <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the healing done by Healing Beam on another ally.

Level10.name: Stim Drone
Level10.shortText: Grant massive Attack and Movement Speed
Level10.fullText: Grant an allied Hero <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Medivac Dropships
Level10.shortText: Unlock Medivac transports
Level10.fullText: Unlock the Medivac Dropship and Reinforcements abilities. These abilities share a cooldown.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Medivac Dropship</s><n/>Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Reinforcements</s><n/>Call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to the original cast location to unload its passengers.

Level13.name: EMP Grenade
Level13.shortText: Displacement Grenade deals more damage to Shields
Level13.fullText: Displacement Grenade deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, and up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">400</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus damage to Heroes' Shields.

Level13.name: System Shock
Level13.fullText: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> less damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Bedside Manner
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> of their maximum Health. Hitting an enemy Hero with Displacement Grenade increases the next instance of this damage against them to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Extended Care
Level16.shortText: Healing Beam heals over time, increased range
Level16.fullText: Channeling Healing Beam on a Hero for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds causes them to be healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">258</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds when Healing Beam ends. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Increase the range of Healing Beam by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level16.name: First Responder
Level16.shortText: Healing Beam empowered at high Energy
Level16.fullText: While above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> Energy, Healing Beam's healing is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and both Lt. Morales and her Healing Beam target gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed.

Level16.name: Shield Sequencer
Level16.shortText: Safeguard gains a second charge, increased range
Level16.fullText: Safeguard gains a second charge and its range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level20.name: Hyperactivity
Level20.shortText: Lower cooldown, increase Movement Speed
Level20.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Stim Drone from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c> seconds to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> seconds, and increase the Movement Speed bonus from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Safe Zone
Level20.shortText: Exiting Medivac grants Protected, reduced cooldown
Level20.fullText: After exiting the Medivac, allies are Protected from all damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Reduce the cooldown of Medivac Dropship abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Hospice Care
Level20.shortText: Safeguard grants Unkillable, can heal
Level20.fullText: Safeguard grants its target Unkillable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. If the target is under <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> maximum Health when the Unkillable effect ends, they are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of their maximum Health.

Level20.name: Second Opinion
Level20.shortText: Reduce Displacement Grenade cooldown
Level20.fullText: Hitting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more Heroes with Displacement Grenade reduces its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

MedicMedivacDropship.name: Medivac Dropship
MedicMedivacDropship.description: Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.

Basic.name: Depart
Basic.fullText: Departs for the targeted location immediately.

Medivh.name: Medivh
Medivh.title: The Last Guardian
Medivh.searchText: Midivh Prophet War1 I WC1 Warcraft1 Warcraft3 Warcraft III WC3 War3 3 Reign of Chaos RoC WoW World of Warcraft Burning Crusade BC Hearthstone HS Mobility Mobile Polymorph Disable Shields Escape Dive
Medivh.description: A Support who can negate burst damage and allow his allies to teleport.
Medivh.infoText: Under the demon lord Sargeras's influence, Medivh opened the Dark Portal and unleashed the Horde upon Azeroth. To atone for this sin, he rallied a new generation of heroes to stand against the Burning Legion. Now, he takes his place amongst legends.

Basic.name: Arcane Rift
Basic.shortText: Launch an arcane bolt that damages enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Launch a rift that deals 170 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in its path. If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds and refund 50 Mana.Quest: Hit 40 enemy Heroes with Arcane Rift without dying.Reward: Permanently increase the damage dealt by 75 and cooldown reduction for hitting a Hero by 1 second.

Basic.name: Force of Will
Basic.shortText: Protect an allied Hero from damage
Basic.fullText: Protect an allied Hero from all damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Upon expiration, Force of Will heals the target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage it absorbed.

Basic.name: Portal
Basic.shortText: Create a portal that allies can pass through
Basic.fullText: Create a set of portals between Medivh and the target location, allowing allies to teleport between both. The portals last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Poly Bomb
Heroic.shortText: Polymorph a Hero that spreads to other Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Polymorph an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.

Heroic.name: Ley Line Seal
Heroic.shortText: Unleash a wave that Time Stops enemy Heroes
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Raven Form
Trait.shortText: Transform into a raven
Trait.fullText: Instead of mounting, Medivh can transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over all terrain and is immune to all effects.

Mount.name: Raven Form
Mount.shortText: Transform into a raven
Mount.fullText: Transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over terrain and is immune to all effects.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Poly Bomb
Heroic.shortText: Polymorph a Hero that spreads to other Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Polymorph an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.

Mount.name: Cancel Raven Form
Mount.fullText: Cancel Raven Form.

Basic.name: Portal
Basic.shortText: Create a portal that allies can pass through
Basic.fullText: Create a set of portals between Medivh and the target location, allowing allies to teleport between both. The portals last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Cancel Portal
Trait.fullText: Destroy current Portal.

Activable.name: Portal
Activable.shortText: Create a portal that allies can pass through
Activable.fullText: Create a Portal entrance or exit at the targeted location. <n/><n/><c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal</c>.

Activable.name: Dust of Appearance
Activable.shortText: Activate to reveal nearby Heroes
Activable.fullText: Activate to greatly increase sight range for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Heroic.name: Redirect Ley Line Seal
Heroic.fullText: Redirect the energy wave to a new location.

Activable.name: Arcane Brilliance
Activable.shortText: Grant Spell Power and Mana to allies
Activable.fullText: Activate to instantly restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c> mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Dust of Disappearance
Activable.shortText: Stealth an allied Hero
Activable.fullText: Stealth an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level1.name: Winds of Celerity
Level1.shortText: Increases Raven Form Movement Speed
Level1.fullText: Increases Raven Form's Movement Speed bonus by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level1.name: Raven’s Intellect
Level1.shortText: Raven Form increases Health and Mana Regen
Level1.fullText: Raven Form increases Medivh's Mana and Health Regeneration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c>.

Level1.name: Portal Mastery
Level1.shortText: Place both Portal locations
Level1.fullText: Medivh can manually place both Portal locations and it no longer breaks Raven Form. <n/><n/><c val="ffff80" hlt-name="#ColorCreamYellow">Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal</c>.

Level4.name: Mage Armor
Level4.shortText: Using a Portal grants Armor
Level4.fullText: The first time an ally uses a Portal, they gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, reducing their damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level4.name: Raven Familiar
Level4.shortText: Using a Portal grants a Raven Familiar
Level4.fullText: A Raven Familiar joins allies each time they use a Portal. The Raven will dive at the ally's next Basic Attack against a Hero within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">114</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Dust of Appearance
Level4.shortText: Activate to reveal nearby Heroes
Level4.fullText: Activate to greatly increase sight range for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level7.name: Mystic Assault
Level7.shortText: Arcane Rift empowers Basic Attacks
Level7.fullText: If Arcane Rift hits an enemy Hero, Medivh's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level7.name: Arcane Explosion
Level7.shortText: Force of Will deals area damage
Level7.fullText: When Force of Will expires, it deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies, plus <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage it prevented, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">315</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> additional damage.

Level7.name: Force of Magic
Level7.shortText: Force of Will can grant Spell Power
Level7.fullText: Preventing at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">268</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage with a single cast of Force of Will grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds. Stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times.

Level10.name: Poly Bomb
Level10.shortText: Polymorph a Hero that spreads to other Heroes
Level10.fullText: Polymorph an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.

Level10.name: Ley Line Seal
Level10.shortText: Unleash a wave that Time Stops enemy Heroes
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Circle of Protection
Level13.shortText: Force of Will applies to allies near target
Level13.fullText: Force of Will also applies to allies near the target.

Level13.name: Enduring Will
Level13.shortText: Preventing damage reduces Force of Will cooldown
Level13.fullText: Preventing at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">268</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage with Force of Will reduces its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Reabsorption
Level13.fullText: Increase the amount of healing from Force of Will to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of the damage it absorbed.

Level16.name: Arcane Charge
Level16.shortText: Arcane Rift deals more damage after hitting a Hero
Level16.fullText: When Arcane Rift damages an enemy Hero, the next Arcane Rift deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> more damage.

Level16.name: Temporal Flux
Level16.shortText: Arcane Rift reduces Heroic cooldown
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks reduce Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>. Each enemy Hero hit by Arcane Rift reduces Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">9%</c>.

Level16.name: Stable Portal
Level16.shortText: Increases Portal uptime
Level16.fullText: Decrease Portal cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and increase Portal duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Glyph Of Poly Bomb
Level20.shortText: Poly Bomb instantly spreads in a larger area
Level20.fullText: Poly Bomb now hits an area, instantly Polymorphing enemy Heroes, hitting the same area again <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second later.<n/><n/>Poly Bomb's duration is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, and the spread radius is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level20.name: Medivh Cheats!
Level20.shortText: Ley Line Seal can be redirected while active
Level20.fullText: Increase the duration of the Time Stop by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c> and gain the ability to redirect the wave once while it's active.

Level20.name: Guardian of Tirisfal
Level20.shortText: Arcane Rift kills Minions instantly, increased range
Level20.fullText: Minions and Catapults hit by Arcane Rift are instantly killed.  Range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Arcane Brilliance
Level20.shortText: Grant Spell Power and Mana to allies
Level20.fullText: Activate to instantly restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200</c> mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Dust of Disappearance
Level20.shortText: Stealth an allied Hero
Level20.fullText: Stealth an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Basic.name: Arcane Rift
Basic.shortText: Launch an arcane bolt that damages enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Launch a rift that deals 170 (+4% per level) damage to enemies in its path. If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds and refund 50 Mana.Quest: Hit 40 enemy Heroes with Arcane Rift without dying.Reward: Permanently increase the damage dealt by 75 and cooldown reduction for hitting a Hero by 1 second.

Basic.name: Force of Will
Basic.shortText: Protect an allied Hero from damage
Basic.fullText: Protect an allied Hero from all damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Upon expiration, Force of Will heals the target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage it absorbed.

Basic.name: Portal
Basic.shortText: Create a portal that allies can pass through
Basic.fullText: Create a set of portals between Medivh and the target location, allowing allies to teleport between both. The portals last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Poly Bomb
Heroic.shortText: Polymorph a Hero that spreads to other Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Polymorph an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.

Heroic.name: Ley Line Seal
Heroic.shortText: Unleash a wave that Time Stops enemy Heroes
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Raven Form
Trait.shortText: Transform into a raven
Trait.fullText: Instead of mounting, Medivh can transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over all terrain and is immune to all effects.

Mount.name: Raven Form
Mount.shortText: Transform into a raven
Mount.fullText: Transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over terrain and is immune to all effects.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Poly Bomb
Heroic.shortText: Polymorph a Hero that spreads to other Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Polymorph an enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.

Mount.name: Cancel Raven Form
Mount.fullText: Cancel Raven Form.

MeiOW.name: Mei
MeiOW.title: Adventuring Climatologist
MeiOW.searchText: Mei-Ling Zhou Human Overwatch OW Ice Frost Slow Displace CC Initiation Wall Time Stop Dive Escape
MeiOW.description: A mobile Tank who controls and disrupts the battlefield with weather-altering technology
MeiOW.infoText: A brilliant mind with a sunny disposition, Dr. Mei-Ling Zhou joined Overwatch to help solve the world's growing climate problems. Armed with a host of weather-altering technologies, Mei now fights to protect her friends and secure a future for a troubled world.

Basic.name: Snow Blind
Basic.shortText: Throw a snowball that Slows and Blinds
Basic.fullText: Throw a snowball that hits all enemies in an area. Enemies hit take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>, and are Blinded for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Blizzard
Basic.shortText: Freeze enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Command Snowball to create a Blizzard at the target location for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Enemies within the blizzard take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">13</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7%</c>, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>. When the Blizzard ends, enemies within its area take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Icing
Basic.shortText: Slide in a direction and knockback enemies
Basic.fullText: Slide quickly in the targeted direction. When this effect ends, enemies near Mei are knocked back, take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">52</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>, rapidly decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Can be canceled during sliding.

Heroic.name: Avalanche
Heroic.shortText: Consume Heroes in a massive snowball
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds per Hero consumed.

Heroic.name: Ice Wall
Heroic.shortText: Trap enemies inside of a path blocking wall
Heroic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Cryo-Freeze
Trait.shortText: Activate to gain Shield and heal
Trait.fullText: Become encased in ice for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, gaining a rapidly decaying Shield that absorbs up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1104</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. While active, this Shield grants Unstoppable and restores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of Mei's maximum Health.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.fullText: Cancel Icing

Trait.fullText: Cancel Cryo-Freeze

The cooldown of this ability is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.

Activable.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">67%</c> increased area and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> increased damage.

Activable.name: Flash Freeze

Activable.fullText: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c> second cooldown.

Level1.name: Heavy Pack

Level1.name: Ice Storm
Level1.shortText: Blizzard can deal extra damage
Level1.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> hit of Blizzard against enemy Heroes deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">42</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Blizzard's final Stun damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> against all enemies.

Level1.name: Heat Transfer
Level1.shortText: Gain bonuses from disabling Heroes
Level1.fullText: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed Heroes deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c> more damage. Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero she heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

If Mei enters her own Blizzard while Icing is active, the cooldown of Icing is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and she gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c> Mana.

Level4.name: Crystallize
Level4.shortText: Cryo-Freeze grants Spell Armor
Level4.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Cryo-Freeze by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds. Mei gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Spell Armor while Cryo-Freeze is active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second after.

Level7.name: Induce Hibernation

Level7.fullText: Blizzard reduces the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside of its area by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>. <n/><n/>When Blizzard ends, enemy Heroes still within its area gain this effect for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Skating Away
Level7.shortText: Icing grants allies Movement Speed, Physical Armor
Level7.fullText: When Icing ends, Mei and all nearby allied Heroes gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Physical Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Backup Battery
Level7.shortText: Activate to remove Roots and Slows, heal
Level7.fullText: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.

Level10.name: Avalanche
Level10.shortText: Consume Heroes in a massive snowball
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds per Hero consumed.

Level10.name: Ice Wall
Level10.shortText: Trap enemies inside of a path blocking wall
Level10.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Flurry
Level13.shortText: Standing in Blizzard reduces its cooldown
Level13.fullText: While in her own Blizzard, Mei gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50% </c>increased Attack Speed and Blizzard's cooldown refreshes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> faster. If Mei is in her own Blizzard when it ends, gain these bonuses for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> additional seconds.

Level13.name: Cooling Servos
Level13.fullText: While Cryo-Freeze is active, Mei's Basic Ability cooldowns recover <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks Slow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Polar Vortex
Level13.shortText: Deal area damage and Slow after casting abilities
Level13.fullText: Using an ability causes Mei to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">24</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second to nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemy Heroes damaged by this effect also have their Movement Speed and Attack Speed Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Level16.name: Fresh Powder
Level16.shortText: Snow Blind gains a charge, increased range
Level16.fullText: Snow Blind gains an additional charge and its range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c>.

Level16.name: Black Ice

Level16.fullText: Icing's Slow effect no longer decays over its duration. Icing deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300%</c> more damage to enemies very close to Mei.

Level16.name: Acclimation
Level16.shortText: Disabling Heroes empowers Mei
Level16.fullText: Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero, the damage she deals and healing she receives is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c>, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> times. While at maximum stacks, Mei also gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Cascade
Level20.shortText: Avalanche launches Snow Blinds during travel
Level20.fullText: While traveling, Avalanche constantly launches a volley of untalented Snow Blind snowballs ahead of itself.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Avalanche by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Shatter
