Level20.name: Flash Freeze
Level20.shortText: Cryo-Freeze activates on fatal damage
Level20.fullText: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c> second cooldown.

Mephisto.name: Mephisto
Mephisto.title: Lord of Hatred
Mephisto.searchText: Demon D2 Diablo 2 II Diablo2 Mage Root Dive
Mephisto.description: A sustained Assassin who thrives in battle against groups of enemies.
Mephisto.infoText: Dul’Mephistos, the Lord of Hatred, is said to be the most cunning among his brethren. Even while imprisoned in a soulstone, his vile influence corrupted the Zakarum and manipulated them into breaking the seal, giving him free reign to reunite the Prime Evils and enslave humanity.

Basic.name: Skull Missile
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in a line after a short delay
Basic.fullText: Conjure a skull that travels in the target direction after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.625</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">127</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit and Slowing Heroes hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Lightning Nova
Basic.shortText: Deal increasing damage to nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: A ring of lightning appears around Mephisto for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. Enemies within the ring take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">43</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each time a cast of Lightning Nova hits a Hero, its damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Basic.name: Shade of Mephisto
Basic.shortText: Teleport to a location and return after a delay
Basic.fullText: Teleport to a location, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">78</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and leaving behind a Shade of Mephisto at Mephisto's original location. <n/><n/>After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, Mephisto is teleported back to the Shade's location.

Heroic.name: Consume Souls
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Slow all enemy Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Channel for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">357</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Durance of Hate
Heroic.shortText: Unleash spirits that spread Roots
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them over the same duration.<n/><n/>Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.

Trait.name: Lord Of Hatred
Trait.shortText: Hitting Heroes with Basic Abilities reduces Mephisto's cooldowns
Trait.fullText: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Abilities reduces Mephisto's Basic Ability cooldowns.<n/><n/>Skull Missile and Shade of Mephisto grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds of cooldown reduction per Hero hit, and Lightning Nova grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.3</c> seconds per Hero hit.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Shade Lord
Activable.shortText: Activate to swap with Shade of Mephisto
Activable.fullText: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> Talents.

Level1.name: Unyielding Power
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Empower Skull Missile
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit Heroes with Skull Missile.Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, increase Skull Missile's damage by 100.Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Skull Missile gains an additional charge.

Level1.name: Furious Spark
Level1.shortText: Lightning Nova deals bonus damage
Level1.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> hit from Lightning Nova against the same target deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">65</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus damage and grants Mephisto <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Mana.

Level1.name: Malicious Intent
Level1.shortText: Shade of Mephisto grants Spell Power
Level1.fullText: Shade of Mephisto grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Spell Power while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds after ending.<n/><n/>If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then increase the duration of the Spell Power bonus to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds after it ends.

Level4.name: Hateful Mending
Level4.shortText: Skull Missile heals
Level4.fullText: Skull Missile grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Mana and heals Mephisto for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> of the damage it deals to Heroes.

Level4.name: Static Barrier
Level4.shortText: Lightning Nova grants a Shield
Level4.fullText: At the end of its duration, Lightning Nova grants Mephisto a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> of the damage it dealt to Heroes. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Spite
Level4.shortText: Regen Globes activate Lord of Hatred
Level4.fullText: Increase Regeneration Globe healing duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. Every tick of Regeneration Globe healing activates Lord of Hatred, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level7.name: Ghastly Armor
Level7.shortText: Shade of Mephisto grants Armor
Level7.fullText: Shade of Mephisto grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds after it ends.

Level7.name: Frost Storm
Level7.shortText: Shade of Mephisto causes Lightning Nova to Slow
Level7.fullText: While Shade of Mephisto is active, enemies who are hit by Lightning Nova are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and the Slow from Skull Missile is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level7.name: Trickery
Level7.shortText: Shade of Mephisto grants Move Speed
Level7.fullText: Shade of Mephisto grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds after it ends.<n/><n/>If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then reset the cooldown of Shade of Mephisto.

After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">357</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Durance of Hate

Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to them over the same duration.<n/><n/>Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.

Level13.name: Abhorred Skull
Level13.shortText: Increase Skull Missile damage, grants Spell Power
Level13.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Skull Missile grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Spell Power for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. Skull Missile deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> more damage to Heroes under <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health.

Level13.name: Hysteria
Level13.shortText: Lord of Hatred reduces Heroic cooldown
Level13.fullText: Lord of Hatred also reduces the cooldown of Mephisto's Heroic Ability. Mephisto is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of his maximum Health and Mana when he casts his Heroic Ability.

Level13.name: Shard of Hate
Level13.shortText: Basic Attacks splash and activate Lord of Hatred
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks hit enemies near the primary target and activate Lord of Hatred against enemy Heroes, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second per Hero hit.

Level16.name: Lightning Reaction
Level16.shortText: Skull Missile explodes when hitting Lightning Nova
Level16.fullText: Skull Missile explodes on contact with Lightning Nova, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.

Level16.name: Static Field
Level16.shortText: Lightning Nova can deal Percent Damage
Level16.fullText: When Lightning Nova's damage bonus reaches <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>, enemy Heroes within its radius take damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of their maximum Health.

Level16.name: Animosity
Level16.shortText: Increase duration, damage of Lightning Nova
Level16.fullText: Increase the duration of Lightning Nova by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and the maximum amount of bonus damage it can deal from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">42%</c>.

Level20.name: Consumed by Hatred
Level20.shortText: Consume Souls recasts upon Takedown
Level20.fullText: Consume Souls deals bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of the target's missing Health. If Consume Souls initial cast kills a Hero it will cast <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> additional time.

Level20.name: Unspeakable Horror
Level20.shortText: Durance of Hate Silences
Level20.fullText: Durance of Hate Silences enemies while they are Rooted and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after its Root expires.

Level20.name: Mimic
Level20.shortText: Shade of Mephisto can cast Lightning Nova
Level20.fullText: While both Shade of Mephisto and Lightning Nova are active, Lightning Nova also casts from the Shade's location.

Level20.name: Shade Lord

Monk.name: Kharazim
Monk.title: Veradani Monk
Monk.searchText: Karazim Monk Nephalem D3 Diablo 3 III Reaper of Souls RoS Diablo3 Mobile Mobility Sustain Dive Escape Healer
Monk.description: A flexible Healer that pairs well with Melee allies who like to dive into the enemy team.
Monk.infoText: To the monks of Ivgorod, the gods are in all things, and their divine will is proclaimed by the Patriarchs. With unshakable faith, Kharazim carries forth the decrees of the thousand and one gods to the ends of Sanctuary and the realms beyond.

Basic.name: Radiant Dash
Basic.shortText: Jump to an ally or enemy
Basic.fullText: Jump to an allied or enemy unit. Enemies are immediately hit with a Basic Attack.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Basic.name: Breath of Heaven
Basic.shortText: Heal nearby ally Heroes and grant Movement Speed
Basic.fullText: Heal nearby Heroes for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">295</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and give them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.fullText: Kharazim's next Basic Attack increases his Attack Speed and Attack Range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Seven-Sided Strike
Heroic.shortText: Become Invulnerable and strike nearby Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Become Invulnerable and strike <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> times over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7%</c> of their maximum Health.

Heroic.name: Divine Palm
Heroic.shortText: Prevent an ally from death
Heroic.fullText: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1200</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> if they take fatal damage in the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Trait.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Choose between Transcendence, Iron Fists, and Insight from the Talents panel.</c>

Level7.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Movement Speed and move through units while in Safety Bubble. Additionally, Safety Bubble's cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Time to Krill
Level7.shortText: Basic Attacks slow enemies
Level7.fullText: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second and slow the target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. This effect can stack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.

Level10.name: March of the Murlocs
Level10.shortText: Swarm enemies with Murlocs
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and slows its target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Murlocs deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to Structures.

Level10.name: Octo-Grab
Level10.shortText: Stun and poke an enemy Hero
Level10.fullText: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds while he hits them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> damage a second.

Level13.name: Rejuvenating Bubble
Level13.fullText: Safety Bubble restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> of Murky's maximum Health.

Level13.name: Egg Shell
Level13.shortText: Egg placement or death grants Shield.
Level13.fullText: Upon casting Spawn Egg, or when one of his eggs is killed, Murky gains a Shield for an amount equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of Murky's current Health.

Level13.name: Fish Tank
Level13.fullText: Murky is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.

Level16.name: Toxic Buildup
Level16.shortText: Successive Basic Attacks cast Slime
Level16.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd </c>consecutive Basic Attack against an enemy Hero causes a free Slime to be cast upon them.

Level16.name: Fish Oil
Level16.shortText: Casts Slime at Pufferfish location
Level16.fullText: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.

Level16.name: Wrath of Cod
Level16.shortText: Increase Pufferfish damage on Heroes
Level16.fullText: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16%</c> of their maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Never-Ending Murlocs
Level20.shortText: March of the Murlocs can channel forever
Level20.fullText: March of the Murlocs can be channeled indefinitely, and will always last its base duration when canceled early. <n/><n/>In addition, it no longer deals reduced damage to Structures.

Level20.name: ... And a Shark Too!
Level20.shortText: Increase Octo-Grab's damage
Level20.fullText: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">13700%</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Level20.name: Making Inky
Level20.shortText: Reduced Slime cooldown
Level20.fullText: Reduces the cooldown of Slime by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Faster Fish
Level20.shortText: Pufferfish explodes faster
Level20.fullText: Pufferfish explodes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds faster.

Necromancer.name: Xul
Necromancer.title: Cryptic Necromancer
Necromancer.searchText: Xul Xuul Zuul Zul Zool Necromancer Human D2 Diablo 2 II Diablo2 Push Siege Root Slow Summoner Double Soak Offlaner
Necromancer.description: A Summoner who can push multiple lanes with ease.
Necromancer.infoText: From the recesses of the eastern jungles comes a man cloaked in mystery. As a member of the secretive Priests of Rathma, or the Necromancers, Xul wields powerful death magic and fights to preserve the delicate balance between order and chaos.

Basic.name: Spectral Scythe
Basic.shortText: Throw a scythe that damages enemies as it returns to Xul
Basic.fullText: Summon a scythe that travels to Xul after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">190</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies and spawning a Skeletal Warrior when hitting enemy Heroes.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.

Basic.name: Cursed Strikes
Basic.shortText: Basic Attacks deal damage in an area and reduce Attack Speed
Basic.fullText: Xul's Basic Attacks deal damage in a wide area and reduce the Attack Speed of Heroes and Summons by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds once triggered.

Basic.name: Bone Prison
Basic.shortText: Root an enemy in place
Basic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> second delay, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Root the target enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.  All nearby Skeletal Warriors will fixate on the target for their duration.

Heroic.name: Skeletal Mages
Heroic.shortText: Summon Frost Mages to damage and Slow enemies
Heroic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Summon <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">47</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second and Slow them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Last up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Poison Nova
Heroic.shortText: Poison enemies in a large area
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">630</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all enemies hit over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Raise Skeleton
Trait.shortText: Spawn Skeletal Warriors from Minions
Trait.fullText: When a nearby enemy Minion dies, it becomes a Skeletal Warrior with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health that attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">21</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and lasts up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds. Upon death, Skeletal Warriors deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.  Up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Skeletal Warriors can be active at once when spawned in this way.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.fullText: Activate to gain a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of Xul's maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Last up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Echoes of Death
Level13.fullText: Spectral Scythe spawns <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional scythes next to the first after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> damage.

Level13.name: Rapid Harvest

Level13.name: Amplify Damage

Level16.name: Decrepify

Level16.name: Bone Spear

Level20.name: Cold Hand of Death

Level20.name: Mortal Wound

Level20.name: Kalan's Edict

Level20.fullText: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c>.

NexusHunter.name: Qhira
NexusHunter.title: Realmless Bounty Hunter
NexusHunter.searchText: Human Nexus Hunter Mercenary Sword Chainblade Stun Ganker Dive Burst
NexusHunter.description: A brutal Melee Assassin who is adept at both beginning and ending fights.
NexusHunter.infoText: A sworn knight and holder of a singularity shard, Qhira's only desire is to seek out others who may have escaped the destruction of her doomed home realm, Iresia. While she searches, she gets by as a bounty hunter – a job she loathes, despite her exceptional skill.

Basic.name: Carnage
Basic.shortText: Unleash your blade to deal damage in an area in front of you
Basic.fullText: Unleash your sword in the target direction, continuously dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies caught in its path.

Basic.name: Blood Rage

Basic.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attack and Ability damage cause enemies to bleed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">44</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Stacks <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> times.<n/><n/>Qhira deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">32</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per enemy Hero affected. Damage and healing is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> per each additional stack on that Hero.

Basic.name: Revolving Sweep
Basic.shortText: Attach to an enemy Hero to rotate around and Stun them
Basic.fullText: Attach your sword on the first enemy Hero hit, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds. Once attached, Qhira becomes Immune to all effects, swinging around the target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.75</c> seconds and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">105</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies between you and the target.<n/><n/>Re-activate to send you to the target's location knocking them away, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">108</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Unrelenting Strikes

Upon expiring, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Final Strike

Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">410</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> against enemy Heroes who are below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health.

Trait.name: Grappling Hook

Trait.fullText: Qhira fires a grappling hook that pulls her to terrain it contacts. If an enemy Hero is hit, they take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Qhira launches at them, kicking them for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">108</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/>Can be used while Revolving Sweep is active.

Mount.name: Summon Mount

Level1.name: Fatal Wounds

Level1.fullText: While at maximum stacks, Blood Rage's bleed deals 30% additional damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health.Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage. Reward: After damaging Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage 150 times, Blood Rage's duration is increased by 2 seconds.

Level1.name: Finishing Touch

Level4.name: Ensnaring Swing
Level4.shortText: Revolving Sweep Slows enemies
Level4.fullText: The primary target of Revolving Sweep is Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> while Qhira is attached to them. Secondary targets hit by Revolving Sweep's swing are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Your Pain, My Gain
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacking Heroes grants Armor
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero causes Qhira to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Stacks <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.

Level7.name: The Thirst
Level7.shortText: Carnage increases Basic Attack damage, healing
Level7.fullText: Carnage heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. Anytime Carnage damages an enemy Hero, Qhira's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds against an enemy Hero deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> additional damage, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> times.

Level7.name: Healmonger
Level7.shortText: Blood Rage heals more against low Health
Level7.fullText: If Blood Rage damages an enemy Hero below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, it heals for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">210</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Level7.name: Siphoning Link
Level7.shortText: Revolving Sweep heals over time
Level7.fullText: Damaging an enemy Hero with Revolving Sweep's initial impact or swing causes Qhira to regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> times.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level10.name: Unrelenting Strikes
Level10.shortText: Deal damage and Stun nearby enemies
Level10.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">44</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Final Strike
Level10.shortText: Extend sword to deal finishing blow
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">410</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> against enemy Heroes who are below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health.

Level13.name: Chainsaw
Level13.fullText: Carnage's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster while an enemy Hero has maximum Blood Rage stacks.

Level13.name: Pulsing Pain
Level13.shortText: Increase Revolving Sweep damage to main target
Level13.fullText: Each additional enemy Hero hit by Revolving Sweep causes the primary target to take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">135</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level13.name: The Hunted
Level13.shortText: Consecutive Basic Attacks deal bonus damage
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero increases your Basic Attack damage against that Hero by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>. Stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> times and lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Bonus is reset if a different Hero is attacked.

Level16.name: Booming Kick
Level16.shortText: Revolving Sweep re-activation hits area
Level16.fullText: Increase the Stun duration of Revolving Sweep's re-activation by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds. Enemy Heroes around the primary target are also affected by Revolving Sweep's re-activation.

Level16.name: Lingering Ailment
Level16.shortText: Reduce enemy Hero Armor
Level16.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Revolving Sweep or by Grappling Hook have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Swing Life Away
Level16.shortText: Revolving Sweep recharges faster
Level16.fullText: Revolving Sweep's cooldown recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c> faster while Qhira is swinging around her target. She also gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after the re-activation impact.

Level20.name: Silent Killer
Level20.shortText: Unrelenting Strikes Silences
Level20.fullText: Hitting enemy Heroes with Unrelenting Strikes Silences them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds and reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Unleashed Potential
Level20.shortText: Final Strike refunds Ability cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Increase the damage to enemy Heroes under <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.<n/><n/>If an enemy Hero dies within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds of being hit by Final Strike, then reset the cooldowns of Final Strike and all of Qhira's Basic Abilities.

Level20.name: Utility Belt
Level20.shortText: Grappling Hook recharges faster
Level20.fullText: Grappling Hook's cooldown is reset when hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Revolving Sweep and recharges <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">900%</c> faster if Qhira hasn't taken damage within the last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: No Sanctuary
Level20.shortText: Hunt low Health enemies
Level20.fullText: Nearby enemy Heroes below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health are revealed and you gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed while an enemy Hero is revealed by you in this way.<n/><n/>Additionally, you deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> increased damage to these revealed enemies.

Nova.name: Nova
Nova.title: Dominion Ghost
Nova.searchText: Nova Terra Ghost Mage November Terran SC2 StarCraft 2 II Wings of Liberty WoL Heart of the Swarm HotS SC Covert Ops CO Star2 Starcraft2 Slow Cloak Stealth Burst Roam Ganker
Nova.description: A burst damage Mage who can ambush enemies from Stealth.
Nova.infoText: November "Nova" Terra is a ghost of the Terran Dominion and one of the most powerful psionic soldiers ever known. Nova is highly focused, determined, and extremely deadly. Even Jim Raynor wouldn't want to be caught in her crosshairs.

Basic.name: Snipe
Basic.shortText: Fire a shot and deal a large amount of damage to the first enemy hit
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Hitting an enemy Hero with Snipe permanently increases the damage of Snipe by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c>, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> damage bonus at maximum stacks. All stacks are lost if Snipe fails to hit an enemy.

Basic.name: Pinning Shot
Basic.shortText: Slow and damage an enemy
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to an enemy and Slow them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.25</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Holo Decoy
Basic.shortText: Create a hologram decoy of Nova
Basic.fullText: Create a Decoy for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of Nova's current Health that attacks enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of Nova's base damage. Whenever a Decoy takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.<n/><n/>Using this Ability does not break Stealth.

Heroic.name: Triple Tap
Heroic.shortText: Fire at a target 3 times
Heroic.fullText: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">372</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each.

Heroic.name: Precision Strike
Heroic.shortText: Area attack with unlimited range
Heroic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">435</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.

Trait.name: Permanent Cloak
Trait.shortText: Stealth and gain Move Speed while not attacking or taking damage
Trait.fullText: Gain Stealth when out of combat for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed while Stealthed.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Ghost Protocol
Activable.shortText: Instantly Stealth and spawn a Holo Decoy at your location
Activable.fullText: Activate to instantly grant Stealth to Nova and spawn a Holo Decoy at her location. Nova is Unrevealable for the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds when Stealthed by Ghost Protocol.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Covert Mission
Activable.shortText: Kill Minions or Heroes to bribe a Mercenary
Activable.fullText: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10 </c>stacks of Bribe. Use <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them.  Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c> stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Current number of Bribe stacks: </c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0</c>

Activable.name: Rewind
Activable.shortText: Activate to reset cooldowns
Activable.fullText: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

Level1.name: Longshot
Level1.shortText: Increases Pinning Shot range
Level1.fullText: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.3</c>.

Level1.name: Covert Ops
Level1.shortText: Stealth enhances Pinning Shot slow and cost
Level1.fullText: After being Stealthed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level1.name: Advanced Cloaking
Level1.shortText: Stealth grants Move Speed, Mana regen
Level1.fullText: After being Stealthed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> Mana per second.

Level4.name: Rapid Projection
Level4.shortText: Reduces Holo Decoy cooldown and Mana cost
Level4.fullText: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level4.name: Holo Stability
Level4.shortText: Increase Holo Decoy range, duration
Level4.fullText: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> and its duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">120%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Covert Mission
Level4.shortText: Kill Minions or Heroes to bribe a Mercenary
Level4.fullText: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10 </c>stacks of Bribe. Use <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c> stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.

Level7.name: Perfect Shot
Level7.shortText: Snipe hits reduce cooldown, refund Mana
Level7.fullText: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.

Level7.name: One in the Chamber
Level7.shortText: Using an Ability empowers next Basic Attack
Level7.fullText: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">65%</c> additional damage.

Level7.name: Anti-Armor Shells
Level7.shortText: Basic Attacks hit harder, reduce Physical Armor
Level7.fullText: Nova's Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250%</c> damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.

Level10.name: Triple Tap
Level10.shortText: Fire at a target 3 times
Level10.fullText: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">372</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each.

Level10.name: Precision Strike
Level10.shortText: Area attack with unlimited range
Level10.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">435</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.

Level13.name: Psionic Efficiency
Level13.fullText: Snipe's range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.

Level13.name: Double Tap
Level13.shortText: Pinning Shot gains a charge, cooldown increased
Level13.fullText: Pinning Shot now has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges, but its cooldown is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Ionic Force Field
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after losing Stealth.

Level16.name: Explosive Round
Level16.shortText: Snipe deals damage in an area
Level16.fullText: Snipe also deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90%</c> damage to enemies near the impact.

Level16.name: Crippling Shot
Level16.shortText: Pinning Shot lowers Armor
Level16.fullText: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> increased damage.

Level16.name: Lethal Decoy
Level16.shortText: Holo Decoy deals more damage
Level16.fullText: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of Nova's damage.

Level20.name: Fast Reload
Level20.shortText: Triple Tap cooldown resets on Hero kills
Level20.fullText: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.

Level20.name: Precision Barrage
Level20.shortText: Lower Precision Strike cooldown, gain charge
Level20.fullText: Precision Strike gains a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2nd</c> charge and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Apollo Suit
Level20.shortText: Reduce Permanent Cloak cooldown
Level20.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Rewind
Level20.shortText: Activate to reset cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.

Orphea.name: Orphea
Orphea.title: Heir of Raven Court
Orphea.searchText: Orphia Mage Nexus Daughter Stun Displace Escape Burst
Orphea.description: A ranged Assassin who dances around her enemies while using spells to empower her attacks.
Orphea.infoText: Rejecting the dark power her father had begun to consort with, Orphea tried to run away from the Raven Lord's influence. But after witnessing King's Crest fall to his machinations, she was convinced she needed to stand and fight. She now vows to protect the innocent--as a Hero of the Nexus.

Basic.name: Shadow Waltz
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in a line and dash after hitting a Hero
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">165</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line. <n/><n/>Hitting a Hero with Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, refunds <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Mana, and causes Orphea to dash a short distance upon moving.

Basic.name: Chomp
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in front of Orphea
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.625</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">305</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies in front of Orphea.

Basic.name: Dread
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in a line, erupting after a short delay
Basic.fullText: Release a wave of dread that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit. Dread erupts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds after reaching the end of its path, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Enemies hit by Dread's wave or eruption are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Crushing Jaws
Heroic.shortText: Pull, damage, and Stun enemies in an area
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, pull enemies in an area towards the center, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Eternal Feast
Heroic.shortText: Damage enemies in an area repeatedly
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">210</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.

Trait.name: Overflowing Chaos
Trait.shortText: Basic Abilities against enemy Heroes grant Chaos
Trait.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Chaos. Chaos can stack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.<n/><n/>While Orphea has Chaos, her Basic Attacks against Heroes consume all Chaos, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> increased damage per stack, and healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage dealt.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Trait.name: Overflowing Chaos
Trait.shortText: Basic Abilities against enemy Heroes grant Chaos
Trait.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Chaos. Chaos can stack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.<n/><n/>While Orphea has Chaos, her Basic Attacks against Heroes consumes all Chaos, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> increased damage per stack, and healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the damage dealt.

Activable.name: Lurking Terror
Activable.shortText: Activate to cast Chomp from Dread's eruption
Activable.fullText: After Dread erupts and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after, activate to cast Chomp from the eruption area. Enemy Heroes hit by this Chomp are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Final Toccata
Activable.shortText: Shadow Waltz cooldown resets after dashing
Activable.fullText: Activate to instantly reset the cooldown of Shadow Waltz. For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, dashing with Shadow Waltz resets its cooldown and increases the duration of Final Toccata by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level1.name: En Pointe
Level1.shortText: Extra Shadow Waltz damage at its end
Level1.fullText: Shadow Waltz deals an increased <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90%</c> damage to enemies hit by its end and grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> additional Chaos.

Level1.name: Growing Nightmare
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Empower Dread eruption
Level1.fullText: Increase Dread's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. <n/><n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> enemy Heroes with a single cast of Dread's eruption.<n/><n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Reward:</c> Permanently increase Dread's eruption damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and increase the Slow amount of Dread's eruption by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level1.name: Ancestral Strength
Level1.shortText: Abilities deal more damage to disabled enemies
Level1.fullText: Non-Heroic Abilities deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> more damage to Stunned, Rooted, Silenced or Slowed enemies. Enemy Heroes who are hit with Overflowing Chaos are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Allegrissimo
Level4.shortText: Reduce Shadow Waltz cooldown
Level4.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Shadow Waltz by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.<n/><n/>Hitting Heroes with the end of Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Backbiter
Level4.shortText: Orphea dashes back after Chomp, gain Health
Level4.fullText: If Chomp hits a Hero, Orphea immediately dashes a short distance backwards.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> maximum Health.

Level4.name: Chaotic Assault
Level4.shortText: Increase Overflowing Chaos damage
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes while having <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks of Chaos deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> bonus damage.

Level7.name: Insatiable
Level7.shortText: Hitting a Hero reduces Chomp's cooldown
Level7.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Chomp sets its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Ravenous Hunger
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Chomp kills increase damage, heals
Level7.fullText: Quest: Minions that die within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Chomp permanently increase its damage by 2 and heal Orphea for 60 (+4% per level). Heroes that die increase its damage by 40 and heal Orphea for 25% of her maximum Health.

Level7.name: Mind Devourer
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Dread damage, reduce cooldown
Level7.fullText: Quest: Hitting Heroes with Dread increases its damage by 5, up to 150.Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, hitting an enemy Hero with Dread's eruption sets its cooldown to 6 seconds and refunds 50 Mana.

Level10.name: Eternal Feast
Level10.shortText: Damage enemies in an area repeatedly
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">210</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.

Level10.name: Crushing Jaws
Level10.shortText: Pull, damage, and Stun enemies in an area
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, pull enemies in an area towards the center, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Determination
Level13.shortText: Shadow Waltz grants Spell Armor after dashing
Level13.fullText: After dashing with Shadow Waltz, Orphea gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times. While Orphea has Determination, her Physical damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level13.name: Abyssal Symbiosis
Level13.shortText: Chomp hitting Heroes grants more Chaos, Shield
Level13.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Chomp instantly grants Orphea maximum Chaos and a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">170</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Invasive Miasma
Level13.shortText: Activate Overflowing Chaos to damage, heal
Level13.fullText: Activate to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to all nearby enemies after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. For each Hero hit, heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">182</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Chaos.

Level16.name: Bond of Anguish
Level16.shortText: Shadow Waltz steals percent Health
Level16.fullText: Shadow Waltz deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of their maximum Health, healing Orphea for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of damage dealt.

Level16.name: Dead Magic
Level16.shortText: Chaos Basic Attacks ignore Armor, area damage
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks that consume Chaos ignore Armor and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Spell Damage to the target and all enemies around them.

Level16.name: Lurking Terror
Level16.shortText: Activate to cast Chomp from Dread's eruption
Level16.fullText: After Dread erupts and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after, activate to cast Chomp from the eruption area. Enemy Heroes hit by this Chomp are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Monster Within
Level20.shortText: Eternal Feast grants Chaos, reduce cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Eternal Feast grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Chaos each time it hits a Hero. While Eternal Feast is active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds afterwards, Orphea's Basic Abilities recharge <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> faster.

Level20.name: Engulfing Oblivion
Level20.shortText: Crushing Jaws lowers Armor, reduces cooldown
Level20.fullText: Crushing Jaws reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Takedowns set its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Eldritch Conduit
Level20.shortText: Consuming Chaos grants Spell Power
Level20.fullText: Each Chaos consumed increases Orphea's Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. After reaching the maximum bonus, the Spell Power is increased by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Final Toccata
Level20.shortText: Shadow Waltz cooldown resets after dashing
Level20.fullText: Activate to instantly reset the cooldown of Shadow Waltz. For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, dashing with Shadow Waltz resets its cooldown and increases the duration of Final Toccata by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Probius.name: Probius
Probius.title: Curious Probe
Probius.searchText: Probe Protoss SC SC1 StarCraft II 2 SC2 Star2 Starcraft2 Mage Slow Summoner Burst Builder
Probius.description: A high damage Summoner that must stay near Pylons to be effective.
Probius.infoText: Since his activation, Probius has always wanted to prove himself. He may be small, but he made a big difference by warping in a critical pylon during the retaking of Aiur. As the bravest of probes, Probius is eager to fulfill his purpose in the Nexus.

Basic.name: Disruption Pulse
Basic.shortText: Fire a missile in a line that damages enemies and detonates Warp Rifts
Basic.fullText: Fire a burst of energy forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">142</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to all enemies it passes through.<n/><n/>Hitting the center of a Warp Rift will cause it to explode, dealing additional damage.

Basic.name: Warp Rift
Basic.shortText: Create a rift that Slows enemies and can be detonated with Disruption Pulse
Basic.fullText: Open an unstable Warp Rift at a location that takes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25 </c>seconds to arm, which then Slows nearby enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> lasting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Armed Warp Rifts explode when they expire or when hit by Disruption Pulse, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">261</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.

Basic.name: Photon Cannon
Basic.shortText: Create a cannon that attacks nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Warp in a Photon Cannon that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">105</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">13</c> seconds.<n/><n/>While within a Pylon's Power Field, Photon Cannons gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and reveal nearby enemies.

Heroic.name: Pylon Overcharge
Heroic.shortText: Weaponize Pylons
Heroic.fullText: For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.

Heroic.name: Null Gate
Heroic.shortText: Create a Slowing barrier
Heroic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">76</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> for as long as they remain in contact with it.

Trait.name: Warp In Pylon
Trait.shortText: Summon a Pylon that renergizes Probius and allows the construction of other buildings
Trait.fullText: Warp in a Pylon that generates a Power Field and grants vision of the surrounding area. Probius only regenerates mana while inside a Power Field. Enemy Heroes and Minions drop Minerals when killed. Gather Minerals to reduce the cooldown of Warp In Pylon by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2 </c>Pylons can be active at a time.

Mount.name: Worker Rush
Mount.shortText: Move faster passively. Activate to move even faster.
Mount.fullText: Activate to gain an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Taking damage ends this effect early. Worker Rush is always active while at the Hall of Storms.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Probius moves <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> faster by hovering over the ground.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Level1.name: Echo Pulse
Level1.shortText: Disruption Pulse returns to Probius
Level1.fullText: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds after reaching its target, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> damage on the return trip.

Level1.name: Warp Resonance
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest"> Quest:</c> Detonate Warp Rift on Heroes
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.Reward: After hitting 8 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by 120.Reward: After hitting 16 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.

Level1.name: Gather Minerals
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest: </c>Collect Minerals to empower Photon Cannons
Level1.fullText: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by 8, up to 560. Reward: After collecting 70 Minerals, Photon Cannons deal 35% more damage.

Level4.name: Photon Barrier
Level4.shortText: Gain Spell Armor while Photon Cannon is Active
Level4.fullText: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Spell Armor.

Level4.name: Turbo Charged
Level4.shortText: Move faster and decrease Worker Rush's cooldown
Level4.fullText: Worker Rush grants an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">14 </c>seconds.

Level4.name: Shield Capacitor
Level4.shortText: Gain permanent Shields
Level4.fullText: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10% </c>of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.

Level7.name: Particle Accelerator
Level7.shortText: Disruption Pulse can fire additional pulses
Level7.fullText: After hitting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> additional pulses that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">78</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage from the impact location in different directions.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Rift Shock
Level7.shortText: Detonate Warp Rifts quickly for extra damage
Level7.fullText: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second of it arming deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">105</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+5% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Tower Defense
Level7.shortText: Reduce Photon Cannon cooldown
Level7.fullText: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3.5</c> seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.

Level10.name: Pylon Overcharge
Level10.shortText: Weaponize Pylons
Level10.fullText: For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.

Level10.name: Null Gate
Level10.shortText: Create a Slowing barrier
Level10.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">76</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c> for as long as they remain in contact with it.

Level13.name: Aggressive Matrix
Level13.fullText: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> increased Attack Damage.

Level13.name: Power Overflowing
Level13.shortText: Power Fields give Spell Power, Mana
Level13.fullText: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes<c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> 10%</c> increased Spell Power and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Mana per second.

Level13.name: Shield Battery
Level13.fullText: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">28</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Shields per second, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">112</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Shields persist for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.

Level16.name: Quantum Entanglement
Level16.shortText: Warp Rift's slow lingers
Level16.fullText: Enemies continue to be Slowed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.

Level16.name: Gravity Well
Level16.shortText: Increase Warp Rift Slow amount in center
Level16.fullText: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level16.name: Interference
Level16.shortText: Warp Rift explosions reduce enemy Spell Power and knock back
Level16.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.

Level20.name: Construct Additional Pylons
Level20.shortText: Increase max Pylon count and Pylon Overcharge damage
Level20.fullText: Probius can now have up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level20.name: Gate Keeper
Level20.shortText: Indefinite duration while in Pylon Power
Level20.fullText: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.

Level20.name: Shoot 'Em Up
Level20.shortText: Increase Disruption Pulse damage against Heroes
Level20.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Probius Loop
Level20.shortText: Create new Warp Rifts by hitting Heroes with explosions
Level20.fullText: Whenever a Rift explosion hits <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.

Ragnaros.name: Ragnaros
Ragnaros.title: The Firelord
Ragnaros.searchText: Ragnaros Firelord Molten Core MC Elemental WoW World of Warcraft Cataclysm Hearthstone HS Stun Offlaner
Ragnaros.description: A Bruiser that can nullify enemy pushes against his Forts and Keeps.
Ragnaros.infoText: As the lord of Azeroth’s fire elementals, Ragnaros desires nothing more than to burn the world to ash. Banished to the Firelands eons ago, the Firelord now turns his rage toward the Nexus, intent on incinerating everything and everyone within it.

Basic.name: Empower Sulfuras
Basic.shortText: Deal damage in an area and heal Ragnaros
Basic.fullText: Ragnaros's next Basic Attack is instant, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">191</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Ability damage in an area, and heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage dealt. Healing doubled versus Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Molten Core: Molten Swing</c><n/>Stun and damage nearby enemies.

Basic.name: Living Meteor
Basic.shortText: Summon a meteor to damage enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>Summon a meteor at the target point that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">68</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, then rolls in the target direction dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">272</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Molten Core: Meteor Shower</c><n/>Drop a line of meteor impacts.

Basic.name: Blast Wave
Basic.shortText: Cause a delayed explosion around an ally
Basic.fullText: Ignite Ragnaros or an ally, granting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds before exploding dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">104</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Molten Core: Explosive Rune</c><n/>Cause a delayed explosion in a large area.

Heroic.name: Sulfuras Smash
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Stun enemies in an area
Heroic.fullText: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">250</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Enemies in the center take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">594</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage instead and are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Lava Wave
Heroic.shortText: Send a wave of lava down a lane
Heroic.fullText: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> versus Heroes.

Trait.name: Molten Core
Trait.shortText: Take over a destroyed or Allied fort to unleash Ragnaros's full power
Trait.fullText: Channel on an allied or destroyed Fort or Keep to replace it with Ragnaros's ultimate form, temporarily gaining new Abilities, having <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3996</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health that burns away over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Ragnaros returns to his normal form upon losing all Health in Molten Core.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Raynor.name: Raynor
Raynor.title: Renegade Commander
Raynor.searchText: Raynor General James Jimmy Commander Marine Terran HotS Heart of the Swarm SC SC1 StarCraft II 2 SC2 Brood War BW LotV Legacy Void Wings Liberty WoL Star2 Starcraft2 Displace Slow Sustain Marksman
Raynor.description: A Physical Damage Assassin that can keep enemies away.
Raynor.infoText: Ex-Confederate Marshal James Raynor has stood against whatever the universe can throw at him and survived. He stands as a beacon of hope among enigmatic aliens and monsters, fighting for justice in a cold uncaring universe.

Basic.name: Penetrating Round
Basic.shortText: Fire a shot damaging, knocking back, and Slowing enemies
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">205</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, knock back, and Slow enemies in a line by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Enemies close to Raynor are knocked back further.

Basic.name: Inspire
Basic.shortText: Reset and empower Basic Attacks
Basic.fullText: Raynor and all nearby allied Minions and Mercenaries gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Casting Inspire resets Raynor's Basic Attack cooldown.

Basic.name: Adrenaline Rush
Basic.shortText: Activate to heal
Basic.fullText: Heal Raynor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of his maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Raynor's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second against Heroes.

Heroic.name: Hyperion
Heroic.shortText: Call down a strafing Battlecruiser
Heroic.fullText: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds, hitting up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every second. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">794</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Heroic.name: Raynor's Raider
Heroic.shortText: Summon a Banshee escort
Heroic.fullText: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">84</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second and regenerates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.<n/><n/>The Banshee respawns automatically after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> seconds.

Trait.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4th</c> Basic Attack splashes in a small area and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> more damage to the main target.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone

Heroic.fullText: Order the Banshee to attack an enemy.

Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">794</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.
