Level16.name: Bounty Hunter
Level16.shortText: Empowers Give 'Em Some Pepper, grants Armor
Level16.fullText: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. <n/><n/>Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.

Level20.name: Cavalry's Arrived
Level20.shortText: Mark targets for the Hyperion
Level20.fullText: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> increased damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Dusk Wing
Level20.shortText: Upgrade Raynor's Raider
Level20.fullText: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c>.

Level20.name: Raiders Roll
Level20.shortText: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable
Level20.fullText: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> Health.

Level20.name: Sergeant Pepper
Level20.shortText: Give 'Em Some Pepper every 3rd attack
Level20.fullText: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Basic Attacks.

Level20.name: Execute Orders
Level20.shortText: Retaliate upon death
Level20.fullText: When Raynor is killed, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero. It lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds, hitting up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> enemy Heroes of the lowest Health in the area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">66</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every second. Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, it will also fire its Yamato Cannon at the lowest Health enemy Hero, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">395</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Raynor's death timer by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> seconds.

Rehgar.name: Rehgar
Rehgar.title: Shaman of the Earthen Ring
Rehgar.searchText: Rehgar Regar Earthfury Orc Shaman Horde WoW World of Warcraft Legion Slow Camps Sustain Dive Escape Healer
Rehgar.description: A well-rounded Healer that pairs well with Melee allies.
Rehgar.infoText: Rehgar Earthfury has seen his share of combat, both as a gladiator, and a master of his own team. Now, having put that life aside, he serves as a simple shaman of the Earthen Ring, earning his redemption by healing the lands of Azeroth.

Basic.name: Chain Heal
Basic.shortText: Create a healing wave that jumps between allies
Basic.fullText: Heal an ally with a wave of healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">260</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. The wave then bounces <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times to nearby allies within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> range, restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">260</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health to them.

Basic.name: Lightning Shield
Basic.shortText: Imbue target ally with lightning, causing damage to nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Imbue an ally with lightning dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">64</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second to nearby enemies. Each enemy hit restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Mana to Rehgar. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Earthbind Totem
Basic.shortText: Creates a totem that Slows nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Create a totem that Slows nearby enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>. The totem has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">260</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health and lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Bloodlust
Heroic.shortText: Give allied Heroes Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Life Steal
Heroic.fullText: Grant nearby allied Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> Movement Speed and causes them to heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Ancestral Healing
Heroic.shortText: Significantly heal allied Hero
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, heal an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Trait.name: Purge
Trait.shortText: Makes target ally Unstoppable, Slows enemy Hero
Trait.fullText: When used on an allied Hero, make them Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. When used on an enemy Hero, Slow them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80%</c>, decaying over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Cannot be cast on yourself.

Mount.name: Ghost Wolf
Mount.shortText: Transform into a Ghost Wolf
Mount.fullText: Instead of using a mount, Rehgar transforms into a Ghost Wolf with <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> increased Movement Speed. Basic Attacks in Ghost Wolf form cause him to lunge at his target and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> bonus damage. Dealing damage, using Abilities, and channeling cancels Ghost Wolf form.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Totemic Projection
Basic.shortText: Instantly move Earthbind Totem to a new location
Basic.fullText: Instantly move Earthbind Totem to a new location.

Mount.name: Ghost Wolf Deactivate
Mount.fullText: End Ghost Wolf.

Activable.name: Healing Totem
Activable.shortText: Activate to place a ward which heals in an area
Activable.fullText: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health and lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Elemental Conduit
Activable.shortText: Gain Lightning Shield, Shield nearby allies
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. <n/><n/>For up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Stormcaller
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Lightning Shield increases Health, Mana
Level1.fullText: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by 25%. Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by 2 and Mana by 1, stacking up to 200 times.

Level1.name: Colossal Totem
Level1.shortText: Increases Earthbind Totem Health, area, duration
Level1.fullText: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, and Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level1.name: Feral Heart
Level1.shortText: Increase Ghost Wolf Movement Speed, grants Armor
Level1.fullText: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for the first second, then falls to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level4.name: Earthliving Enchant
Level4.shortText: Empowers Chain Heal on low Health Heroes
Level4.fullText: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, they are healed an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">160</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Electric Charge
Level4.shortText: Lightning Shield heals, increases Movement Speed
Level4.fullText: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.<n/><n/>While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> increased Movement Speed.

Level4.name: Healing Totem
Level4.shortText: Activate to place a ward which heals in an area
Level4.fullText: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health and lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Grounded Totem
Level7.shortText: Empower Earthbind Totem
Level7.fullText: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> and their Spell Power reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Earthbind Totem's cast range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c>.

Level7.name: Purification
Level7.shortText: Empower Purge
Level7.fullText: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.<n/><n/>Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">330</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to Shields and reduces healing received by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Purge's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Blood and Thunder
Level7.shortText: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns
Level7.fullText: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> of Rehgar's maximum Mana.

Level10.name: Ancestral Healing
Level10.shortText: Significantly heal allied Hero
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, heal an allied Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Level10.name: Bloodlust
Level10.shortText: Give allied Heroes Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Life Steal
Level10.fullText: Grant nearby allied Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> Movement Speed and causes them to heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Tidal Waves
Level13.shortText: Reduces Chain Heal cooldown, Mana cost
Level13.fullText: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c>.

Level13.name: Earth Shield
Level13.fullText: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">14%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Wellspring
Level13.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of its normal amount.

Level16.name: Rising Storm
Level16.shortText: Increase Lightning Shield damage, duration
Level16.fullText: Every time a Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>. Stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> times.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Earthgrasp Totem
Level16.shortText: Earthbind Totem placement damages, increased Slow
Level16.fullText: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slows nearby enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">90%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level16.name: Hunger of the Wolf
Level16.shortText: Ghost Wolf attacks do extra damage and heal
Level16.fullText: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> of his maximum Health.

Level20.name: Farseer's Blessing
Level20.shortText: Heals a second time and in an area
Level20.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">590</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Level20.name: Gladiator's War Shout
Level20.shortText: Increases Bloodlust Duration, Range
Level20.fullText: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level20.name: Elemental Conduit
Level20.shortText: Gain Lightning Shield, Shield nearby allies
Level20.fullText: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. <n/><n/>For up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Pit Fighter
Level20.shortText: Gain Attack Damage, Spellpower near Allies
Level20.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> increased Attack Damage and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> stacks. <n/><n/>While at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> faster.

Rexxar.name: Rexxar
Rexxar.title: Champion of the Horde
Rexxar.searchText: Rexxar Rexar Misha Chieftan Beastmaster Hunter Half Orc Ogre Horde WoW World of Warcraft 3 War3 WC3 Warcraft3 III Frozen Throne FT Burning Crusade BC Warlords Draenor WoD Legion Hearthstone HS BFA Battle for Azeroth Slow Stun CC Initiation Offlaner
Rexxar.description: A Bruiser that with his bear, Misha, expertly controls areas of the battleground.
Rexxar.infoText: It was a strange twist of fate that led the wandering half-ogre Rexxar to the fledgling city of Orgrimmar. With his aid, Thrall and the Horde were able to secure their homeland and defend it from the invading forces of Lord Admiral Daelin Proudmoore.

Basic.name: Spirit Swoop
Basic.shortText: Launch a hawk to damage enemies and slow them
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">141</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line, slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Misha, Charge!
Basic.shortText: Order Misha to charge, damaging and stunning enemies
Basic.fullText: Misha charges in a line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and stunning enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Mend Pet
Basic.shortText: Heal Misha over time
Basic.fullText: Heal Misha for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">714</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Unleash the Boars
Heroic.shortText: Send a pack of boars to hunt enemy Heroes
Heroic.fullText: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Bestial Wrath
Heroic.shortText: Increases Misha's Basic Attacks
Heroic.fullText: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Misha, Focus!
Trait.shortText: Command Misha to move or attack
Trait.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Misha gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> move speed. <n/><n/>Command Misha to attack a specific enemy or move to a point and wait.<n/><n/>Targeting Rexxar commands Misha to retreat to his position, gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> move speed until she reaches Rexxar.<n/><n/>Targeting Misha commands her to hold her current position.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Feign Death Cancel
Activable.fullText: <n/><s val="8783e6" hlt-name="StandardTooltip">Cancel Feign Death.</s>

Activable.name: Flare
Activable.shortText: Gain vision of an area
Activable.fullText: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Feign Death
Activable.shortText: Become Invulnerable and control Misha
Activable.fullText: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. During this time you control Misha.

Activable.name: Primal Intimidation
Activable.shortText: Activate to slow enemy Attack and Move speed
Activable.fullText: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5 </c>seconds.

Activable.name: Hardened Skin
Activable.shortText: Rexxar and Misha gain massive Armor
Activable.fullText: Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level1.name: Bird of Prey
Level1.shortText: Increases Spirit Swoop damage to Minions
Level1.fullText: Increases Spirit Swoop's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> to Minions.

Level1.name: Easy Prey
Level1.shortText: Misha is more effective against Minions and Mercs
Level1.fullText: Increases Misha's basic attack damage to Minions and Mercenaries by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c>, and Misha gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level1.name: Flare
Level1.shortText: Gain vision of an area
Level1.fullText: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Hungry Bear
Level4.shortText: Misha's Basic Attacks heal her
Level4.fullText: Misha's Basic Attacks heal her for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4.5%</c> of her maximum Health.

Level4.name: Hunter-Gatherer
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes grant Health Regen
Level4.fullText: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Rexxar and Misha's Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 25 per second. Reward: After gathering 25 Globes, Rexxar and Misha gain 15 Armor.

Level4.name: Grizzled Fortitude
Level4.shortText: Periodically gain Physical Armor
Level4.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges. Both Rexxar and Misha have their own charges.

Level4.name: Animal Husbandry
Level4.shortText: Max Health increase over time
Level4.fullText: Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Maximum Health every second Rexxar remains alive. These bonuses are lost on Rexxar's death.

Level7.name: Crippling Talons
Level7.shortText: Increases Spirit Swoop slow amount and duration
Level7.fullText: Increases Spirit Swoop's slow amount to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and its duration to<c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> 3.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Taking Flight
Level7.shortText: Increases Spirit Swoop range, returns Mana
Level7.fullText: Increases Spirit Swoop's range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. If Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, the Mana cost is refunded and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Aspect of the Beast
Level7.shortText: Misha's Basic Attacks lower Misha, Charge! cooldown
Level7.fullText: Misha's Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Misha, Charge! by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level10.name: Bestial Wrath
Level10.shortText: Increases Misha's Basic Attacks
Level10.fullText: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Unleash the Boars
Level10.shortText: Send a pack of boars to hunt enemy Heroes
Level10.fullText: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Aspect of the Hawk
Level13.fullText: When Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, Rexxar gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Misha's Basic Attacks increase the duration of this buff by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Dire Beast
Level13.shortText: Basic Attacks increase damage of Misha, Charge!
Level13.fullText: Rexxar and Misha's Basic Attacks increase the damage of the next Misha, Charge! by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>, stacking up to a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> bonus.

Level13.name: Wildfire Bear
Level13.shortText: Misha deals damage to nearby enemies
Level13.fullText: Misha deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">28</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies.

Level16.name: Thrill of the Hunt
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks increase Move Speed
Level16.fullText: Rexxar's Basic Attacks increase both his and Misha's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Primal Intimidation
Level16.shortText: Activate to slow enemy Attack and Move speed
Level16.fullText: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5 </c>seconds.

Level16.name: Feign Death
Level16.shortText: Become Invulnerable and control Misha
Level16.fullText: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. During this time you control Misha.

Level20.name: Spirit Bond
Level20.shortText: Misha's Basic Attacks heal Rexxar
Level20.fullText: Increases the duration of Bestial Wrath by<c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> 50%</c> and Misha's Basic Attacks heal Rexxar for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of her damage dealt during Bestial Wrath.

Level20.name: Kill Command
Level20.shortText: Unleash the Boars deals more damage and roots
Level20.fullText: Unleash the Boars deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and Roots for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Frenzy of Kalimdor
Level20.shortText: Rexxar's Basic Attacks deal more damage, Misha's attacks slow
Level20.fullText: Rexxar's Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> more damage, and Misha's Basic Attacks slow the target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Hardened Skin
Level20.shortText: Rexxar and Misha gain massive Armor
Level20.fullText: Rexxar and Misha gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Basic.name: Misha, Charge!
Basic.shortText: Order Misha to charge, damaging and stunning enemies
Basic.fullText: Misha charges in a line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and stunning enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Samuro.name: Samuro
Samuro.title: The Blademaster
Samuro.searchText: Samuro Orc Blademaster Horde Warcraft III 3 War3 Warcraft3 WC3 Frozen Throne FT WoW Camps Ganker Cloak Stealth Roam
Samuro.description: A stealthed Assassin that's great at capturing Mercenary camps and is difficult to kill.
Samuro.infoText: Samuro, the last remaining blademaster to wear the banner of the Burning Blade, is on a warrior's pilgrimage in search of vengeance and redemption for his fallen clan. It will be a long journey, but he has sworn an oath to restore his clan's honor.

Basic.name: Mirror Image
Basic.shortText: Create Mirror Images to confuse and attack enemies
Basic.fullText: Teleport a short distance in the direction of the mouse cursor, creating <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Mirror Image in the opposite direction with as much Health as Samuro, each dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">11</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage with their Basic Attacks. Whenever an Image takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.<n/><n/>Mirror Images last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds, and up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> Mirror Images can be active at a time. Each time they or Samuro hit an enemy Hero with their Basic Attack, their duration is extended by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Using Mirror Image removes most negative effects from Samuro.

Basic.name: Critical Strike
Basic.shortText: Critically Strike for increased damage.
Basic.fullText: Activate to cause Samuro and his Mirror Images next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds to be a Critical Strike, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> additional damage. Stealth is not broken when activated.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Samuro and his Images also deal a Critical Strike every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4th</c> Basic Attack.

Basic.name: Wind Walk
Basic.shortText: Become Stealthed and gain Movement Speed
Basic.fullText: Grant Samuro Stealth for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds or until he attacks, uses an Ability, or takes damage.<n/><n/>While Stealthed, Samuro heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of his maximum Health every second, his Movement Speed is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> and he can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.<n/><n/>Samuro is Unrevealable for the first <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second of Wind Walk.

Heroic.name: Bladestorm
Heroic.shortText: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force
Heroic.fullText: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, granting him <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies.

Heroic.name: Illusion Master
Heroic.shortText: Mirror Images can be controlled
Heroic.fullText: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Image Transmission
Trait.shortText: Increase Movement Speed when attacking Heroes
Trait.fullText: Activate to switch places with a target Mirror Image, removing most negative effects from Samuro and all Mirror Images.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Advancing Strikes</s><n/><n/>Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Select Samuro
Activable.shortText: Select Samuro
Activable.fullText: <s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Select Samuro</s><n/><n/>Issue orders to Samuro only.

Activable.name: Select All
Activable.shortText: Select All
Activable.fullText: <s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Select All</s><n/><n/>Issue orders to Samuro and all Mirror Images.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Heroic.name: Bladestorm Cancel
Heroic.fullText: <s val="8783e6" hlt-name="StandardTooltip">Cancel Bladestorm.</s>

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Level1.name: Way of Illusion
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Image Critical Strikes empower Basic Attacks
Level1.fullText: Quest: Every time a Mirror Image Critically Strikes a Hero, Samuro gains 0.25 Attack Damage, up to 10.Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Samuro gains an additional 30 Attack Damage.

Level1.name: Way of the Blade
Level1.shortText: Critical Strike happens more often
Level1.fullText: Critical Strike now happens for Samuro and his Mirror Images every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3rd</c> Basic Attack. <n/><n/>Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes from Samuro or his Mirror Images reduces their Physical Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.25</c> seconds, up to a maximum reduction of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Physical Armor.

Level1.name: Way of the Wind
Level1.shortText: Wind Walk grants Move Speed, restores Health
Level1.fullText: After activating or exiting Wind Walk, Samuro gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Activating Wind Walk instantly heals Samuro for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of his maximum Health.

Level4.name: Mirage
Level4.shortText: Mirror Image grants Spell Armor
Level4.fullText: Mirror Image grants Samuro and his Images <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Spell Armor against the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level4.name: One With The Wind
Level4.shortText: Gain Armor during Wind Walk
Level4.fullText: While Samuro has Wind Walk active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after breaking it, both he and his Mirror Images gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor, taking <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> reduced damage from all sources.

Level4.name: Deflection
Level4.shortText: Advancing Strikes grants Physical Armor
Level4.fullText: Advancing Strikes grants Samuro and his Mirror Images <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Physical Armor.

Level7.name: Burning Blade
Level7.shortText: Critical Strike deals area damage
Level7.fullText: Critical Strikes from Samuro or his Mirror Images deal bonus Spell Damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of their Basic Attack damage to the target and other nearby enemies.

Level7.name: Phantom Pain
Level7.shortText: Critical Strikes reduce Image Transmission cooldown
Level7.fullText: Samuro's Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes reduce Image Transmission's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> more damage for each active Mirror Image.

Level7.name: Crushing Blows
Level7.shortText: Critical Strikes increase Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: Samuro's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce Critical Strike's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level10.name: Bladestorm
Level10.shortText: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force
Level10.fullText: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, granting him <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">180</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies.

Level10.name: Illusion Master
Level10.shortText: Mirror Images can be controlled
Level10.fullText: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Mirrored Steel
Level13.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Mirror Image cooldown
Level13.fullText: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Mirror Image by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Kawarimi
Level13.fullText: Wind Walk creates a Mirror Image at Samuro's location that will continue whatever he was doing.

Level13.name: Shukuchi
Level13.shortText: Wind Walk teleports a short distance
Level13.fullText: Wind Walk teleports Samuro a short distance in the direction he's currently facing.

Level16.name: Merciless Strikes
Level16.shortText: Critically Strike always happens on disabled targets
Level16.fullText: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemies are always Critical Strikes.

Level16.name: Harsh Winds
Level16.shortText: Attacks from Wind Walk increase damage
Level16.fullText: If Wind Walk is broken by Samuro attacking an enemy Hero, he deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> additional damage to that target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Press the Attack
Level16.shortText: Advancing Strikes increases Attack Speed
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks from Samuro or his Mirror Images against enemy Heroes or while Advancing Strikes is active increases their Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.<n/><n/>These bonuses are lost when losing Advancing Strikes.

Level20.name: Dance Of Death
Level20.shortText: Images use Bladestorm, can reset cooldown
Level20.fullText: Mirror Images use Bladestorm when Samuro does, but for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c> damage. If Samuro hits at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> enemy Heroes with Bladestorm, then reset its cooldown.

Level20.name: Three Blade Style
Level20.shortText: Images have increased Health and Duration
Level20.fullText: Samuro's Mirror Images only deal half of the damage they take to themselves, effectively increasing their Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>, and their duration is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">16</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Wind Strider
Level20.shortText: Greatly reduce Wind Walk cooldown
Level20.fullText: Wind Walk's cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Blademaster’s Pursuit
Level20.shortText: Increase Advancing Strikes Move Speed, duration
Level20.fullText: Advancing Strikes grants an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed for Samuro and his Mirror Images, and its duration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

SgtHammer.name: Sgt. Hammer
SgtHammer.title: Siege Tank Operator
SgtHammer.searchText: Sgt. Hammer Sergeant SgtHammer Sgt Siege Tank Terran Heroes of the Storm StarCraft II SC 2 SC2 Legacy of the Void LotV Star2 Starcraft2 Displace Slow Siege Push Escape Marksman
SgtHammer.description: A long-range, Physical Damage dealer that needs protection from allies.
SgtHammer.infoText: Sergeant Bama "the Hammer" Kowalski has served some of the toughest tours around the Koprulu sector. The roar of her siege tank's shock cannon strikes fear right into the heart of the toughest of warriors... including some of her allies.

Basic.name: Spider Mines
Basic.shortText: Create mines that slow and damage enemies on contact
Basic.fullText: Create <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> mines that arm after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds. Mines detonate when an enemy comes in range, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Siege Mode:</c> Cast range increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Basic.name: Concussive Blast
Basic.shortText: Knock back and damage enemies
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">141</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in front of Sgt. Hammer and knock them back.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Siege Mode:</c> Radius increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Basic.name: Neosteel Plating
Basic.shortText: Gain temporary Armor
Basic.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Siege Mode:</c> Grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more Armor.

Heroic.name: Napalm Strike
Heroic.shortText: Fire damaging napalm at enemies
Heroic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">164</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Blunt Force Gun
Heroic.shortText: Fire a large bullet across the map
Heroic.fullText: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+3% per level)</c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> </c>damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.

Trait.name: Siege Mode
Trait.shortText: Become immobile to increase range and empower Basic Attacks
Trait.fullText: Activate to enter Siege Mode. While in Siege Mode, Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage, have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> increased range, and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of their damage as splash damage around the target.

Mount.name: Thrusters
Mount.shortText: Activate to gain a burst of Movement Speed
Mount.fullText: Increase Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Thrusters are always active while at the Hall of Storms. Activating Thrusters cancels Siege Mode.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Spider Mines
Basic.shortText: Create mines that slow and damage enemies on contact
Basic.fullText: Create <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> mines that arm after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds. Mines detonate when an enemy comes in range, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ffff8a">Siege Mode:</c> Cast range increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Heroic.name: Napalm Strike
Heroic.shortText: Fire damaging napalm at enemies
Heroic.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">164</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Tank Mode
Trait.fullText: Return to Tank Mode

Activable.name: Maelstrom Rounds
Activable.shortText: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage
Activable.fullText: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Basic.name: Barricade Cancel
Basic.fullText: Destroys Debris Wall.

Level1.name: Ambush
Level1.shortText: Siege Mode grants Stealth, extra damage
Level1.fullText: Gain Stealth when entering Siege Mode or after not taking or dealing damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds while in Siege Mode. Basic Attacks while Stealthed deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125%</c> more damage.<n/><n/>Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.

Level1.name: Advanced Artillery
Level1.shortText: Increase Siege Mode splash damage, radius
Level1.fullText: Increase Siege Mode's splash damage to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> of Basic Attack damage, and increase its splash radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level1.name: Maelstrom Rounds
Level1.shortText: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage
Level1.fullText: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Level4.name: Barricade
Level4.shortText: Concussive Blast creates a wall
Level4.fullText: Reduce Concussive Blast's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, its Mana cost by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c>, and when cast create an impassable wall in front of Sgt. Hammer for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Siege Tactics
Level4.shortText: Neosteel Plating can grant Unstoppable
Level4.fullText: Using Neosteel Plating while in Siege Mode grants Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, as long as she remains in Siege Mode.

Level4.name: Regenerative Bio-Steel
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks in Siege Mode heal
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level7.name: Pulse Detonation Core
Level7.shortText: Spider Mines detonate multiple times
Level7.fullText: Spider Mines detonate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. All damage from Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Mana and reduce the cooldown of Spider Mines by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Increase this bonus to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds while in Siege Mode.

Level7.name: Hover Siege Mode
Level7.shortText: Move while in Siege Mode
Level7.fullText: Sgt. Hammer can move at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Movement Speed while in Siege Mode.

Level7.name: Graduating Range
Level7.shortText: Gradually gain Basic Attack range in Siege Mode
Level7.fullText: While in Siege Mode, Basic Attack range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c>.

Level10.name: Blunt Force Gun
Level10.shortText: Fire a large bullet across the map
Level10.fullText: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">500</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+3% per level)</c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> </c>damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.

Level10.name: Napalm Strike
Level10.shortText: Fire damaging napalm at enemies
Level10.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">164</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Tactical Mine Deployment
Level13.fullText: Moving while Thrusters is active leaves a trail of up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Spider Mines. Additionally, increase the Slow of Spider Mines by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level13.name: Entrenched
Level13.fullText: While in Siege Mode, Concussive Blasts's damage and knockback distance are increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level13.name: Hyper-Cooling Engines
Level13.shortText: Siege Mode Attacks reduce Thrusters cooldown
Level13.fullText: While in Siege Mode, hitting Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Thrusters by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Mechanical Know-how
Level16.shortText: Neosteel Plating grants a Shield, increases damage
Level16.fullText: Neosteel Plating grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> maximum Health as a Shield for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds and increases Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Executioner
Level16.shortText: Attacking disabled Heroes increases damage
Level16.fullText: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Giant Killer
Level16.shortText: Empowers your Basic Attacks against Heroes
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5%</c> of the Hero's maximum Health.

Level20.name: Orbital BFG
Level20.shortText: BFG repeatedly travels through the map
Level20.fullText: Blunt Force Gun's missile orbits the planet every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. Only the last missile fired orbits.

Level20.name: Advanced Lava Strike
Level20.shortText: Increase Napalm Strike range, impact damage
Level20.fullText: Increase the cast range of Napalm Strike by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>, and its impact deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">65%</c> more damage.

Level20.name: Shrapnel Mines
Level20.shortText: Spider Mines reduce Armor
Level20.fullText: Upon detonating, Spider Mines reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c>, for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Ultra Capacitors
Level20.shortText: Siege Mode Attacks grant Attack Speed
Level20.fullText: Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Stitches.name: Stitches
Stitches.title: Terror of Darkshire
Stitches.searchText: Stitches Abomination Undead WoW World of Warcraft hook Slow Stun CC Initiation Displace Sustain
Stitches.description: A Tank who wants to isolate distant enemies away from their team.
Stitches.infoText: Take care when traversing the shadowed trails of Duskwood...<n/>Ever since Abercrombie the Embalmer unleashed his vile abomination upon Darkshire, Stitches has wandered the road aimlessly, hungering for the flesh of low level Alliance players.

Basic.name: Hook
Basic.shortText: Pull the first target hit towards Stitches
Basic.fullText: Pull the first enemy hit towards Stitches and deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">91</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.<n/><n/>After reaching level <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">13</c>, Hook's range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Basic.name: Slam
Basic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">104</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies within the target area. Enemies in the inner impact take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Devour
Basic.shortText: Damage an enemy and restore Health
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">319</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to non-Heroic units, or <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">114</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to Heroes. Restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of Stitches's maximum Health.

Heroic.name: Putrid Bile
Heroic.shortText: Emit a Slowing bile trail
Heroic.fullText: Emit bile that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">37</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Gorge
Heroic.shortText: Completely consume an enemy Hero
Heroic.fullText: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">274</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.

Trait.name: Shambling Horror
Trait.shortText: Attacks poison, activate to prevent Slows
Trait.fullText: Activate to spread Vile Gas in a large area every second and prevent your Movement Speed from being reduced below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/><s val="cbe8ff-ffffff" hlt-name="StandardTooltipHeader">Vile Gas</s><n/>Hitting enemies with Basic Attacks or the inner area of Slam afflicts them with Vile Gas, dealing an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">36</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.name: Helping Hand
Activable.shortText: Pull the first target hit towards Stitches
Activable.fullText: Activate to use Hook that can hit allied Heroes. Hitting an allied Hero this way reduces the cooldown of Hook by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.<n/><n/>After reaching level <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">13</c>, Helping Hand's range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Level1.name: Patchwork Creation
Level1.shortText: Vile Gas grants Armor, all healing effects increased
Level1.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Armor for every unit afflicted with Vile Gas, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> times. While Shambling Horror is active, this Armor amount is doubled.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase regeneration effects and all healing received by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level1.name: Savor The Flavor
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Devouring Heroes grants Health per second, increases Vile Gas damage
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Devour increases Stitches' Health Regeneration by 1.5 and the damage of Vile Gas by 2%, stacking up to 100 times.

Level1.name: Hungry for More
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Regen Globes increase Health, Move Speed
Level1.fullText: Gain 5% Movement Speed.Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Stitches's maximum Health by 25. Reward: Every 20 Globes gathered permanently increases Stitches' Movement Speed by an additional 5%.

Level4.name: Playtime!
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Slam cooldown
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Mana and reduce Slam's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/>For each enemy Hero hit by Slam's inner area, restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Mana and reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Vile Cleaver
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks, Slam, spread Vile Gas
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemies with Vile Gas deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> more damage and spreads Vile Gas to nearby enemies. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Slam applies Vile Gas to all targets hit.

Level4.name: Tenderizer
Level4.shortText: Basic Attacks Slow Heroes, restore Health
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes Slow by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75%</c> of Stitches' maximum Health.

Level7.name: Serrated Edge
Level7.shortText: Hook deals bonus damage, reduces cooldown
Level7.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook deals bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> of their maximum Health, reduces Hook's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, and restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Mana.

Level7.name: Second Helping
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Gambit:</c> Gain additional Devour charge, grants Shields<n/>
Level7.fullText: Devour gains 1 additional charge with a 6 second cooldown between uses. Gambit: If Stitches is at max Health after using Devour, he gains a Shield equal to 15% of his maximum Health for 10 seconds. Every death, reduce this Shield by 3%.

Level7.name: Putrefaction
Level7.shortText: Vile Gas heals, empowered during Shambling Horror
Level7.fullText: While Shambling Horror is active, Vile Gas reduces healing received by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Vile Gas heals Stitches for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level10.name: Putrid Bile
Level10.shortText: Emit a Slowing bile trail
Level10.fullText: Emit bile that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">37</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Gorge
Level10.shortText: Completely consume an enemy Hero
Level10.fullText: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">274</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.

Level13.name: Meat Hook
Level13.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook heals Stitches for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of his maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. While active, Basic Attacks against the Hero hit refresh the duration of this effect.

Level13.name: Under Pressure
Level13.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Vile Gas increases Slam damage
Level13.fullText: Increase Slam's damage by 25.Quest: After damaging Heroes with Vile Gas 6 times, permanently increase the damage of Slam by 1, to a maximum of 75 additional damage.

Level13.name: Chop Chop
Level13.shortText: Hook, Shambling Horror, increases Attack Speed
Level13.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> increased Attack Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration of this effect.

Level16.name: Pulverize
Level16.shortText: Slam Slows all targets, decreases Armor
Level16.fullText: All enemies hit by Slam are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and Heroes have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Digestive Juices
Level16.shortText: Increase Devour damage, reduces enemy damage dealt
Level16.fullText: Devour deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. When used on a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds and causes the Hero hit to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> reduced damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Flare Up
Level16.shortText: Deals damage to nearby enemies
Level16.fullText: Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror increases this damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Gift From The Embalmer
Level20.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Putrid Bile damage, reduce death timer
Level20.fullText: Putrid Bile deals 100% more damage to Heroes.Quest: Each time Putrid Bile damages an enemy Hero, the duration of Stitches' next death timer is reduced by 2%, to a maximum of 80% total reduction. All stacks of this effect are lost upon death.

Level20.name: Hungry Hungry Stitches
Level20.shortText: Gorge multiple Heroes, can teleport
Level20.fullText: For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds after using Gorge, Stitches can teleport a short distance to additional targets and Gorge them. Enemies are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second after Gorge ends.

Level20.name: Master Hooker
Level20.shortText: Empower Hook
Level20.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Hook by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Hook have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> reduced healing for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Allies hit by Helping Hand are Unkillable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Gas Bag
Level20.shortText: Shambling Horror grants Unstoppable, reduced cooldown
Level20.fullText: Activating Shambling Horror grants Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Shambling Horror's cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds.

Stukov.name: Stukov
Stukov.title: Infested Admiral
Stukov.searchText: Stewkov Starcraft Brood War BW SC2 SC Heart of the Swarm HotS Legacy of the Void LotV Zerg Infested Terran UED Alexei Silence Slow Displace Sustain Healer
Stukov.description: A Healer that brings high amounts of disruption from long range.
Stukov.infoText: Alexei Stukov had a hard life, and an even harder death. He has been betrayed, shot into space, resurrected and infested, almost cured, and then experimented upon as the infestation returned. Now, his infestation spreads within the Nexus...

Basic.name: Healing Pathogen
Basic.shortText: Infest allies with a spreading healing Virus
Basic.fullText: Infest an allied Hero with a Healing Pathogen that heals the target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">222</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4.5</c> seconds. Healing Pathogens can spread to a nearby allied Hero every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each cast of Healing Pathogen can only spread to each allied Hero <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> time.

Basic.name: Weighted Pustule
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies and infest them with a Slowing Virus
Basic.fullText: Hurl a pustule that impacts all enemy Heroes in its path, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c>, increasing to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">88</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage upon expiring or being removed.

Basic.name: Lurking Arm
Basic.shortText: Continually damage and Silence enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Channel at a target location, creating an area that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">136</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second to non-Structure enemies and Silences them. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> reduced damage to non-Heroes.<n/><n/>Does not cost Mana while Channeling, and lasts until canceled or interrupted.

Heroic.name: Massive Shove
Heroic.shortText: Shove an enemy until they collide with terrain
Heroic.fullText: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">190</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Stukov gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor while shoving an enemy.

Heroic.name: Flailing Swipe
Heroic.shortText: Knock back enemies in front of Stukov
Heroic.fullText: Swipe <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times in front of Stukov over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.75</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">48</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.

Trait.name: Bio-Kill Switch
Trait.shortText: Detonate Viruses for immediate effects
Trait.fullText: Activate to detonate all of Stukov's Viruses. Each Healing Pathogen heals its target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">435</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health, and each Weighted Pustule does <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slows its target by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Can be cast while Channeling Lurking Arm.

Mount.name: Summon Mount

Sylvanas.name: Sylvanas

Sylvanas.description: An Assassin who can possess enemy minions
Sylvanas.infoText: Sylvanas Windrunner was not always the Dark Lady of the Forsaken. In another life, she was the Ranger-General of Silvermoon. But that was before the Death Knight Arthas slew her and her people and raised her as the first Banshee.

Tassadar.infoText: An Executor without equal, Tassadar has fought tirelessly to purify the Koprulu sector of zerg infestation. Only now, after learning to wield the power of the void, is Tassadar finally ready to face the Overmind and its all-consuming Swarm.

Basic.name: Shock Ray
Basic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Channel a beam of Psionic energy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">280</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies in a line by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Psionic Storm
Basic.shortText: Damage enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Create a Psionic Storm at the targeted location for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. While in a storm, enemies take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">38</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, increasing by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for each consecutive instance of damage, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Basic.name: Force Wall
Basic.shortText: Create an unpathable wall
Basic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5 </c>second delay, create a wall that blocks all units from moving through it for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Archon
Heroic.shortText: Become an Archon
Heroic.fullText: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Resonance Beam: </c>Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target and splashes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.

Heroic.name: Black Hole
Heroic.shortText: Damage and Stun Heroes in long line
Heroic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> second cast, create a Black Hole that travels in a long line. Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled towards its center. Touching the center deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stuns the target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Resonance Beam
Trait.shortText: Basic Attacks are Channeled, restore Mana
Trait.fullText: Tassadar's Basic Attack is a Channeled beam that Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>. While Channeling, your Basic Attack damage and Mana regeneration increases by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> a second, to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. While at full charge, gain an extra <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Mana every second.<n/><n/>This bonus is lost after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds of not Channeling.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Force Wall Cancel
Basic.fullText: Destroy the active Force Wall.

Heroic.name: Archon
Heroic.shortText: Become an Archon
Heroic.fullText: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Resonance Beam: </c>Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target and splashes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.fullText: Cancel Oracle

Activable.name: Cancel Shadow Walk
Activable.fullText: Cancel Shadow Walk
