Trait.fullText: Tassadar's Basic Attack is a Channeled beam that Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>. While Channeling, your Basic Attack damage and Mana regeneration increases by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> a second, to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>. While at full charge, gain an extra <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Mana every second.<n/><n/>This bonus is lost after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds of not Channeling.

Activable.name: Oracle
Activable.shortText: Gain Spell Armor, Channel to reveal an area
Activable.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> While stationary, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health a second.<n/><n/>Activate to Channel for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, revealing a gradually increasing area anywhere on the map.

Activable.name: Shadow Walk
Activable.shortText: Become temporarily Stealthed, gain Armor
Activable.fullText: Tassadar becomes Stealthed and Unrevealable, but cannot attack or use Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. While this effect is active, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> increased Movement Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Armor.<n/><n/>Can be cast while Channeling Shock Ray.

Activable.name: Executor's Will
Activable.shortText: Activate to empower Resonance Beam
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain full Resonance Beam charge, <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Spell Power, and cause Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns to regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> faster. This effect lasts as long as Resonance Beam remains at full charge.

Level1.name: Static Charge
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hero hits increase damage
Level1.fullText: Quest: Heroes hit by Shock Ray permanently increases its damage by 5 and grants 33% Resonance Beam charge. Maximum of 200 bonus damage.

Level1.name: Psi-Infusion
Level1.shortText: Increased range, hits return Mana
Level1.fullText: Each non-Structure enemy hit by Psionic Storm restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> Mana, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> against Heroes.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the cast range of Psionic Storm by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">33%</c>.

Level1.name: Khaydarin Amulet
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest: </c>Empower Resonance Beam
Level1.fullText: Quest: Resonance Beam charges 50% faster.Reward: After Resonance Beam has been fully charged for 80 seconds, it bounces to hit 1 additional target for 75% damage, prioritizing Heroes.Reward: After Resonance Beam has been fully charged for 160 seconds, it bounces to hit 2 additional targets for 75% damage, prioritizing Heroes.

Level4.name: Induction
Level4.shortText: Shock Ray grants Movement Speed
Level4.fullText: Tassadar gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> increased Movement Speed. Casting Shock Ray increases this bonus to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Electric Fence
Level4.shortText: Force Wall deals damage and Slows
Level4.fullText: Force Wall deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">92</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage a second to nearby enemies and Slows them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>.

Level4.name: Plasma Shield
Level4.shortText: Resonance Beam charge grants Shields
Level4.fullText: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, gain a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of max Health every second, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12%</c>.

Level7.name: Beam Alignment
Level7.shortText: Resonance Beam reduces Shock Ray cooldown
Level7.fullText: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, Shock Ray's cooldown refreshes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster and its Slow duration is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Reduce the Mana cost of Shock Ray from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">55</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c>.

Level7.name: Psionic Echo
Level7.shortText: Shock Ray creates Psionic Storm on Hero hit
Level7.fullText: Casting Psionic Storm causes your next Shock Ray within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds to only cost <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Mana and create a Psionic Storm on the first enemy Hero hit.

Level7.name: Arc Discharge
Level7.shortText: Resonance Beam creates Psionic Storms
Level7.fullText: When Resonance Beam is fully charged, Tassadar's Basic Attack range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> and its next instance of damage also creates a Psionic Storm on the target.<n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> second cooldown that decays twice as fast while Resonance Beam is fully charged.

Level10.name: Archon
Level10.shortText: Become an Archon
Level10.fullText: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Resonance Beam: </c>Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target and splashes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.

Level10.name: Black Hole
Level10.shortText: Damage and Stun Heroes in long line

Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled towards its center. Touching the center deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">310</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stuns the target for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Feedback
Level13.fullText: When an enemy Hero is affected by Psionic Storm, Resonance Beam's Slow is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and it reduces Physical Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c>.

Level13.name: Shadow Walk

While this effect is active, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> increased Movement Speed and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Armor.<n/><n/>Can be cast while Channeling Shock Ray.

Level13.shortText: Gain Spell Armor, Channel to reveal an area
Level13.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> While stationary, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health a second.<n/><n/>Activate to Channel for up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, revealing a gradually increasing area anywhere on the map.

Level16.name: Thermal Lance
Level16.shortText: Percentage damage against first Hero
Level16.fullText: Shock Ray deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8%</c> of maximum Health as damage to the first Hero it hits.

Level16.name: Psychic Shock
Level16.shortText: Psionic Storm damages faster
Level16.fullText: Psionic Storm deals damage <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> faster.

Level16.name: Executor's Will
Level16.shortText: Activate to empower Resonance Beam
Level16.fullText: Activate to gain full Resonance Beam charge, <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Spell Power, and cause Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns to regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> faster. This effect lasts as long as Resonance Beam remains at full charge.

Level20.name: Twilight Archon
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks increase Archon duration
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks while in Archon form increase its duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Kugelblitz
Level20.shortText: Black Hole reduces Armor, creates Psionic Storms
Level20.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Black Hole's center have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and have a Psionic Storm created at their location.

Level20.name: Force Barrier
Level20.shortText: Increased range, reduced cooldown
Level20.fullText: Increase the duration of Force Wall by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, its cast range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, and reduce its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Khala's Gift
Level20.shortText: Nearby Allies grant and gain Spell Power
Level20.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> Spell Power for yourself and each nearby ally Hero, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> total Spell Power. Your total bonus is shared with all contributing allies.

Thrall.name: Thrall
Thrall.title: Warchief of the Horde
Thrall.searchText: Thrall Trall Go'el Goel Warchief Shaman Orc Horde WoW World of Warcraft War3 WC3 Warcraft3 III 3 Reign of Chaos RoC Frozen Throne FT Burning Crusade BC Wrath Lich King WotLK Cataclysm Mists of Pandaria MoP Legion Hearthstone HS Earth Stun Slow Displace Root CC Sustain Offlaner
Thrall.description: A Bruiser who can hold his own in a lane of battle.
Thrall.infoText: As a child, Thrall served the cruel Aedelas Blackmoore as a slave. After gaining his freedom, he guided the liberated orcs to a land of their own and worked to recover their ancient traditions. Now and forever he is the Warchief of the Horde.

Basic.name: Chain Lightning
Basic.shortText: Shock enemies with bouncing lightning
Basic.fullText: Shock an enemy with lightning, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">170</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. The lightning then bounces <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times to nearby enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to each enemy hit.

Basic.name: Feral Spirit
Basic.shortText: Unleash a wolf spirit to burn enemies and Root Heroes
Basic.fullText: Unleash a Feral Spirit that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">153</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in its path and Roots Heroes hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Each Hero hit increases the distance traveled by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Basic.name: Windfury
Basic.shortText: Increases Attack and Movement Speed
Basic.fullText: Increase Thrall's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. His next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3 </c>Basic Attacks occur <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster and generate stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.

Heroic.name: Sundering
Heroic.shortText: Damages, pushes, and Stuns enemies in a line
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">290</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Heroic.name: Earthquake
Heroic.shortText: Slows enemies in a massive area
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Each pulse lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemy Heroes. Does <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3 </c>pulses.

Trait.name: Frostwolf Resilience
Trait.shortText: Casting Abilities on enemies grants charges that restore health
Trait.fullText: Dealing damage with Abilities grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack of Frostwolf Resilience. At <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> stacks, Thrall is instantly healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Heroic.name: Sundering
Heroic.fullText: Cancel Sundering

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Spirit Shield
Activable.shortText: Activate to reduce incoming Ability Damage
Activable.fullText: Spirit Shield is disabled and will not trigger.<n/><n/>Click this button to enable Spirit Shield.

Activable.name: Ancestral Wrath
Activable.shortText: Activate to damage and steal Health from a Hero
Activable.fullText: Activate to consume <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of their maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, and healing Thrall for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> of the damage dealt.<n/><n/>Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.

Trait.name: Frostwolf Resilience
Trait.shortText: Casting Abilities on enemies grants charges that restore health
Trait.fullText: Dealing damage with Abilities grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack of Frostwolf Resilience. At <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> stacks, Thrall is instantly healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health.

Activable.name: Spirit Shield
Activable.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

Activable.name: Wind Rush
Activable.shortText: Activate to teleport and gain Windfury
Activable.fullText: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.

Level1.name: Echo of the Elements
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Killing enemies grant chain lightning charges, forks
Level1.fullText: Quest: Kill Minions or Heroes within 2 seconds of hitting them with Chain Lightning.Reward: After killing 20 enemies, reduce the Mana cost of Chain Lightning from 40 to 20.Reward: After killing 50 enemies, Chain Lightning gains an extra charge.Mythic Reward: After killing 125 enemies, Chain Lightning can now strike the same target multiple times, and also strikes 1 additional target per bounce.

Level1.name: Crash Lightning
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Multiple Hero hits empower Chain Lightning
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit at least 2 Heroes with a single use of Chain Lightning. Upon dying, lose 4 stacks. Gained rewards cannot be lost.Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 15 times, Chain Lightning deals 270 additional damage on its bounces after the initial strike.Mythic Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 30 times, Chain Lightning deals 325 additional damage on its bounces, and prioritizes bouncing to enemy Heroes.

Level1.name: Maelstrom Weapon
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest: </c> Windfury attacks increase Move Speed
Level1.fullText: Quest: Basic Attack Heroes while Windfury's Movement Speed bonus is active.Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, increase the Movement Speed bonus of Windfury to 40% and Thrall's Basic Attacks deal 40 additional damage.Reward: After hitting 55 Heroes, Thrall permanently gains 15% increased Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks gain an additional 75 damage.Mythic Reward: After hitting 100 Heroes, Frostwolf Resilience healing restores 200% more Health.

Level4.name: Feral Resilience
Level4.shortText: Feral Spirit grants Physical Armor, Frostwolf Resilience
Level4.fullText: Heroes damaged by Feral Spirit grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> stacks of Frostwolf Resilience and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> stacks of Feral Resilience, granting <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Physical Armor against the next incoming Hero Basic Attack.<n/><n/>Stacks are consumed on the next cast of Feral Spirit.

Level4.name: Frostwolf Pack
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Reduce Feral Spirit cooldown, cost
Level4.fullText: Quest: Hit 6 Heroes with Feral Spirit. Progress is lost on death and when Thrall fails to hit a Hero.Reward: Reduce the cooldown and Mana cost of Feral Spirit by 50%.

Level4.name: Mana Tide
Level4.shortText: Frostwolf Resilience restores Mana, lowers cooldowns
Level4.fullText: Frostwolf Resilience restores <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Mana and reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Rolling Thunder
Level7.shortText: Chain Lightning empowers Basic Attacks, extra bounce
Level7.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive</c>: Chain Lightning bounces an additional time.<n/><n/>For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds after hitting an enemy with Chain Lightning, Thrall's next Basic Attack against them grants a stack of Frostwolf Resilience. If the target is an enemy Hero, then he also deals damage to them equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of their maximum Health and healing for the same amount.<n/>

Level7.name: Ancestral Wrath
Level7.shortText: Activate to damage and steal Health from a Hero
Level7.fullText: Activate to consume <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of their maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, and healing Thrall for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> of the damage dealt.<n/><n/>Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.

Level7.name: Elemental Assault
Level7.shortText: Abilities increase Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: After using an Ability, Thrall's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c> more damage.

Level10.name: Sundering
Level10.shortText: Damages, pushes, and Stuns enemies in a line
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">290</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level10.name: Earthquake
Level10.shortText: Slows enemies in a massive area
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Each pulse lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>, and deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemy Heroes. Does <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3 </c>pulses.

Level13.name: Grace Of Air
Level13.fullText: Windfury attacks grant twice as many stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.

Level13.name: Frostwolf's Grace
Level13.shortText: Activate Frostwolf Resilience to instantly heal
Level13.fullText: Frostwolf Resilience can be activated to instantly heal. This healing is increased by up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> based on Thrall's missing health.

Level13.name: Spirit Shield
Level13.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45</c> seconds, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70</c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

Level16.name: Tempest Fury
Level16.shortText: Windfury's final strike hits 3 times
Level16.fullText: The final strike of Windfury hits <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75% </c>normal damage. These hits do not provide quest progress.

Level16.name: Thunderstorm
Level16.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit Heroes to make Chain Lightning Slow
Level16.fullText: Chain Lightning Slows the primary target by 8% for 2 seconds when used on Heroes.Quest: Targeting a Hero directly with Chain Lightning increases this Slow by 8%, up to an additional 40%.Reward: While at a 40% bonus, Chain Lightning's damage is increased by 30%.Bonuses are reset if Chain Lightning is used on the same Hero it was last used on, or if Thrall dies.

Level16.name: Alpha Wolf
Level16.shortText: Feral Spirit has longer Root, empowers Attacks
Level16.fullText: For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds after a Hero is hit by Feral Spirit, Thrall's Basic Attacks against them deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3%</c> of the target's maximum Health as damage.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Feral Spirit's Root to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Worldbreaker
Level20.shortText: Sundering creates impassable terrain
Level20.fullText: Lower the cooldown of Sundering by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds. After Sundering impacts, it leaves behind an impassable rift, blocking unit movement for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Earthen Shields
Level20.shortText: Grants allies Shields in area
Level20.fullText: Allies within the Earthquake area gain a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of their maximum Health each pulse. This shield lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Elemental Momentum
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks reduce Ability cooldowns
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks reduce Thrall's Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds, tripled against Heroes.

Level20.name: Nexus Blades
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks deal more damage and Slow
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Wind Rush
Level20.shortText: Activate to teleport and gain Windfury
Level20.fullText: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.

Tinker.name: Gazlowe
Tinker.title: Boss of Ratchet
Tinker.searchText: Gazlowe Tinker Goblin Horde WoW World of Warcraft War3 WC3 Warcraft3 III 3 Frozen Throne FT Cataclysm Warlords Draenor WoD BFA Battle for Azeroth Stun Slow CC Displace Sustain Offlaner
Tinker.description: A Summoner that specializes in controlling key areas of the battleground.
Tinker.infoText: Few would consider Gazlowe a fighter, but what he lacks in height, he makes up in mechanical know-how. Besides, you don't get to be boss of a "boom"-town like Ratchet with just a charming personality, if you know what I mean.

Basic.name: Rock-It! Turret
Basic.shortText: Create a turret that shoots at nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Create a turret that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">36</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c> seconds. <n/><n/>Turrets prioritize the nearest enemy Hero when first created.

Basic.name: Deth Lazor
Basic.shortText: Damage targets in a line
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.65</c> seconds, deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in a line. Heal for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of the damage dealt, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> against enemy Heroes.

Basic.name: Xplodium Charge
Basic.shortText: Throw a timed bomb which stuns and damages enemies in an area
Basic.fullText: Place a bomb that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">142</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies within the target area after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds. Enemies hit are also Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Heroic.name: Robo-Goblin
Heroic.shortText: Gain Unstoppable, increase Basic Attack damage
Heroic.fullText: Activate to become Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.

Heroic.name: Grav-O-Bomb 3000
Heroic.shortText: Pulls, Stuns, and damages enemies
Heroic.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Basic Abilities deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> more damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.

Trait.name: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle

Turrets drop <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Scrap, which can be picked up.<n/><n/>Activate to destroy a target Rock-It! Turret.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Activable.fullText: Orders any nearby Rock-It! Turrets to focus the target.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Level1.name: Rocket Boots

Level1.name: Big Game Hunter

Level1.name: One Man Wrecking Crew

Level1.fullText: Casting Basic Abilities cause Gazlowe's next Basic Attack within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> more damage. Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Level4.name: Rock It Sock It

Level4.name: Hyperfocus Coils
Level4.shortText: Deth Lazor and Xplodium Charge deal bonus damage, heal
Level4.fullText: Heroes hit by Deth Lazor or Xplodium Charge take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of their maximum Health in damage. Gazlowe is healed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150%</c> of the damage dealt.

Level4.name: EZ-PZ Dimensional Ripper
Level4.shortText: Activate to gain Armor, reduce enemy damage
Level4.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, and reduce damage dealt by all nearby enemy Heroes and Summons by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds

Level7.name: Goblin Fusion

Level7.fullText: Generate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Scrap for each Hero hit by Deth Lazor.

Level7.name: Overload

Level7.fullText: Deth Lazor can now store up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges. Each enemy Hero hit by Deth Lazor reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Master Blaster

Level10.name: Robo-Goblin
Level10.shortText: Gain Unstoppable, increase Basic Attack damage
Level10.fullText: Activate to become Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.

Level10.name: Grav-O-Bomb 3000
Level10.shortText: Pulls, Stuns, and damages enemies
Level10.fullText: After a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Basic Abilities deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> more damage for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.

Level13.name: Positive Reinforcement

Level13.fullText: Primary Rock-It! Turret attacks against Heroes increase Gazlowe's Attack Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Superior Schematics
Level13.fullText: Rock-It! Turrets attack up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional enemies for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> damage and have <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> increased Basic Attack range.

Level13.name: Overcharged Capacitors

Level16.name: Firin' Mah Lazorz

Level16.fullText: Firing Deth Lazor causes all of Gazlowe's Rock-It! Turrets to fire a Deth Lazor of their own that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level16.name: Ark Reaktor

Casting Xplodium Charge creates <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> miniature Rock-It! Turrets that last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.<n/><n/>These Turrets do not drop Scrap or benefit from other Talents.

Level16.name: Overklock
Level16.shortText: Attacks grant Move Speed, deal bonus damage
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks grant Gazlowe <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Dealing Basic Attack damage to Heroes causes them to take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of their maximum Health as damage.

Level20.name: Mecha-Lord

Level20.name: Miniature Black Hole

Level20.name: It's Raining Scrap

Tracer.name: Tracer
Tracer.title: Agent of Overwatch
Tracer.searchText: Tracer Lena Oxton Human Overwatch OW Mobile Mobility Slow Dive Escape Marksman
Tracer.description: A mobile Assassin who picks off straggling enemies, finishing them off.
Tracer.infoText: Lena Oxton (call sign: "Tracer"), is both an adventurer and an irrepressible force for good. With the ability to alter her own time at will, she fights the good fight wherever she goes--even the Nexus. Don't worry, loves. The cavalry's finally here.<n/><n/>Tracer is FREE to purchasers of Overwatch™: Origins Edition

Basic.name: Blink
Basic.shortText: Dash towards an area
Basic.fullText: Dash towards an area.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Basic.name: Melee
Basic.shortText: Attack a nearby enemy
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">220</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to a nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes. Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> Pulse Bomb charge when using Melee against an enemy, and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> against Heroes.

Basic.name: Recall
Basic.shortText: Return to a recent location and remove negative effects
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, Tracer returns to the position she was at <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds prior to casting, refilling her ammo, and removing all negative status effects from herself.

Heroic.name: Pulse Bomb
Heroic.shortText: Attach a bomb to enemies that deals heavy damage
Heroic.fullText: Fire a short range bomb that can attach to an enemy if it hits them. The bomb explodes after <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">298</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+6% per level)</c> damage to them and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">149</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+6% per level)</c> damage to other nearby enemies.<n/><n/>This ability is slowly charged over time by dealing damage to enemies with Basic Attacks and Melee.

Trait.name: Reload
Trait.shortText: Tracer can move while Basic Attacking; Basic Attacks cost ammo
Trait.fullText: Tracer can Basic Attack while moving, and after attacking <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> times she needs to reload over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds. Tracer can manually reload early by activating Reload.<n/><n/>Basic Attacks heal Tracer for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> of the damage dealt.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Trait.name: Locked and Loaded
Trait.shortText: Time Reload perfectly to gain Basic Attack damage
Trait.fullText: Reactivate Reload within the last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for that magazine.

Trait.name: Locked and Loaded
Trait.shortText: Time Reload perfectly to gain Basic Attack damage
Trait.fullText: Reactivate Reload within the last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for that magazine.

Level1.name: One-Two Punch

Level1.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and it gains an additional charge.

Level1.name: Parting Gift
Level1.shortText: Using Recall leaves bombs
Level1.fullText: Recall leaves behind <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> bombs that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds and grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7%</c> Pulse Bomb charge.

Level1.name: Tracer Rounds
Level1.shortText: Basic Attacks reveal, increased range
Level1.fullText: Increase Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Leeching Rounds
Level4.shortText: Increase Basic Attack healing
Level4.fullText: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">200%</c>, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.

Level4.name: Pulse Generator
Level4.shortText: Pulse Bomb heals Tracer, refreshes Blink charge
Level4.fullText: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12%</c> of her maximum Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.

Level4.name: Is That a Health Pack?!
Level4.shortText: Empower Healing Fountains, Regen Globes
Level4.fullText: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c> of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> of Tracer's maximum Health.

Level7.name: Sleight of Hand
Level7.shortText: Reload twice as fast
Level7.fullText: Reduces Reload time by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. This equals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> more damage per second.

Level7.name: Focus Fire
Level7.shortText: Unloading a magazine on an enemy does bonus damage
Level7.fullText: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, the last bullet will deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">80</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus damage. This is equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> of the total magazine.

Level7.name: Locked and Loaded
Level7.shortText: Time Reload perfectly to gain Basic Attack damage
Level7.fullText: Reactivate Reload within the last <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for that magazine.

Level10.name: Sticky Bomb
Level10.shortText: Increases Pulse Bomb area and adds Slow
Level10.fullText: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> and enemies hit are Slowed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">70%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Quantum Spike
Level10.shortText: Pulse Bomb deals percentage damage
Level10.fullText: Pulse Bomb deals an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.

Level10.name: Pulse Rounds
Level10.shortText: Increases Pulse Bomb range and charge rate
Level10.fullText: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level13.name: Untouchable
Level13.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Takedowns increase Attack Damage
Level13.fullText: Passive: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 5%, up to 25%. These bonuses are lost on death.

Level13.name: Jumper
Level13.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive</c>: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> faster.<n/><n/>Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> of her maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. This Shield stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.

Level13.name: Telefrag
Level13.shortText: Damage and knockback on Recall arrival
Level13.fullText: <c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.1875</c> seconds.<n/><n/>When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and nearby enemies take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and are knocked back.

Level16.name: Bullet Spray
Level16.shortText: Melee hits all enemies in range
Level16.fullText: Increases the radius of Melee by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.

Level16.name: Heavy Handed
Level16.shortText: Melee reduces Armor
Level16.fullText: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Ricochet
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks can bounce to a nearby enemy
Level16.fullText: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.

Level20.name: Chrono Triggers
Level20.shortText: Blink empowers ammo
Level20.fullText: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level20.name: Get Stuffed!
Level20.shortText: Empower Melee
Level20.fullText: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.

Level20.name: Total Recall
Level20.shortText: Recall can restore Health
Level20.fullText: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.

Level20.name: Composition B
Level20.shortText: Hitting Heroes with Pulse Bomb leaves a second
Level20.fullText: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage and explodes slightly earlier.

Tychus.name: Tychus
Tychus.title: Notorious Outlaw
Tychus.searchText: Tychus Findlay Marine Outlaw Terran SC2 SC 2 II StarCraft Wings of Liberty WoL Star2 Starcraft2 Sustain Mobile Mobility Displace Marksman
Tychus.description: An Assassin who shreds High Health enemies.
Tychus.infoText: Tychus Findlay is a big man with a big ego and a bigger gun. Fortunately, his loyalty is easily won. Buy him a drink or three and promise him enough credits, and there's no job in the whole universe too dangerous for this outlaw.

Basic.name: Overkill
Basic.shortText: Attack one target while moving, damaging nearby enemies as well
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">552</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to the target and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">276</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby targets over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Reactivate to select a new target or direction. Can move and use Abilities while Channeling.

Basic.name: Frag Grenade
Basic.shortText: Throw a grenade, damaging and knocking back enemies
Basic.fullText: Lob a grenade that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">256</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> </c>damage, knocking enemies away.

Basic.name: Run and Gun
Basic.shortText: Dash a short distance
Basic.fullText: Dash a short distance.

Heroic.name: Drakken Laser Drill
Heroic.shortText: Call down a Laser to attack nearby enemies
Heroic.fullText: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">142</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">22</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Commandeer Odin
Heroic.shortText: Call down an Odin to pilot
Heroic.fullText: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor and lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">23</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Minigun
Trait.shortText: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage to Heroes
Trait.fullText: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of their maximum Health. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Overkill Retarget
Basic.fullText: Focuses Overkill on a different target or direction.

Basic.name: Run and Gun
Basic.shortText: Dash a short distance
Basic.fullText: Dash a short distance.

Heroic.name: Laser Drill Issue Order
Heroic.fullText: Order the Laser Drill to attack a new target.

Basic.name: Annihilate
Basic.shortText: Deals damage in a line
Basic.fullText: Fire the Odin's cannons in a straight line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">196</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to everything in the path.

Basic.name: Ragnarok Missiles
Basic.shortText: Launch a volley of missiles
Basic.fullText: Launches a volley of missiles at target area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">132</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and slowing enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Thrusters
Basic.fullText: Dash in target direction.

Trait.name: Minigun
Trait.shortText: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage to Heroes
Trait.fullText: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5%</c> of their maximum Health. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Neosteel Coating
Activable.shortText: Activate to gain Spell Armor
Activable.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level1.name: Quarterback
Level1.shortText: Increased Frag Grenade damage, range
Level1.fullText: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> and its range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c>.

Level1.name: Dash
Level1.shortText: Increase Run and Gun Range, Movement Speed
Level1.fullText: Increase the range of Run and Gun by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Press the Advantage
Level1.shortText: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range
Level1.fullText: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c>.

Level4.name: In the Rhythm
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Basic Attacks increase Minigun duration
Level4.fullText: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by 0.03 seconds.

Level4.name: The Bigger They Are...
Level4.shortText: Increase damage of Minigun
Level4.fullText: Increase the damage bonus to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4%</c> while enemy Heroes are above <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level4.name: Master Assassin
Level4.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Takedowns increase Attack Speed
Level4.fullText: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%. Reward: After getting 15 Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional 15%.

Level7.name: Melting Point
Level7.shortText: Frag Grenade deals additional damage over time
Level7.fullText: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. This damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

Level7.name: Combat Tactician
Level7.shortText: Run and Gun reduces Minigun cooldown
Level7.fullText: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds after using Run and Gun.

Level7.name: Relentless Soldier
Level7.shortText: Stuns and Roots grant Armor
Level7.fullText: Being Stunned or Rooted grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level10.name: Commandeer Odin
Level10.shortText: Call down an Odin to pilot
Level10.fullText: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> Armor and lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">23</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Drakken Laser Drill
Level10.shortText: Call down a Laser to attack nearby enemies
Level10.fullText: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">142</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">22</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Spray 'n' Pray
Level13.fullText: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and its range is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level13.name: That's the Stuff!
Level13.fullText: Minigun heals Tychus for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.

Level13.name: Neosteel Coating
Level13.fullText: Activate to gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.

Level16.name: Armor Piercing Rounds
Level16.shortText: Consecutive Overkill hits increase damage
Level16.fullText: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c> bonus damage.

Level16.name: Titan Grenade
Level16.shortText: Increases Frag Grenade damage to Heroes
Level16.fullText: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level16.name: Sizzlin' Attacks
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks deal more damage to Heroes
Level16.fullText: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.

Level20.name: Big Red Button
Level20.shortText: Increases Odin duration and fires Nukes
Level20.fullText: Odin lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds later, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">319</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in its area.

Level20.name: Focusing Diodes

Level20.fullText: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>. Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> additional damage.

Level20.name: Can Do This All Day
Level20.shortText: Reduce Overkill cooldown, gain Armor
Level20.fullText: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor.

Level20.name: Bob and Weave
Level20.shortText: Adds Run and Gun charges and reduces Mana cost
Level20.fullText: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c>. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Tyrael.name: Tyrael
Tyrael.title: Archangel of Justice
Tyrael.searchText: Tyrael Angel Justice D2 D3 Diablo2 Diablo3 Diablo 2 3 III Lord of Destruction LoD Reaper of Souls RoS Mobile Mobility Stun Slow Dive Escape
Tyrael.description: A Tank who pairs well with allies that like to dive into the enemy team.<n/>
Tyrael.infoText: Among the angels it is the Archangel of Justice Tyrael who is humanity's greatest defender. Wielding his sword El'druin against the Burning Hells, the Prime Evils would have enslaved humanity long ago if Tyrael had not intervened.

Basic.name: El'druin's Might
Basic.shortText: Slow and damage enemies in an area. Use ability again to teleport to the area
Basic.fullText: Throw El'druin to the target area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds. It can be reactivated within <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds to teleport Tyrael to El'druin and Slow nearby enemies again.

Basic.name: Righteousness
Basic.shortText: Gain a temporary Shield
Basic.fullText: Shields Tyrael for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">350</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and nearby allied Heroes and Minions for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> as much for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Smite
Basic.shortText: Damage an area and speed up nearby allies

For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, allies moving through the targeted area gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> increased Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Judgment
Heroic.shortText: Charge and Stun an enemy Hero
Heroic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Heroic.name: Sanctification
Heroic.shortText: Create zone of Invulnerable

Trait.name: Archangel's Wrath

Trait.fullText: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">450</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per enemy Hero hit.<n/><n/>Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds when it expires.

Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone

Heroic.fullText: Cancels the Sanctification ability.

Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Trait.fullText: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">450</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> per enemy Hero hit.<n/><n/>Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> while active and for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds when it expires.

Valeera.name: Valeera
Valeera.title: Shadow of the Uncrowned
Valeera.searchText: Valera Sanguinar Rogue Blood Elf WoW World of Warcraft Legion Hearthstone HS Stun Mobile Mobility Cloak Stealth Burst Roam Ganker
Valeera.description: A stealthed Assassin who specializes in shutting down her opponents.
Valeera.infoText: For a time, the gladiator Valeera Sanguinar served dutifully as one of Varian Wrynn's personal bodyguards. Now, her shadowy skills find her a natural fit within the secretive rogue order, the Uncrowned, in their fight against the Legion.

Basic.name: Sinister Strike
Basic.shortText: Dash forward, damaging enemies in a line
Basic.fullText: Dash forward, hitting all enemies in a line for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">110</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. If Sinister Strike hits a Hero, Valeera stops dashing immediately and the cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.<n/><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">Awards 1 Combo Point</c>.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Stealth: Ambush</c><n/>Heavily damage an enemy and reduce their Armor.

Basic.name: Blade Flurry
Basic.shortText: Damage nearby enemies
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage in an area around Valeera. <n/><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">Awards 1 Combo Point</c> per enemy Hero hit.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Stealth: Cheap Shot</c><n/>Stun, Blind, and damage an enemy.

Basic.name: Eviscerate
Basic.shortText: High damage finishing move
Basic.fullText: Eviscerate an enemy, dealing damage per <c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">Combo Point</c>. <n/><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">1 Point</c>: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">85</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">2 Points</c>: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">170</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">3 Points</c>: <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">255</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c><n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Stealth: Garrote</c><n/>Silence and damage an enemy over time.

Heroic.name: Cloak of Shadows
Heroic.shortText: Become Unstoppable, gain Spell Armor
Heroic.fullText: Valeera is enveloped in a Cloak of Shadows, which immediately removes all damage over time effects from her. For <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, she becomes Unstoppable and gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75</c> Spell Armor, reducing Ability Damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c>.<n/><n/>Using this Ability does not break Stealth.

Heroic.name: Smoke Bomb
Heroic.shortText: Create an obscuring cloud of smoke
Heroic.fullText: Create a cloud of smoke. While in the smoke, Valeera is Unrevealable, can pass through other units, and gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60</c> Armor, reducing damage taken by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>. Valeera can continue to attack and use abilities without being revealed. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Using this Ability does not break Stealth.

Trait.name: Vanish
Trait.shortText: Stealth and gain new Abilities
Trait.fullText: Vanish from sight, becoming Stealthed, gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> Movement Speed and access to new Abilities. For the first second, Valeera is Unrevealable and can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.<n/><n/>After being Stealthed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, the cast range of Ambush, Cheap Shot, and Garrote is increased from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c>, and they cause Valeera to teleport to the target when used.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health.

Basic.name: Ambush
Basic.shortText: Damage an enemy and reduce their Armor
Basic.fullText: Ambush an enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">130</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and reducing their Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">Awards 1 Combo Point</c>.<n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Unstealth: Sinister Strike</c><n/>Dash forward, damaging enemies.

Basic.name: Cheap Shot
Basic.shortText: Stun, Blind, and damage an enemy
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to an enemy, Stun them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, and Blind them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds once Cheap Shot's Stun expires.<n/><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">Awards 1 Combo Point.</c><n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Unstealth: Blade Flurry</c><n/>Deal damage in an area around Valeera.

Basic.name: Garrote
Basic.shortText: Deal high damage over time to an enemy
Basic.fullText: Deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to an enemy and an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds, and Silence them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="ff5858" hlt-name="#GlowColorRed">Awards 1 Combo Point.</c><n/><n/><c val="D65CFF" hlt-name="#ColorViolet">Unstealth: Eviscerate</c><n/>High damage finishing move.

Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Level1.fullText: Valeera regenerates an additional 3 Energy per second.Reward: After Gathering 20 Regen Globes, increase Valeera's maximum Energy to 120.

Level1.fullText: After teleporting with Ambush, Cheap Shot, or Garrote, regenerate <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Energy per second for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level1.shortText: Spending Combo Points grants Block

Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> charges.

Valeera can continue to attack and use abilities without being revealed. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Using this Ability does not break Stealth.

Level20.name: Elusiveness
Level20.shortText: Increases Vanish Movement Speed bonus
Level20.fullText: Increases Valeera's Movement Speed while Vanished by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>.

Varian.name: Varian
Varian.title: High King of the Alliance
Varian.searchText: Varian Wrynn Logosh Lo'Gosh Stormwind Human Alliance WoW World of Warcraft Wrath of the Lich King WotLK Cataclysm Mists of Pandaria MoP Warlords of Draenor WoD Legion Stun Burst Slow Sustain Offlaner
Varian.description: A Bruiser that can flex into dealing damage or protecting his team.
Varian.infoText: Few would have expected that the gladiator known only as Lo'Gosh was in truth the missing ruler of Stormwind, Varian Wrynn. Now the High King of the Alliance, his every action shapes the destiny of Azeroth itself.

Basic.name: Lion's Fang
Basic.shortText: Damage and Slow enemies in a line and heal Varian
Basic.fullText: Create a shockwave that travels in a straight line, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing enemies by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. Each enemy hit heals Varian for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> against Heroes.

Basic.name: Parry
Basic.shortText: Block incoming Basic Attacks for a short duration
Basic.fullText: Parry all incoming Basic Attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds, reducing their damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Basic.name: Charge
Basic.shortText: Charge to an enemy and damage them
Basic.fullText: Charge to the target enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Heroic.name: Taunt
Heroic.shortText: Gain Health<n/>Force a Hero to attack Varian
Heroic.fullText: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.25</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Heroic.name: Colossus Smash
Heroic.shortText: Gain Damage, Lose Health<n/>Smash enemies and lower their Armor
Heroic.fullText: Smash a target enemy, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">185</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and lowering their Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, causing them to take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> increased damage.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Base Attack Damage increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.<n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c>.

Heroic.name: Twin Blades of Fury
Heroic.shortText: Gain Attack Speed, Lose Damage<n/>Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike cooldown
Heroic.fullText: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7</c> seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Attack Speed increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.<n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Base Attack Damage reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Trait.name: Heroic Strike
Trait.shortText: Deal bonus damage on next Basic Attack
Trait.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus Spell Damage. Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Trait.name: Heroic Strike
Trait.shortText: Bonus Basic Attack damage
Trait.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">18</c> seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> bonus Spell Damage. Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.shortText: Basic Attacks periodically grant a large heal
Activable.fullText: Every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">350</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Health. Activable.fullText: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.<n/><n/>Each time an enemy Hero affected by Demoralizing Shout deals damage to a Hero, reduce its cooldown and Parry's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c>.

Level1.fullText: Quest: Every time Lion's Fang hits a Hero, increase its damage by 7, up to 175.Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, the Slow is increased to 50% and its duration is increased to 2 seconds.

Whitemane.name: Whitemane
Whitemane.title: High Inquisitor
Whitemane.searchText: sally priest human WoW World of Warcraft Mists Pandaria MoP Legion Sustain Healer Chapeau
Whitemane.description: A versatile Healer who heals her allies by smiting her foes.
Whitemane.infoText: As the High Inquisitor of the Scarlet Crusade, Sally Whitemane zealously leads her champions in a neverending war against the undead. Under her guiding Light, all who have been touched by the plague of death will be purged by her cleansing flame... no matter how much they protest.

Removes a stack of <c val="FF8B8B" hlt-name="#WhitemaneDesperation">Desperation</c>.<n/><n/>Shares a cooldown with Clemency.

Can be cast while channeling abilities.
