Level1.name: Inquisitor's Prayer
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Hit Heroes to increase Health and Mana
Level1.fullText: Repeatable Quest: Hit Heroes with Searing Lash.Repeatable Quest: Hit 3 Heroes with Basic Attacks.Reward: Permanently increase Whitemane's maximum Health by 3 and Mana by 2. Heroes hit with the second strike of Searing Lash count as 2 hits.

Level4.name: Unwavering Faith
Level4.shortText: Increase Basic Attack range and damage
Level4.fullText: Increase Whitemane's Basic Attack range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.1</c>. Whitemane gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> increased Basic Attack damage for each active <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> buff.

Level4.name: Martyrdom
Level4.shortText: <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> increases Desperate Plea's healing
Level4.fullText: Desperate Plea's healing is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>. Increase this by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> for each active <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>.

Level4.name: Indulgence
Level4.shortText: <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> grants Movement Speed
Level4.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> Movement Speed. Increase this by an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> for each active <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>.

Level7.name: Zealous Spirit
Level7.shortText: <c val="FF8B8B" hlt-name="#WhitemaneDesperation">Desperation</c> grants Whitemane <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>
Level7.fullText: Upon reaching <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> stacks of <c val="FF8B8B" hlt-name="#WhitemaneDesperation">Desperation</c>, Whitemane gains <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>.

Level7.name: Saintly Greatstaff
Level7.shortText: Searing Lash empowers Basic Attacks
Level7.fullText: Enemy Heroes hit by Searing Lash are marked for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds. Basic Attacks against them deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">55</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> Spell damage and remove the mark.

Level7.name: Intercession
Level7.shortText: Make an ally Unstoppable
Level7.fullText: Activate to make an ally Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level10.name: Scarlet Aegis
Level10.shortText: Heal and grant Armor to nearby allies
Level10.fullText: Bolster the spirits of nearby allied Heroes, healing them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and granting them <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Divine Reckoning
Level10.shortText: Consecrate an area
Level10.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, consecrate an area for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds to enemies inside. <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.

Level13.name: Subjugation
Level13.fullText: Inquisition reduces all damage the target deals by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level13.name: Lashing Out
Level13.fullText: If Searing Lash's second strike hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.

Level13.name: Scarlet Wrath
Level13.shortText: Basic Attacks increase <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> duration
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the duration of all active <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeals</c> by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds, restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">%</c> Mana to all <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> targets, and lower the cooldown of <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeals</c> activation by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Radiance
Level16.shortText: <c val="FF8B8B" hlt-name="#WhitemaneDesperation">Desperation</c> heals allies with <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>
Level16.fullText: Reaching <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks of <c val="FF8B8B" hlt-name="#WhitemaneDesperation">Desperation</c> heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> and reapplies <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> to allies with <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>.

Level16.name: Shared Punishment
Level16.shortText: Inquisition chains to a nearby enemy, lowers Armor
Level16.fullText: Upon casting, Inquisition can chain to an additional enemy Hero near its target, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage every <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds. Affected enemies lose <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> Armor.

Level16.name: Harsh Discipline
Level16.shortText: Searing Lash Roots Inquisition target
Level16.fullText: Hitting a Hero with Searing Lash while they are being targeted by Inquisition Roots them for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Inquisition's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Scarlet Crusade
Level20.shortText: Scarlet Aegis makes allies Unstoppable
Level20.fullText: Scarlet Aegis heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more and makes affected allies Unstoppable for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Judgment Day
Level20.shortText: Divine Reckoning pulls in enemies
Level20.fullText: Divine Reckoning deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> more damage and pulls enemies to its center the first time it hits them.

Level20.name: Guiding Light
Level20.shortText: Activate to cast a free <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c>
Level20.fullText: Activate to cast a permanent <c val="FFF5C2" hlt-name="#WhitemaneZeal">Zeal</c> on an allied Hero that costs no Mana and doesn't grant <c val="FF8B8B" hlt-name="#WhitemaneDesperation">Desperation</c>. Only one can be active at a time and has global cast range.

Level20.name: Purge the Wicked
Level20.shortText: Activate to damage, reduce Armor
Level20.fullText: Activate to blast an enemy Hero with holy fire, reducing their Armor by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25</c> and dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">300</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

WitchDoctor.name: Nazeebo
WitchDoctor.title: Heretic Witch Doctor
WitchDoctor.searchText: Nazeebo Witch Doctor Witchdoctor Nephalem D3 Diablo 3 Diablo3 III Reaper of Souls RoS WD Mage Wall Slow Push Double Soak
WitchDoctor.description: A sustained damage Mage who gains power when killing enemy minions.
WitchDoctor.infoText: With cabalistic incantations and vestments of feather and bone, the witch doctor Nazeebo calls upon spirits from the Unformed Land to aid him. Few outlanders encounter a witch doctor in the flesh, without losing their own.

Basic.name: Corpse Spiders
Basic.shortText: Throw a jar that summons Spiders to attack enemies hit
Basic.fullText: Hurl a jar of spiders that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. If it hits at least one enemy, create <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3 </c>Corpse Spiders that attack for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">38</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage. Spiders last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Zombie Wall
Basic.shortText: Summon a temporary ring of zombies that trap and attack
Basic.fullText: After <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, create a ring of Zombies surrounding the target area that deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">28</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c><c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers"> </c>damage and last for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Plague of Toads
Basic.shortText: Summon a wave of exploding toads
Basic.fullText: Create a wave of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> Toads that explode on contact, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">126</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. This effect stacks.<n/><n/>Stores up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> charges.

Heroic.name: Gargantuan
Heroic.shortText: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area
Heroic.fullText: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">29</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage when summoned, attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Ravenous Spirit
Heroic.shortText: Channel a damaging, movable spirit
Heroic.fullText: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Trait.name: Voodoo Ritual
Trait.shortText: Basic Attacks and Abilities deal damage over time. Killed minions increase Health and Mana.
Trait.fullText: Nazeebo's Basic Attacks and Abilities poison Non-Heroic enemies, causing them to take <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">67</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> additional damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds. <n/><n/><c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> If a Minion dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, Nazeebo permanently gains <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Mana.

Mount.name: Summon Mount
Mount.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, gain <s val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="StandardTooltipDetails">30%</s> Movement Speed.

Hearth.name: Hearthstone
Hearth.fullText: After Channeling for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1125</c> Health and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">150</c> Mana.

Basic.name: Zombie Wall
Basic.fullText: Destroys the active Zombie Wall.

Heroic.name: Gargantuan Stomp
Heroic.fullText: Order the Gargantuan to stomp, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Gargantuan Stomp
Heroic.fullText: Order the Gargantuan to stomp, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Heroic.name: Ravenous Spirit
Heroic.fullText: Cancels the Ravenous Spirit ability and returns control to the Witch Doctor.

Mount.name: Unsummon Mount
Mount.fullText: Dismounts you.

Activable.name: Cancel Ice Block
Activable.fullText: <n/><s val="8783e6" hlt-name="StandardTooltip">Cancel Ice Block early, removing the Stasis and Invulnerability.</s>

Activable.name: Ice Block
Activable.shortText: Activate to become Invulnerable
Activable.fullText: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Soul Harvest
Activable.shortText: Activate to increase Health and Spell Power
Activable.fullText: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7%</c> for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Activable.name: Bad Medicine
Activable.shortText: Consume Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable
Activable.fullText: Consume <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c> increased Movement Speed, and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level1.name: Widowmakers
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Empower Corpse Spiders
Level1.fullText: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes 100 times, their attack damage is increased by 25% and their duration is increased by 1 second.

Level1.name: Pandemic
Level1.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Empower Plague of Toads
Level1.fullText: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.Reward: After hitting 35 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.Reward: After hitting 70 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by 5%, stacking up to 25%.

Level1.name: Thing of the Deep
Level1.shortText: Increase range, <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Spell Power
Level1.fullText: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.Reward: After gaining 50 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain 5% Spell Power.Reward: After gaining 100 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional 5% Spell Power.

Level4.name: Hexed Crawlers
Level4.shortText: Corpse Spiders restore Health and Mana
Level4.fullText: Corpse Spiders restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1%</c> of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.

Level4.name: Big Voodoo
Level4.shortText: Increase Voodoo Ritual bonuses
Level4.fullText: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level4.name: Blood Ritual
Level4.shortText: Voodoo Ritual restores Health and Mana
Level4.fullText: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Takedowns grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> stacks of Voodoo Ritual.

Level7.name: Spirit of Arachyr
Level7.shortText: Spawn more Corpse Spiders
Level7.fullText: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c>. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.

Level7.name: Dead Rush
Level7.shortText: Zombie Wall deals more damage and uproots
Level7.fullText: Zombie Wall deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> more damage. When it expires up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies, losing Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level7.name: Toads of Hugeness
Level7.shortText: Toads become more powerful with each hop
Level7.fullText: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> after each hop, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c>.

Level10.name: Gargantuan
Level10.shortText: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area
Level10.fullText: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">29</c> seconds. Deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage when summoned, attacks for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">240</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and Slows by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds.

Level10.name: Ravenous Spirit
Level10.shortText: Channel a damaging, movable spirit
Level10.fullText: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">230</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">8</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Guardian Toads
Level13.fullText: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, stacking up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Superstition
Level13.shortText: Gain Spell Armor while not being Attacked
Level13.fullText: Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.

Level13.name: Ice Block
Level13.fullText: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Spider Colony
Level16.shortText: Corpse Spiders reduce Basic Ability cooldowns
Level16.fullText: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.125</c> seconds.

Level16.name: Ring of Poison
Level16.shortText: Deals damage in center area
Level16.fullText: Zombie Wall lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">319</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.

Level16.name: Soul Harvest
Level16.shortText: Activate to increase Health and Spell Power
Level16.fullText: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">7%</c> for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c>. Lasts <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Humongoid
Level20.shortText: Empower Gargantuan, Gargantuan Stomp
Level20.fullText: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> and its Slow amount is increased to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> seconds and its Mana cost by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Annihilating Spirit
Level20.shortText: Increase Ravenous Spirit range and damage, reduces healing received
Level20.fullText: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c> for the rest of its duration.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c>.

Level20.name: Vile Infection
Level20.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Empower Voodoo Ritual

Level20.name: Bad Medicine
Level20.shortText: Consume Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable

Wizard.name: Li-Ming
Wizard.title: Rebellious Wizard
Wizard.searchText: Li-Ming Li Ming LiMing liming Liming LM Leeming Wizard Nephalem D3 Diablo 3 Diablo3 III Reaper of Souls RoS Mage Burst Displace Mobile Mobility Escape Artillery
Wizard.description: A high burst damage Mage who can reset her Abilities upon getting a takedown.
Wizard.infoText: The derogatory moniker "wizard" is often given to mages with rebellious attitudes or an obsession with power. Li-Ming displays a little of both and she's hardly ashamed of it. After all, who are they to judge a wielder of limitless arcane magic?

Basic.name: Magic Missiles
Basic.shortText: Fire a volley of missiles
Basic.fullText: Fire three missiles toward an area, each dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">147</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+3.5% per level)</c> damage to the first enemy hit. These missiles do <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage to Structures.

Basic.name: Arcane Orb

Damage is increased the further it travels, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">270</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+3% per level)</c> more damage.

Gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> charge per cast and store up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> charges.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Li-Ming's Mana regeneration is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100%</c> while below <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">35%</c> Mana.

Casting Teleport causes Li-Ming's next cast of Magic Missiles to deal <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> bonus damage.

Level1.name: Power Hungry

Level4.name: Charged Blast
Level4.shortText: Magic Missiles marks enemies for bonus damage
Level4.fullText: Basic Attacking a target recently hit by a Magic Missile does an extra <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">87</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage.

Level4.name: Triumvirate
Level4.shortText: Reduces Arcane Orb cooldown at max range
Level4.fullText: If Arcane Orb hits an enemy Hero after traveling at least <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of its base range, the cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds and <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Mana is refunded.

Level7.name: Seeker

Level7.name: Zei's Vengeance

Level7.name: Calamity

Level13.name: Cannoneer
Level13.fullText: When Li-Ming uses an Ability, her next Basic Attack's damage is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> and deals Spell damage instead of Physical. Stacks up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> times.

Level13.name: Glass Cannon
Level13.shortText: Gain Spell Power but lose max Health
Level13.fullText: Increase Li-Ming's Spell Power by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>, but decrease her maximum Health by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15%</c>.

Level16.name: Fireflies
Level16.shortText: Magic Missiles move faster, lower cooldown and Mana cost
Level16.fullText: Drastically increases Magic Missiles speed. Its cooldown is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second, and its Mana cost is reduced by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c>.

Level16.name: Mirrorball
Level16.shortText: Fires 2 extra Magic Missiles and increases Mana cost
Level16.fullText: Magic Missiles fires an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> missiles, but its Mana cost is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c>.

Level16.name: Arcane Orbit
Level16.shortText: Increases Arcane Orb range
Level16.fullText: Arcane Orb travels <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> farther, increasing its maximum distance damage bonus from <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">270</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+3% per level)</c> to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">371</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+3% per level)</c>.

Level16.name: Diamond Skin

Level16.fullText: Teleport grants a Shield equal to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> of Li-Ming's maximum Health for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds.

Level20.name: Temporal Flux
Level20.shortText: Disintegrate slows enemies
Level20.fullText: Disintegrate gradually Slows enemies caught in its beam, to a maximum of <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">60%</c>.

Level20.name: Repulsion

Level20.fullText: Increases Wave of Force knockback distance by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">175%</c> and increases its cast range by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">95%</c>.

Level20.name: Tal Rasha's Elements

Level20.fullText: Casting Abilities increases the damage of the next Ability by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">20%</c>. This bonus is reset when the same Ability is used within a chain.

Level20.name: Archon: Pure Power

Yrel.name: Yrel
Yrel.title: Light of Hope
Yrel.searchText: Yerel WoW Draenei Warlords of Draenor WoD Alliance Paladin BFA Battle for Azeroth Stun CC Displace Sustain Dive Escape Offlaner
Yrel.description: A deliberate melee Bruiser whose heavyweight abilities reward investment and careful timing.
Yrel.infoText: After traveling to an Alternate Draenor, the forces of Azeroth saved the acolyte Yrel from the Iron Horde. With their aid, she rose to the rank of Exarch and fought back the demonic invasion of her world. Now, she finds herself where time, space, and dimensions converge: the Nexus.

Basic.name: Vindication
Basic.shortText: Restore Health, damage enemies
Basic.fullText: Unleash holy energy around Yrel, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">42</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to nearby enemies and healing her for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">96</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.<n/><n/>Charging up this Ability increases its damage up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">140</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>, and healing up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">320</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>.

Basic.name: Righteous Hammer
Basic.shortText: Knockback and Stun enemies
Basic.fullText: Swing Yrel's hammer, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">38</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in front of her and knocking them away.<n/><n/>Charging up this Ability increases its knockback distance, and damage up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">125</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c>. Enemies hit at maximum charge are Stunned for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.75</c> seconds.

Basic.name: Avenging Wrath
Basic.shortText: Leap to an area to damage, Slow enemies
Basic.fullText: Leap to a location, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">225</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage to enemies in an area and Slowing them by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second.<n/><n/>Charging up this Ability increases its range.

Heroic.name: Ardent Defender
Heroic.shortText: Convert damage taken to Health
Heroic.fullText: Surround Yrel in a barrier for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds, absorbing all damage taken and healing her for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage received.

Heroic.name: Sacred Ground
Heroic.shortText: Yrel gains Armor in an area
Heroic.fullText: Yrel sanctifies the ground around her, gaining <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50</c> Armor until she leaves the area.

Trait.shortText: Make next Basic Ability cast instantly
Trait.fullText: Activate to instantly charge Yrel's next Basic Ability at no mana cost. Divine Purpose's cooldown is reset when Yrel casts a Heroic ability.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Yrel's Basic Abilities charge up over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds, increasing in effectiveness, but reducing Yrel's Movement Speed by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c>.

Level4.name: Aegis of Light
Level4.shortText: Avenging Wrath grants allies Armor
Level4.fullText: Upon landing, Avenging Wrath grants other nearby allied Heroes <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40</c> Armor for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> seconds.

Level4.name: Gift of the Naaru

Zagara.name: Zagara

Zagara.description: A Summoner who provides lots of vision of the battleground.
Zagara.infoText: If Kerrigan is the Queen of the Zerg, then Zagara is the mother of the brood. Cunning and tenacious, she commands her minions on the field of battle. Encounter her brood and beware: Mess with her children, and you answer to mama.

The Hydralisk loses Health over <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds, and has <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">450</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4.5% per level)</c> Health.

Zarya.searchText: Zarya Aleksandra Human Overwatch OW Displace Root Time Stop Shields
Zarya.description: A Support that can enable deadly allies and is good at preventing burst damage.
Zarya.infoText: Aleksandra Zaryanova is one of the world's strongest women and was a promising athlete, but all that changed when the Siberian omnium reawakened. As a soldier in the Russian Defense Force, she now proudly uses her strength to protect the ones she loves.

Zuljin.description: A Physical Damage Assassin that gains power while losing Health.
Zuljin.infoText: Before the elves and their Alliance, the forests of Lordaeron belonged to the trolls of the Amani empire. As their warlord, Zul'jin has united the tribes into an army that stands ready to take back what is theirs and to slay the elves who stole it from them.

Level4.name: Voodoo Shuffle
Level4.shortText: Activate to remove Roots and Slows
Level4.fullText: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.<n/><n/><c val="00ff90" hlt-name="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level4.name: Amani Hide
Level4.shortText: Grant Armor and lower cooldown
Level4.fullText: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds and gain <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">15</c> Armor while regenerating Health from it.

Level7.name: Vicious Assault
Level7.shortText: Increase Grievous Throw duration and damage
Level7.fullText: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds and its damage bonus by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">45%</c>.

Level7.name: Arcanite Axes
Level7.shortText: <c val="e4b800" hlt-name="#TooltipQuest">Quest:</c> Increase Twin Cleave damage
Level7.fullText: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.

Level7.name: Ferocity
Level7.shortText: Increases Berserker's Attack Speed bonus
Level7.fullText: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>.

Level10.name: Taz'dingo!
Level10.shortText: Become unkillable
Level10.fullText: For the next <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">4</c> seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> Health. Taz'dingo!

Level10.name: Guillotine
Level10.shortText: Deal heavy area damage
Level10.fullText: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">330</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.

Level13.name: Lacerate
Level13.fullText: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10%</c> and its duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">0.5</c> seconds.

Level13.name: Eye of Zul'jin
Level13.fullText: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">6%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> seconds, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">30%</c>.

Level13.name: Ensnare
Level13.shortText: Throw a net that Roots enemies
Level13.fullText: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1.5</c> seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">10</c> seconds.

Level16.name: No Mercy!
Level16.shortText: Basic Attacks ignore Armor, deal more damage
Level16.fullText: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">2%</c> of maximum Health as damage.

Level16.name: Wrong Place Wrong Time
Level16.shortText: Bonus Twin Cleave damage at apex
Level16.fullText: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">100</c><c val="a7a7a7" hlt-name="#ColorGray"> (+4% per level)</c> damage and count as <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5</c> Hero hits for You Want Axe?.

Level16.name: Let the Killing Begin
Level16.shortText: Killing enemies increases Attack Speed
Level16.fullText: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">5%</c>, up to <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c>, for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">12</c> seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.<n/><n/>Hero Takedowns instantly grant <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">40%</c> Attack Speed.

Level20.name: Amani Resilience
Level20.shortText: Taz'dingo duration increased, restores Health
Level20.fullText: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.

Level20.name: Buzzsaw
Level20.shortText: Guillotine keeps traveling forward
Level20.fullText: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">75%</c> damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.

Level20.name: Forest Medicine
Level20.shortText: Regeneration cannot be interrupted
Level20.fullText: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.

Level20.name: A Surprise For Ya
Level20.shortText: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy
Level20.fullText: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for <c val="bfd4fd" hlt-name="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
